G1.def: of Hebrew origin; the first letter of the alphabet; figuratively, only (from its use as a numeral) the first.

G2.def: of Hebrew origin (H0175); Aaron, the brother of Moses.

G3.def: of Hebrew origin (H011); a destroying angel.

G4.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G922 (βάρος); weightless, i.e. (figuratively) not burdensome.

G5.def: of Chaldee origin (H02); father as a vocative.

G6.def: of Hebrew origin (H01893); Abel, the son of Adam.

G7.def: of Hebrew origin (H029); Abijah, the name of two Israelites.

G8.def: of Hebrew origin (H054); Abiathar, an Israelite.

G9.def: of foreign origin (compare H058); Abilene, a region of Syria.

G10.def: of Hebrew origin (H031); Abihud, an Israelite.

G11.def: of Hebrew origin (H085); Abraham, the Hebrew patriarch.

G12.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a variation of G1037 (βυθός); depthless, i.e. (specially) (infernal) "abyss".

G13.def: of Hebrew origin (compare H02285); Agabus, an Israelite.

G14.def: from G18 (ἀγαθός) and G2041 (ἔργον); to work good.

G15.def: from G17 (ἀγαθοποιός); to be a well-doer (as a favor or a duty)

G17.def: from G18 (ἀγαθός) and G4160 (ποιέω); a well-doer, i.e. virtuous.

G18.def: a primary word; "good" (in any sense, often as noun)

G19.def: from G18 (ἀγαθός); goodness, i.e. virtue or beneficence.

G21.def: from agan (much) and G242 (ἅλλομαι); properly, to jump for joy, i.e. exult.
G21.kjv: be (exceeding) glad, with exceeding joy, rejoice (greatly)

G22.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1062 (γάμος); unmarried.

G23.def: from (much) and (grief; akin to the base of G43 (ἀγκάλη)); to be greatly afflicted, i.e. (figuratively) indignant.
G23.kjv: be much (sore) displeased, have (be moved with, with) indignation

G25.def: perhaps from ἄγαν (much) (or compare H5689); to love (in a social or moral sense).

G26.def: from G25; love, i.e. affection or benevolence; specially (plural) a love-feast.

G28.def: of Hebrew origin (H01904); Hagar, the concubine of Abraham.

G29.def: of foreign origin (compare H0104); properly, to be a courier, i.e. (by implication) to press into public service.

G30.def: from (a pail, perhaps as bent; compare the base of G43 (ἀγκάλη)); a receptacle.

G31.def: from G32 (ἄγγελος); an announcement, i.e. (by implication) precept.

G32.def: from (probably derived from G71 (ἄγω); compare G34 (ἀγέλη)) (to bring tidings); a messenger; especially an "angel"; by implication, a pastor.

G33.def: imperative of G71 (ἄγω); properly, lead, i.e. come on.

G35.def: from G1 (Α) (as negative particle) and G1075 (γενεαλογέω); unregistered as to birth.

G36.def: from G1 (Α) (as negative particle) and G1085 (γένος); properly, without kin, i.e. (of unknown descent, and by implication) ignoble.

G37.def: from G40 (ἅγιος); to make holy, i.e. (ceremonially) purify or consecrate; (mentally) to venerate.

G38.def: from G37 (ἁγιάζω); properly, purification, i.e. (the state) purity; concretely (by Hebraism) a purifier.

G39.def: neuter of G40 (ἅγιος); a sacred thing (i.e. spot)

G40.def: from ἅγος (an awful thing) (compare G53, G2282); sacred (physically, pure, morally blameless or religious, ceremonially, consecrated).

G41.def: from G40 (ἅγιος); sanctity (i.e. properly, the state)

G42.def: from G40 (ἅγιος); sacredness (i.e. properly, the quality)

G44.def: from the same as G43 (ἀγκάλη); a hook (as bent)

G45.def: from the same as G43 (ἀγκάλη); an "anchor" (as crooked)

G46.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the same as G1102 (γναφεύς); properly, unfulled, i.e. (by implication) new (cloth)

G47.def: from G53 (ἁγνός); cleanliness (the quality), i.e. (specially) chastity.

G48.def: from G53 (ἁγνός); to make clean, i.e. (figuratively) sanctify (ceremonially or morally)

G49.def: from G48 (ἁγνίζω); a cleansing (the act), i.e. (ceremonially) lustration.

G50.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3539 (νοιέω); not to know (through lack of information or intelligence); by implication, to ignore (through disinclination)
G50.kjv: (be) ignorant(-ly), not know, not understand, unknown

G51.def: from G50 (ἀγνοέω); a thing ignored, i.e. shortcoming.

G53.def: from the same as G40 (ἅγιος); properly, clean, i.e. (figuratively) innocent, modest, perfect.

G54.def: from G53 (ἁγνός); cleanness (the state), i.e. (figuratively) blamelessness.

G55.def: adverb from G53 (ἁγνός); purely, i.e. honestly.

G56.def: from G1 (Α) (as negative particle) and G1108 (γνῶσις); ignorance (properly, the state)

G57.def: from G1 (Α) (as negative particle) and G1110 (γνωστός); unknown.

G58.def: from (to gather; probably akin to G1453 (ἐγείρω)); properly, the town-square (as a place of public resort); by implication, a market or thoroughfare.

G59.def: from G58 (ἀγορά); properly, to go to market, i.e. (by implication) to purchase; specially, to redeem.

G60.def: from G58 (ἀγορά); relating to the market-place, i.e. forensic (times); by implication, vulgar.

G61.def: from G71 (ἄγω); (abstractly) a catching (of fish); also (concretely) a haul (of fish)

G62.def: from G1 (Α) (as negative particle) and G1121 (γράμμα); unlettered, i.e. illiterate.

G63.def: from G68 (ἀγρός) and G832 (αὐλέω) (in the sense of G833 (αὐλή)); to camp out.

G64.def: from G61 (ἄγρα); to hunt, i.e. (figuratively) to entrap.

G65.def: from G66 (ἄγριος) and G1636 (ἐλαία); an oleaster.

G66.def: from G68 (ἀγρός); wild (as pertaining to the country), literally (natural) or figuratively (fierce)

G67.def: apparently from G66 (ἄγριος) and G2462 (ἵππος); wild-horse tamer; Agrippas, one of the Herods.

G68.def: from G71 (ἄγω); a field (as a drive for cattle); genitive case, the country; specially, a farm, i.e. hamlet.
G68.kjv: country, farm, piece of ground, land

G69.def: ultimately from G1 (Α) (as negative particle) and G5258 (ὕπνος); to be sleepless, i.e. keep awake.

G70.def: from G69 (ἀγρυπνέω); sleeplessness, i.e. a keeping awake.

G71.def: a primary verb; properly, to lead; by implication, to bring, drive, (reflexively) go, (specially) pass (time), or (figuratively) induce.
G71.kjv: be, bring (forth), carry, (let) go, keep, lead away, be open

G72.def: reduplicated from G71 (ἄγω); a bringing up, i.e. mode of living.

G73.def: from G71 (ἄγω); properly, a place of assembly (as if led), i.e. (by implication) a contest (held there); figuratively, an effort or anxiety.

G74.def: from G73 (ἀγών); a struggle (properly, the state), i.e. (figuratively) anguish.

G75.def: from G73 (ἀγών); to struggle, literally (to compete for a prize), figuratively (to contend with an adversary), or genitive case (to endeavor to accomplish something)

G76.def: of Hebrew origin (H0121); Adam, the first man; typically (of Jesus) man (as his representative)

G77.def: from G1 (Α) (as negative particle); and G1160 (δαπάνη); costless, i.e. gratuitous.

G78.def: probably of Hebrew origin (compare H05716); Addi, an Israelite.

G79.def: feminine of G80 (ἀδελφός); a sister (naturally or ecclesiastically)

G80.def: from G1 (Α) (as a connective particle) and (the womb); a brother (literally or figuratively) near or remote (much like G1 (Α))

G81.def: from G80 (ἀδελφός); brotherhood (properly, the feeling of brotherliness), i.e. the (Christian) fraternity.

G82.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1212 (δῆλος); hidden, figuratively, indistinct.

G85.def: from a derivative of (to be sated to loathing); to be in distress (of mind)
G85.kjv: be full of heaviness, be very heavy

G86.def: from G1 (Α) (as negative particle) and G1492 (εἴδω); properly, unseen, i.e. "Hades" or the place (state) of departed souls.

G87.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G1252 (διακρίνω); properly, undistinguished, i.e. (actively) impartial.

G88.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a compound of G1223 (διά) and G3007 (λείπω); unintermitted, i.e. permanent.

G89.def: adverb from G88 (ἀδιάλειπτος); uninterruptedly, i.e. without omission (on an appropriate occasion)

G90.def: from a derivative of a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G1311 (διαφθείρω); incorruptibleness, i.e. (figuratively) purity (of doctrine)

G91.def: from G94 (ἄδικος); to be unjust, i.e. (actively) do wrong (morally, socially or physically)
G91.kjv: hurt, injure, be an offender, be unjust, (do, suffer, take) wrong

G92.kjv: evil doing, iniquity, matter of wrong

G93.def: from G94 (ἄδικος); (legal) injustice (properly, the quality, by implication, the act); morally, wrongfulness (of character, life or act)

G94.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1349 (δίκη); unjust; by extension wicked; by implication, treacherous; specially, heathen.

G96.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1384 (δόκιμος); unapproved, i.e. rejected; by implication, worthless (literally or morally)

G97.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle); and G1388 (δόλος); undeceitful, i.e. (figuratively) unadulterated.

G98.def: from (a place in Asia Minor); Adramyttene or belonging to Adramyttium.

G99.def: from (a place near its shore); the Adriatic sea (including the Ionian)

G101.def: from G102 (ἀδύνατος); to be unable, i.e. (passively) impossible.

G102.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1415 (δυνατός); unable, i.e. weak (literally or figuratively); passively, impossible.
G102.kjv: could not do, impossible, impotent, not possible, weak

G104.def: from an obsolete primary noun (apparently meaning continued duration); "ever," by qualification regularly; by implication, earnestly.

G105.def: from the same as G109 (ἀήρ); an eagle (from its wind-like flight)

G106.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2219 (ζύμη); unleavened, i.e. (figuratively) uncorrupted; (in the neutral plural) specially (by implication) the Passover week.

G107.def: of Hebrew origin (compare H05809); Azor, an Israelite.

G108.def: of Hebrew origin (H0795); Azotus (i.e. Ashdod), a place in Palestine.

G109.def: from (to breathe unconsciously, i.e. respire; by analogy, to blow); "air" (as naturally circumambient)

G110.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2288 (θάνατος); deathlessness.

G111.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of (statute; from the base of G5087 (τίθημι)); illegal; by implication, flagitious.

G112.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2316 (θεός); godless.

G113.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι) (in the sense of enacting); lawless, i.e. (by implication) criminal.

G114.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι); to set aside, i.e. (by implication) to disesteem, neutralize or violate.
G114.kjv: cast off, despise, disannul, frustrate, bring to nought, reject

G116.def: plural of (the goddess of wisdom, who was reputed to have founded the city); Athenæ, the capitol of Greece.

G117.def: from G116 (Ἀθῆναι); an Athenæan or inhabitant of Athenæ.

G118.def: from (a contest in the public lists); to contend in the competitive games.

G120.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2372 (θυμός); to be spiritless, i.e. disheartened.

G121.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and probably a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι) (meaning a penalty); not guilty.

G122.def: from (a goat); belonging to a goat.

G123.def: from (to rush) and G251 (ἅλς) (in the sense of the sea; a beach (on which the waves dash)

G124.def: from G125 (Αἴγυπτος); an Ægyptian or inhabitant of Ægyptus.

G125.def: of uncertain derivation; Ægyptus, the land of the Nile.

G126.def: from G104 (ἀεί); everduring (forward and backward, or forward only)

G127.def: perhaps from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1492 (εἴδω) (through the idea of downcast eyes); bashfulness, i.e. (towards men), modesty or (towards God) awe.

G128.def: from (to scorch) and (the face, from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)); an Æthiopian (as a blackamoor)

G129.def: of uncertain derivation; blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication, bloodshed, also kindred.

G130.def: from G129 (αἷμα) and a derivative of G1632 (ἐκχέω); an effusion of blood.

G131.def: from G129 (αἷμα) and G4482 (ῥέω); to flow blood, i.e. have a hæmorrhage.
G131.kjv: diseased with an issue of blood

G132.def: of uncertain derivation; Ænĕas, an Israelite.

G133.def: from G134 (αἰνέω); a praising (the act), i.e. (specially) a thank(-offering)

G135.def: from a derivative of G136 (αἶνος) (in its primary sense); an obscure saying ("enigma"), i.e. (abstractly) obscureness.

G136.def: apparently a prime word; properly, a story, but used in the sense of G1868 (ἔπαινος); praise (of God)

G137.def: of Hebrew origin (a derivative of G5869, place of springs); Ænon, a place in Palestine.

G138.def: probably akin to G142 (αἴρω); to take for oneself, i.e. to prefer.

G139.def: from G138 (αἱρέομαι); properly, a choice, i.e. (specially) a party or (abstractly) disunion.
G139.kjv: heresy (which is the Greek word itself), sect

G140.def: from a derivative of G138 (αἱρέομαι); to make a choice.

G141.def: from the same as G140 (αἱρετίζω); a schismatic.

G142.def: a primary root; to lift up; by implication, to take up or away; figuratively, to raise (the voice), keep in suspense (the mind), specially, to sail away (i.e. weigh anchor); by Hebraism (compare H05375) to expiate sin.
G142.kjv: away with, bear (up), carry, lift up, loose, make to doubt, put away, remove, take (away, up)

G143.def: of uncertain derivation; to apprehend (properly, by the senses)

G145.def: from a derivative of G143 (αἰσθάνομαι); properly, an organ of perception, i.e. (figuratively) judgment.

G148.def: from G150 (αἰσχρός) and G3056 (λόγος); vile conversation.

G149.def: neuter of G150 (αἰσχρός); a shameful thing, i.e. indecorum.

G150.def: from the same as G153 (αἰσχύνομαι); shameful, i.e. base (specially, venal)

G152.def: from G153 (αἰσχύνομαι); shame or disgrace (abstractly or concretely)

G153.def: from (disfigurement, i.e. disgrace); to feel shame (for oneself)

G154.def: of uncertain derivation; to ask (in genitive case)
G154.kjv: ask, beg, call for, crave, desire, require

G155.def: from G154 (αἰτέω); a thing asked or (abstractly) an asking.

G156.def: from the same as G154 (αἰτέω); a cause (as if asked for), i.e. (logical) reason (motive, matter), (legal) crime (alleged or proved)

G157.def: from a derivative of G156 (αἰτία); a thing charged.

G158.def: neuter of G159 (αἴτιος); a reason or crime (like G156 (αἰτία))

G159.def: from the same as G154 (αἰτέω); causative, i.e. (concretely) a causer.

G160.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5316 (φαίνω) (compare G1810 (ἐξαίφνης)) (meaning non-apparent); unexpected, i.e. (adverbially) suddenly.

G163.kjv: lead away captive, bring into captivity

G164.def: from (a spear) and a derivative of the same as G259 (ἅλωσις); properly, a prisoner of war, i.e. (genitive case) a captive.

G165.def: from the same as G104 (ἀεί); properly, an age; by extension, perpetuity (also past); by implication, the world; specially (Jewish) a Messianic period (present or future)
G165.kjv: age, course, eternal, (for) ever(-more), (n-)ever, (beginning of the , while the) world (began, without end)

G166.def: from G165 (αἰών); perpetual (also used of past time, or past and future as well)

G167.def: from G169 (ἀκάθαρτος); impurity (the quality), physically or morally.

G169.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2508 (καθαίρω) (meaning cleansed); impure (ceremonially, morally (lewd) or specially, (demonic))

G170.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2540 (καιρός) (meaning unseasonable); to be inopportune (for oneself), i.e. to fail of a proper occasion.

G171.def: adverb from the same as G170 (ἀκαιρέομαι); inopportunely.

G172.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2556 (κακός); not bad, i.e. (objectively) innocent or (subjectively) unsuspecting.

G173.def: probably from the same as G188 (ἀκμήν); a thorn.

G175.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2590 (καρπός); barren (literally or figuratively)

G176.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2607 (καταγινώσκω); unblamable.

G177.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a compound of G2596 (κατά) and G2572 (καλύπτω); unveiled.

G178.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2632 (κατακρίνω); without (legal) trial.

G179.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2647 (καταλύω); indissoluble, i.e. (figuratively) permanent.

G180.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2664 (καταπαύω); unrefraining.

G182.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2525 (καθίστημι); inconstant.

G183.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2722 (κατέχω); unrestrainable.

G184.def: of Chaldee origin (meaning field of blood; corresponding to H02506 and H01818); Akeldama, a place near Jerusalem.

G185.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2767 (κεράννυμι); unmixed, i.e. (figuratively) innocent.

G186.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2827 (κλίνω); not leaning, i.e. (figuratively) firm.

G187.def: from the same as G188 (ἀκμήν); to make a point, i.e. (figuratively) mature.

G188.def: accusative case of a noun ("acme") akin to (a point) and meaning the same; adverbially, just now, i.e. still.

G189.def: from G191 (ἀκούω); hearing (the act, the sense or the thing heard)
G189.kjv: audience, ear, fame, which ye heard, hearing, preached, report, rumor

G190.def: from G1 (Α) (as a particle of union) and (a road); properly, to be in the same way with, i.e. to accompany (specially, as a disciple)

G191.def: a primary verb; to hear (in various senses)
G191.kjv: give (in the) audience (of), come (to the ears), (shall) hear(-er, -ken), be noised, be reported, understand

G193.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2904 (κράτος); powerless, i.e. without self-control.

G194.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2767 (κεράννυμι); undiluted.

G195.def: from the same as G196 (ἀκριβέστατος); exactness.

G196.def: superlative of (a derivative of the same as G206 (ἄκρον)); most exact.

G197.def: neuter of the comparative of the same as G196 (ἀκριβέστατος); (adverbially) more exactly.

G198.def: from the same as G196 (ἀκριβέστατος); to be exact, i.e. ascertain.

G199.def: adverb from the same as G196 (ἀκριβέστατος); exactly.

G200.def: apparently from the same as G206 (ἄκρον); a locust (as pointed, or as lighting on the top of vegetation)

G202.def: from (to listen; apparently an intensive of G191 (ἀκούω)); a hearer (merely)

G203.def: from G206 (ἄκρον) and probably a modified form of (the penis or male sexual organ); the prepuce; by implication, an uncircumcised (i.e. gentile, figuratively, unregenerate) state or person.

G204.def: from G206 (ἄκρον) and G1137 (γωνία); belonging to the extreme corner.

G205.def: from G206 (ἄκρον) and (a heap); properly (in the plural) the top of the heap, i.e. (by implication) best of the booty.

G206.def: neuter of an adjective probably akin to the base of G188 (ἀκμήν); the extremity.
G206.kjv: one end… other, tip, top, uttermost participle

G207.def: probably for Latin aquila (an eagle); Akulas, an Israelite.

G208.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2964 (κυρόω); to invalidate.

G209.def: adverb from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2967 (κωλύω); in an unhindered manner, i.e. freely.

G210.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1635 (ἑκών); unwilling.

G211.def: neuter of (of uncertain derivation), the name of a stone; properly, an "alabaster" box, i.e. (by extension) a perfume vase (of any material)

G212.def: from G213 (ἀλαζών); braggadocio, i.e. (by implication) self-confidence.

G214.def: from ( a shout, "halloo"); to vociferate, i.e. (by implication) to wail; figuratively, to clang.

G215.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2980 (λαλέω); unspeakable.

G216.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2980 (λαλέω); mute.

G218.def: from G1 (Α) (as particle of union) and the base of G3045 (λιπαρός); to oil (with perfume)

G219.def: from G220 (ἀλέκτωρ) and G5456 (φωνή); cock-crow, i.e. the third night-watch.

G220.def: from (to ward off); a cock or male fowl.

G221.def: from (the city so called); an Alexandreian or inhabitant of Alexandria.

G222.def: from the same as G221 (Ἀλεξανδρεύς); Alexandrine, or belonging to Alexandria.

G223.def: from the same as (the first part of) G220 (ἀλέκτωρ) and G435 (ἀνήρ); man-defender; Alexander, the name of three Israelites and one other man.

G226.def: from G227 (ἀληθής); to be true (in doctrine and profession)

G227.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2990 (λανθάνω); true (as not concealing)

G229.def: from the same as G224 (ἄλευρον); to grind.

G230.kjv: indeed, surely, of a surety, truly, of a (in) truth, verily, very

G231.def: from G251 (ἅλς); a sailor (as engaged on the salt water), i.e. (by implication) a fisher.

G232.def: from G231 (ἁλιεύς); to be a fisher, i.e. (by implication) to fish.

G235.def: neuter plural of G243 (ἄλλος); properly, other things, i.e. (adverbially) contrariwise (in many relations)
G235.kjv: and, but (even), howbeit, indeed, nay, nevertheless, no, notwithstanding, save, therefore, yea, yet

G238.def: from G243 (ἄλλος) and (to harangue (compare G58 (ἀγορά))); to allegorize.
G238.kjv: be an allegory (the Greek word itself)

G239.def: of Hebrew origin (imperative of H01984 and H03050); praise ye Jah!, an adoring exclamation.

G240.def: Genitive plural from G243 (ἄλλος) reduplicated; one another.

G466.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G378 (ἀναπληρόω); to supplement.

G467.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G591 (ἀποδίδωμι); to requite (good or evil)

G468.def: from G467 (ἀνταποδίδωμι); a requital (properly, the thing)

G470.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G611 (ἀποκρίνομαι); to contradict or dispute.

G471.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G2036 (ἔπω); to refute or deny.

G472.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and the middle voice of G2192 (ἔχω); to hold oneself opposite to, i.e. (by implication) adhere to; by extension to care for.

G473.def: a primary particle; opposite, i.e. instead or because of (rarely in addition to)

G474.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G906 (βάλλω); to bandy.

G475.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G1303 (διατίθεμαι); to set oneself opposite, i.e. be disputatious.

G476.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G1349 (δίκη); an opponent (in a lawsuit); specially, Satan (as the arch-enemy)

G477.def: from a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and G5087 (τίθημι); opposition, i.e. a conflict (of theories)

G478.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G2525 (καθίστημι); to set down (troops) against, i.e. withstand.

G479.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G2564 (καλέω); to invite in return.

G480.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G2749 (κεῖμαι); to lie opposite, i.e. be adverse (figuratively, repugnant) to.

G482.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and the middle voice of G2983 (λαμβάνω); to take hold of in turn, i.e. succor; also to participate.

G483.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G3004 (λέγω); to dispute, refuse.
G483.kjv: answer again, contradict, deny, gainsay(-er), speak against

G485.def: from a derivative of G483 (ἀντιλέγω); dispute, disobedience.

G486.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G3058 (λοιδορέω); to rail in reply.

G487.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G3083 (λύτρον); a redemption-price.

G488.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G3354 (μετρέω); to mete in return.

G489.def: from a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and G3408 (μισθός); requital, correspondence.

G490.def: from (a Syrian king); Antiochia, a place in Syria.

G491.def: from G490 (Ἀντιόχεια); an Antiochian or inhabitant of Antiochia.

G492.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G3928 (παρέρχομαι); to go along opposite.
G492.kjv: pass by on the other side

G493.def: contracted for a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and a derivative of G3962 (πατήρ); Antipas, a Christian.

G494.def: from the same as G493 (Ἀντίπας); Antipatris, a place in Palestine.

G495.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G4008 (πέραν); on the opposite side.

G496.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G4098 (πίπτω) (including its alternate); to oppose.

G497.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G4754 (στρατεύομαι); (figuratively) to attack, i.e. (by implication) destroy.

G498.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and the middle voice of G5021 (τάσσω); to range oneself against, i.e. oppose.

G499.def: neuter of a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and G5179 (τύπος); corresponding ("antitype"), i.e. a representative, counterpart.

G500.def: from G473 (ἀντί) and G5547 (Χριστός); an opponent of the Messiah.

G501.def: from (the hold of a ship); to bale up (properly, bilge water), i.e. dip water (with a bucket, pitcher, etc.)

G503.def: from a compound of G473 (ἀντί) and G3788 (ὀφθαλμός); to face.

G504.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5204 (ὕδωρ); waterless, i.e. dry.

G505.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G5271 (ὑποκρίνομαι); undissembled, i.e. sincere.

G506.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G5293 (ὑποτάσσω); unsubdued, i.e. insubordinate (in fact or temper)
G506.kjv: disobedient, that is not put under, unruly

G507.def: adverb from G473 (ἀντί); upward or on the top.

G508.def: from G507 (ἄνω) and G1093 (γῆ); above the ground, i.e. (properly) the second floor of a building; used for a dome or a balcony on the upper story.

G509.def: from G507 (ἄνω); from above; by analogy, from the first; by implication, anew.
G509.kjv: from above, again, from the beginning (very first), the top

G510.def: from G511 (ἀνώτερος); superior, i.e. (locally) more remote.

G511.def: comparative degree of G507 (ἄνω); upper, i.e. (neuter as adverb) to a more conspicuous place, in a former part of the book.

G512.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G5624 (ὠφέλιμος); useless or (neuter) inutility.

G513.def: probably from (to break; compare G4486 (ῥήγνυμι)); an axe.

G514.def: probably from G71 (ἄγω); deserving, comparable or suitable (as if drawing praise)

G515.def: from G514 (ἄξιος); to deem entitled or fit.

G516.kjv: as becometh, after a godly sort, worthily(-thy)

G517.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3707 (ὁρατός); invisible.

G518.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος); to announce.
G518.kjv: bring word (again), declare, report, shew (again), tell

G519.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and (to choke; akin to the base of G43 (ἀγκάλη)); to strangle oneself off (i.e. to death)

G520.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G71 (ἄγω); to take off (in various senses)
G520.kjv: bring, carry away, lead (away), put to death, take away

G521.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G3811 (παιδεύω); uninstructed, i.e. (figuratively) stupid.

G522.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G142 (αἴρω); to lift off, i.e. remove.

G523.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G154 (αἰτέω); to demand back.

G524.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and (to smart); to grieve out, i.e. become apathetic.

G525.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G236 (ἀλλάσσω); to change away, i.e. release, (reflexively) remove.

G526.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G245 (ἀλλότριος); to estrange away, i.e. (passively and figuratively) to be non-participant.

G528.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G473 (ἀντί); to meet away, i.e. encounter.

G530.def: probably from G537 (ἅπας); one (or a single) time (numerically or conclusively)

G531.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G3845 (παραβαίνω); not passing away, i.e. untransferable (perpetual)

G532.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G3903 (παρασκευάζω); unready.

G533.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G720 (ἀρνέομαι); to deny utterly, i.e. disown, abstain.

G534.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G737 (ἄρτι); from now, i.e. henceforth (already)

G535.def: from a derivative of G534 (ἀπάρτι); completion.

G536.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G756 (ἄρχομαι); a beginning of sacrifice, i.e. the (Jewish) first-fruit (figuratively)

G537.def: from G1 (Α) (as a particle of union) and G3956 (πᾶς); absolutely all or (singular) every one.

G538.def: of uncertain derivation; to cheat, i.e. delude.

G540.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3962 (πατήρ); fatherless, i.e. of unrecorded paternity.

G541.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G826 (αὐγάζω); an off-flash, i.e. effulgence.

G542.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the same as G1492 (εἴδω); to see fully.

G544.def: from G545 (ἀπειθής); to disbelieve (wilfully and perversely)
G544.kjv: not believe, disobedient, obey not, unbelieving

G545.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3982 (πείθω); unpersuadable, i.e. contumacious.

G546.def: of uncertain derivation; to menace; by implication, to forbid.

G548.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1510 (εἰμί); to be away.

G549.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and (to go); to go away.

G550.def: reflexive past of a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G2036 (ἔπω); to say off for oneself, i.e. disown.

G551.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G3987 (πειράω); untried, i.e. not temptable.

G552.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G3984 (πεῖρα); inexperienced, i.e. ignorant.

G553.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1551 (ἐκδέχομαι); to expect fully.

G554.def: middle voice from G575 (ἀπό) and G1562 (ἐκδύω); to divest wholly oneself, or (for oneself) despoil.

G556.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1643 (ἐλαύνω); to dismiss.

G557.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G1651 (ἐλέγχω); refutation, i.e. (by implication) contempt.

G558.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1658 (ἐλεύθερος); one freed away, i.e. a freedman.

G559.def: of Latin origin; Apelles, a Christian.

G560.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1679 (ἐλπίζω); to hope out, i.e. fully expect.

G561.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1725 (ἔναντι); from in front, i.e. opposite, before or against.
G561.kjv: before, contrary, over against, in the presence of

G562.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a secondary derivative of G4008 (πέραν); unfinished, i.e. (by implication) interminable.

G563.def: adverb from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative participle) and a presumed derivative of G4049 (περισπάω); undistractedly, i.e. free from (domestic) solicitude.

G564.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4059 (περιτέμνω); uncircumcised (figuratively)

G565.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι); to go off (i.e. depart), aside (i.e. apart) or behind (i.e. follow), literally or figuratively.
G565.kjv: come, depart, go (aside, away, back, out, … ways), pass away, be past

G566.def: third person singular present indicative active of G568 (ἀπέχω) used impersonally; it is sufficient.

G567.def: middle voice (reflexively) of G568 (ἀπέχω); to hold oneself off, i.e. refrain.

G568.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2192 (ἔχω); (actively) to have out, i.e. receive in full; (intransitively) to keep (oneself) away, i.e. be distant (literally or figuratively)

G569.def: from G571 (ἄπιστος); to be unbelieving, i.e. (transitively) disbelieve, or (by implication) disobey.

G570.def: from G571 (ἄπιστος); faithlessness, i.e. (negatively) disbelief (lack of Christian faith), or (positively) unfaithfulness (disobedience)

G571.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G4103 (πιστός); (actively) disbelieving, i.e. without Christian faith (specially, a heathen); (passively) untrustworthy (person), or incredible (thing)
G571.kjv: that believeth not, faithless, incredible thing, infidel, unbeliever(-ing)

G572.def: from G573 (ἁπλοῦς); singleness, i.e. (subjectively) sincerity (without dissimulation or self-seeking), or (objectively) generosity (copious bestowal)

G573.def: probably from G1 (Α) (as a particle of union) and the base of G4120 (πλέκω); properly, folded together, i.e. single (figuratively, clear)

G574.def: adverb from G573 (ἁπλοῦς) (in the objective sense of G572 (ἁπλότης)); bountifully;.

G575.def: a primary particle; "off," i.e. away (from something near), in various senses (of place, time, or relation; literal or figurative)
G575.kjv: (X here-)after, ago, at, because of, before, by (the space of), for(-th), from, in, (out) of, off, (up-)on(-ce), since, with

G576.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G939 (βάσις); literally, to disembark; figuratively, to eventuate.

G577.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw off; figuratively, to lose.

G578.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G991 (βλέπω); to look away from everything else, i.e. (figuratively) intently regard.

G579.def: from G577 (ἀποβάλλω); cast off, i.e. (figuratively) such as to be rejected.

G581.def: past participle of a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G1096 (γίνομαι); absent, i.e. deceased (figuratively, renounced)

G582.def: from G583 (ἀπογράφω); an enrollment; by implication, an assessment.

G583.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1125 (γράφω); to write off (a copy or list), i.e. enrol.

G584.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1166 (δεικνύω); to show off, i.e. exhibit; figuratively, to demonstrate, i.e. accredit.

G586.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1183 (δεκατόω); to tithe (as debtor or creditor)

G588.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1209 (δέχομαι); to take fully, i.e. welcome (persons), approve (things)

G589.def: from G590 (ἀπόδημος); to go abroad, i.e. visit a foreign land.
G589.kjv: go (travel) into a far country, journey

G590.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1218 (δῆμος); absent from one's own people, i.e. a foreign traveller.

G591.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to give away, i.e. up, over, back, etc. (in various applications)
G591.kjv: deliver (again), give (again), (re-)pay(-ment be made), perform, recompense, render, requite, restore, reward, sell, yield

G592.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and a compound of G223 (Ἀλέξανδρος) and G3724 (ὁρίζω); to disjoin (by a boundary, figuratively, a party)

G593.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G1381 (δοκιμάζω); to disapprove, i.e. (by implication) to repudiate.

G595.def: from G659 (ἀποτίθημι); a laying aside (literally or figuratively)

G596.def: from G659 (ἀποτίθημι); a repository, i.e. granary.

G597.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2343 (θησαυρίζω); to treasure away.

G598.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2346 (θλίβω); to crowd (from every side)

G599.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2348 (θνήσκω); to die off (literally or figuratively)
G599.kjv: be dead, death, die, lie a-dying, be slain (X with)

G600.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2525 (καθίστημι); to reconstitute (in health, home or organization)

G601.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2572 (καλύπτω); to take off the cover, i.e. disclose.

G602.kjv: appearing, coming, lighten, manifestation, be revealed, revelation

G603.def: from a comparative of G575 (ἀπό) and a compound of (the head) and G1380 (δοκέω) (in the sense of watching); intense anticipation.

G604.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2644 (καταλλάσσω); to reconcile fully.

G606.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2749 (κεῖμαι); to be reserved; figuratively, to await.

G607.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2776 (κεφαλή); to decapitate.

G608.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2808 (κλείω); to close fully.

G609.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2875 (κόπτω); to amputate; reflexively (by irony) to mutilate (the privy parts)

G610.def: from G611 (ἀποκρίνομαι) (in its original sense of judging); a judicial decision.

G611.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and ; to conclude for oneself, i.e. (by implication) to respond; by Hebraism (compare H06030) to begin to speak (where an address is expected)

G613.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2928 (κρύπτω); to conceal away (i.e. fully); figuratively, to keep secret.

G614.def: from G613 (ἀποκρύπτω); secret; by implication, treasured.

G615.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and (to slay); to kill outright; figuratively, to destroy.

G616.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G2949 (κῦμα); to breed forth, i.e. (by transference) to generate (figuratively)

G617.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2947 (κυλιόω); to roll away.

G618.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to receive (specially, in full, or as a host); also to take aside.

G619.def: from a comparative of G575 (ἀπό) and (to enjoy); full enjoyment.

G620.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G3007 (λείπω); to leave behind (passively, remain); by implication, to forsake.

G621.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and (to "lick"); to lick clean.

G622.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G3639 (ὄλεθρος); to destroy fully (reflexively, to perish, or lose), literally or figuratively.

G623.def: active participle of G622 (ἀπόλλυμι); a destroyer (i.e. Satan)

G624.def: from the pagan deity (i.e. the sun; from G622 (ἀπόλλυμι)); Apollonia, a place in Macedonia.

G625.def: probably from the same as G624 (Ἀπολλωνία); Apollos, an Israelite.

G626.def: middle voice from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G3056 (λόγος); to give an account (legal plea) of oneself, i.e. exculpate (self)
G626.kjv: answer (for self), make defence, excuse (self), speak for self

G627.def: from the same as G626 (ἀπολογέομαι); a plea ("apology")
G627.kjv: answer (for self), clearing of self, defence

G628.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G3068 (λούω); to wash fully, i.e. (figuratively) have remitted (reflexively)

G629.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G3083 (λύτρον); (the act) ransom in full, i.e. (figuratively) riddance, or (specially) Christian salvation.

G630.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G3089 (λύω); to free fully, i.e. (literally) relieve, release, dismiss (reflexively, depart), or (figuratively) let die, pardon or (specially) divorce.
G630.kjv: (let) depart, dismiss, divorce, forgive, let go, loose, put (send) away, release, set at liberty

G631.def: middle voice from G575 (ἀπό) and (to squeeze, knead, smear); to scrape away.

G632.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G3551 (νόμος); to apportion, i.e. bestow.

G633.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G3538 (νίπτω); to wash off (reflexively, one's own hands symbolically)

G634.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4098 (πίπτω); to fall off.

G635.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4105 (πλανάω); to lead astray (figuratively); passively, to stray (from truth)

G636.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4126 (πλέω); to set sail.

G637.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4150 (πλύνω); to rinse off.

G638.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4155 (πνίγω); to stifle (by drowning or overgrowth)

G639.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G4198 (πορεύομαι); to have no way out, i.e. be at a loss (mentally)

G640.def: from the same as G639 (ἀπορέω); a (state of) quandary.

G641.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4496 (ῥίπτω); to hurl off, i.e. precipitate (oneself)

G642.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G3737 (ὀρφανός); to bereave wholly, i.e. (figuratively) separate (from intercourse)

G643.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G4632 (σκεῦος); to pack up (one's) baggage.

G644.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G4639 (σκιά); a shading off, i.e. obscuration.

G645.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4685 (σπάω); to drag forth, i.e. (literally) unsheathe (a sword), or relatively (with a degree of force implied) retire (personally or factiously)

G646.def: feminine of the same as G647 (ἀποστάσιον); defection from truth (properly, the state) ("apostasy")

G647.def: neuter of a (presumed) adjective from a derivative of G868 (ἀφίστημι); properly, something separative, i.e. (specially) divorce.

G648.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and a derivative of G4721 (στέγη); to unroof.

G649.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4724 (στέλλω); set apart, i.e. (by implication) to send out (properly, on a mission) literally or figuratively.
G649.kjv: put in, send (away, forth, out), set (at liberty)

G650.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and (to deprive); to despoil.
G650.kjv: defraud, destitute, kept back by fraud

G652.def: from G649; a delegate; specially, an ambassador of the Gospel; officially a commissioner of Christ.

G653.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and a (presumed) derivative of G4750 (στόμα); to speak off-hand (properly, dictate), i.e. to catechize (in an invidious manner)

G654.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G4762 (στρέφω); to turn away or back (literally or figuratively)

G655.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G4767 (στυγνητός); to detest utterly.

G657.def: middle voice from G575 (ἀπό) and G5021 (τάσσω); literally, to say adieu (by departing or dismissing); figuratively, to renounce.
G657.kjv: bid farewell, forsake, take leave, send away

G658.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5055 (τελέω); to complete entirely, i.e. consummate.

G659.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5087 (τίθημι); to put away (literally or figuratively)
G659.kjv: cast off, lay apart (aside, down), put away (off)

G660.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and (to jostle); to brush off.

G661.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5099 (τίνω); to pay in full.

G662.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5111 (τολμάω); to venture plainly.

G663.def: from the base of G664 (ἀποτόμως); (figuratively) decisiveness, i.e. rigor.

G664.def: adverb from a derivative of a comparative of G575 (ἀπό) and (to cut); abruptly, i.e. peremptorily.

G665.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G5157 (τροπή); to deflect, i.e. (reflexively) avoid.

G666.def: from the participle of G548 (ἄπειμι); a being away.

G667.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5342 (φέρω); to bear off (literally or relatively)

G668.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5343 (φεύγω); (figuratively) to escape.

G669.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5350 (φθέγγομαι); to enunciate plainly, i.e. declare.

G670.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the middle voice of G5412 (φορτίζω); to unload.

G671.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G5530 (χράομαι); the act of using up, i.e. consumption.

G672.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5562 (χωρέω); to go away.

G673.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5563 (χωρίζω); to rend apart; reflexively, to separate.

G674.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G5594 (ψύχω); to breathe out, i.e. faint.

G675.def: of Latin origin; (in the genitive, i.e. possessive case) of Appius, the name of a Roman.

G676.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a comparative of G4314 (πρός) and (to go); inaccessible.

G677.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4350 (προσκόπτω); actively, inoffensive, i.e. not leading into sin; passively, faultless, i.e. not led into sin.

G678.def: adverb from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of a presumed compound of G4383 (πρόσωπον) and G2983 (λαμβάνω) (compare G4381 (προσωπολήπτης)); in a way not accepting the person, i.e. impartially.

G679.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4417 (πταίω); not stumbling, i.e. (figuratively) without sin.

G680.def: reflexive of G681 (ἅπτω); properly, to attach oneself to, i.e. to touch (in many implied relations)

G681.def: a primary verb; properly, to fasten to, i.e. (specially) to set on fire.

G682.def: probably of foreign origin; Apphia, a woman of Collosæ.

G683.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the middle voice of or (to shove); to push off, figuratively, to reject.
G683.kjv: cast away, put away (from), thrust away (from)

G684.def: from a presumed derivative of G622 (ἀπόλλυμι); ruin or loss (physical, spiritual or eternal)
G684.kjv: damnable(-nation), destruction, die, perdition, X perish, pernicious ways, waste

G685.def: probably from G142 (αἴρω); properly, prayer (as lifted to Heaven), i.e. (by implication) imprecation.

G686.def: probably from G142 (αἴρω) (through the idea of drawing a conclusion); a particle denoting an inference more or less decisive (as follows)
G686.kjv: haply, (what) manner (of man), no doubt, perhaps, so be, then, therefore, truly, wherefore

G687.def: a form of G686 (ἄρα), denoting an interrogation to which a negative answer is presumed.

G688.def: of Hebrew origin (H06152); Arabia, a region of Asia.

G689.def: of Hebrew origin (H07410); Aram (i.e. Ram), an Israelite.

G690.def: from G688 (Ἀραβία); an Arab or native of Arabia.

G691.def: from G692 (ἀργός); to be idle, i.e. (figuratively) to delay.

G692.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2041 (ἔργον); inactive, i.e. unemployed; (by implication) lazy, useless.

G694.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G696 (ἄργυρος); silvery, i.e. (by implication) cash; specially, a silverling (i.e. drachma or shekel)

G695.def: from G696 (ἄργυρος) and G2875 (κόπτω); a beater (i.e. worker) of silver.

G696.def: from (shining); silver (the metal, in the articles or coin)

G697.def: from (the name of the Greek deity of war) and a derivative of G4078 (πήγνυμι); rock of Ares, a place in Athens.

G698.def: from G697 (Ἄρειος Πάγος); an Areopagite or member of the court held on Mars' Hill.

G699.def: from a derivative of G700 (ἀρέσκω); complaisance.

G700.def: probably from G142 (αἴρω) (through the idea of exciting emotion); to be agreeable (or by implication, to seek to be so)

G701.def: from G700 (ἀρέσκω); agreeable; by implication, fit.

G702.def: of foreign origin; Aretas, an Arabian.

G703.def: from the same as G730 (ἄῤῥην); properly, manliness (valor), i.e. excellence (intrinsic or attributed)

G704.def: perhaps the same as G730 (ἄῤῥην); a lamb (as a male)

G705.def: from G706 (ἀριθμός); to enumerate or count.

G706.def: from G142 (αἴρω); a number (as reckoned up)

G707.def: of Hebrew origin (H07414); Arimathæa (or Ramah), a place in Palestine.

G708.def: from the same as G712 (ἄριστον) and G757 (ἄρχω); best ruling; Aristarchus, a Macedonian.

G709.def: from G712 (ἄριστον); to take the principle meal.

G710.def: apparently a comparative of the same as G712 (ἄριστον); the left hand (as second-best)

G711.def: from the same as G712 (ἄριστον) and G1012 (βουλή); best counselling; Aristoboulus, a Christian.

G712.def: apparently neuter of a superlative from the same as G730 (ἄῤῥην); the best meal (or breakfast; perhaps from ("early")), i.e. luncheon.

G714.def: apparently a primary verb (but probably akin to G142 (αἴρω) through the idea of raising a barrier); properly, to ward off, i.e. (by implication) to avail (figuratively, be satisfactory)
G714.kjv: be content, be enough, suffice, be sufficient

G715.def: probably from G714 (ἀρκέω); a bear (as obstructing by ferocity)

G716.def: probably from G142 (αἴρω) (perhaps with G1 (Α) (as a particle of union) prefixed); a chariot (as raised or fitted together (compare G719 (ἁρμός)))

G717.def: of Hebrew origin (H02022 and H04023); Armageddon (or Har-Meggiddon), a symbolic name.

G718.def: from G719 (ἁρμός); to joint, i.e. (figuratively) to woo (reflexively, to betroth)

G719.def: from the same as G716 (ἅρμα); an articulation (of the body)

G720.def: perhaps from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the middle voice of G4483 (ῥέω); to contradict, i.e. disavow, reject, abnegate.

G726.def: from a derivative of G138 (αἱρέομαι); to seize (in various applications)
G726.kjv: catch (away, up), pluck, pull, take (by force)

G728.def: of Hebrew origin (H06162); a pledge, i.e. part of the purchase-money or property given in advance as security for the rest.

G729.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of the same as G4476 (ῥαφίς); unsewed, i.e. of a single piece.

G730.def: probably from G142 (αἴρω); male (as stronger for lifting)

G731.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the same as G4490 (ῥητῶς); unsaid, i.e. (by implication) inexpressible.

G732.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4517 (ῥώννυμι); infirm.

G733.def: from G730 (ἄῤῥην) and G2845 (κοίτη); a sodomite.
G733.kjv: abuser of (that defile) self with mankind

G734.def: contracted from a compound of G735 (Ἄρτεμις) and G1435 (δῶρον); gift of Artemis; Artemas (or Artemidorus), a Christian.

G735.def: probably from the same as G736 (ἀρτέμων); prompt; Artemis, the name of a Grecian goddess borrowed by the Asiatics for one of their deities.

G736.def: from a derivative of G737 (ἄρτι); properly, something ready (or else more remotely from G142 (αἴρω) (compare G740 (ἄρτος)); something hung up), i.e. (specially) the topsail (rather foresail or jib) of a vessel.

G737.def: adverb from a derivative of G142 (αἴρω) (compare G740 (ἄρτος)) through the idea of suspension; just now.
G737.kjv: this day (hour), hence(-forth), here(-after), hither(-to), (even) now, (this) present

G738.def: from G737 (ἄρτι) and G1084 (γεννητός); just born, i.e. (figuratively) a young convert.

G739.def: from G737 (ἄρτι); fresh, i.e. (by implication) complete.

G740.def: from G142 (αἴρω); bread (as raised) or a loaf.

G741.def: from a presumed derivative of G142 (αἴρω); to prepare, i.e. spice (with stimulating condiments)

G742.def: of Hebrew origin (H0775); Arphaxad, a post-diluvian patriarch.

G743.def: from G757 (ἄρχω) and G32 (ἄγγελος); a chief angel.

G745.def: from G757 (ἄρχω) and G2994 (Λαοδικεύς); people-ruling; Archelaus, a Jewish king.

G746.def: from G756; (properly abstract) a commencement, or (concretely) chief (in various applications of order, time, place, or rank).

G747.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and G71 (ἄγω); a chief leader.

G748.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and a derivative of G2413 (ἱερός); high-priestly.

G749.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and G2409 (ἱερεύς); the high-priest (literally, of the Jews, typically, Christ); by extension a chief priest.
G749.kjv: chief (high) priest, chief of the priests

G750.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and G4166 (ποιμήν); a head shepherd.

G751.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and G2462 (ἵππος); horse-ruler; Archippus, a Christian.

G752.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and G4864 (συναγωγή); director of the synagogue services.

G753.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and G5045 (τέκτων); a chief constructor, i.e. "architect".

G754.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and G5057 (τελώνης); a principle tax-gatherer.

G755.def: from G746 (ἀρχή) and a compound of G5140 (τρεῖς) and G2827 (κλίνω) (a dinner-bed, because composed of three couches); director of the entertainment.

G756.def: middle voice of G757 (ἄρχω) (through the implication, of precedence); to commence (in order of time)

G757.def: a primary verb; to be first (in political rank or power)

G758.def: present participle of G757 (ἄρχω); a first (in rank or power)

G759.def: from G142 (αἴρω) (in the sense of sending off scent); an aromatic.

G760.def: of Hebrew origin (H0609); Asa, an Israelite.

G761.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4531 (σαλεύω); unshaken, i.e. (by implication) immovable (figuratively)

G762.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4570 (σβέννυμι); not extinguished, i.e. (by implication) perpetual.

G763.def: from G765 (ἀσεβής); impiety, i.e. (by implication) wickedness.

G764.def: from G765 (ἀσεβής); to be (by implied act) impious or wicked.
G764.kjv: commit (live, that after should live) ungodly

G765.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4576 (σέβομαι); irreverent, i.e. (by extension) impious or wicked.

G766.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed (of uncertain derivation, but apparently meaning continent); licentiousness (sometimes including other vices)

G767.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G4591 (σημαίνω); unmarked, i.e. (figuratively) ignoble.

G768.def: of Hebrew origin (H0836); Aser (i.e. Asher), an Israelite tribe.

G769.def: from G772 (ἀσθενής); feebleness (of mind or body); by implication, malady; morally, frailty.

G770.def: from G772 (ἀσθενής); to be feeble (in any sense)
G770.kjv: be diseased, impotent folk (man), (be) sick, (be, be made) weak

G771.def: from G770 (ἀσθενέω); a scruple of conscience.

G772.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G4599 (σθενόω); strengthless (in various applications, literal, figurative and moral)
G772.kjv: more feeble, impotent, sick, without strength, weak(-er, -ness, thing)

G773.def: of uncertain derivation; Asia, i.e. Asia Minor, or (usually) only its western shore.

G774.def: from G773 (Ἀσία); an Asian (i.e. Asiatic) or an inhabitant of Asia.

G775.def: from G773 (Ἀσία) and G746 (ἀρχή); an Asiarch or president of the public festivities in a city of Asia Minor.

G777.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G4621 (σῖτος); without (taking) food.

G778.def: probably from the same as G4632 (σκεῦος); to elaborate, i.e. (figuratively) train (by implication, strive)

G779.def: from the same as G778 (ἀσκέω); a leathern (or skin) bag used as a bottle.

G780.def: adverb from a derivative of the base of G2237 (ἡδονή); with pleasure.

G781.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G4680 (σοφός); unwise.

G782.def: from G1 (Α) (as a particle of union) and a presumed form of G4685 (σπάω); to enfold in the arms, i.e. (by implication) to salute, (figuratively) to welcome.

G783.def: from G782 (ἀσπάζομαι); a greeting (in person or by letter)

G784.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G4695 (σπιλόω); unblemished (physically or morally)

G785.def: of uncertain derivation; a buckler (or round shield); used of a serpent (as coiling itself), probably the "asp".

G786.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4689 (σπένδω); literally, without libation (which usually accompanied a treaty), i.e. (by implication) truceless.

G787.def: of Latin origin; an assarius or as, a Roman coin.

G788.def: neuter comparative of the base of G1451 (ἐγγύς); more nearly, i.e. very near.

G789.def: probably of foreign origin; Assus, a city of Asia MInor.

G790.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2476 (ἵστημι); to be non-stationary, i.e. (figuratively) homeless.

G791.def: from (a city); urbane, i.e. (by implication) handsome.

G792.def: probably from the base of G4766 (στρώννυμι); a star (as strown over the sky), literally or figuratively.

G793.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4741 (στηρίζω); unfixed, i.e. (figuratively) vacillating.

G794.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of (to cherish affectionately); hard-hearted towards kindred.

G795.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and (an aim); to miss the mark, i.e. (figuratively) deviate from truth.

G796.def: from G797 (ἀστράπτω); lightning; by analogy, glare.

G797.def: probably from G792 (ἀστήρ); to flash as lightning.

G798.def: neuter from G792 (ἀστήρ); properly, a constellation; put for a single star (natural or artificial)

G799.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4793 (συγκρίνω); incomparable; Asyncritus, a Christian.

G800.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G4859 (σύμφωνος); inharmonious (figuratively)

G801.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G4908 (συνετός); unintelligent; by implication, wicked.

G802.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G4934 (συντίθεμαι); properly, not agreed, i.e. treacherous to compacts.

G804.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and sphallo (to "fail"); secure (literally or figuratively)

G806.def: adverb from G804 (ἀσφαλής); securely (literally or figuratively)

G807.def: from G809 (ἀσχήμων); to be (i.e. act) unbecoming.

G808.def: from G809 (ἀσχήμων); an indecency; by implication, the pudenda.

G809.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2192 (ἔχω) (in the sense of its congener G4976 (σχῆμα)); properly, shapeless, i.e. (figuratively) inelegant.

G810.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G4982 (σώζω); properly, unsavedness, i.e. (by implication) profligacy.

G811.def: adverb from the same as G810 (ἀσωτία); dissolutely.

G812.def: from G813 (ἄτακτος); to be (i.e. act) irregular.

G813.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5021 (τάσσω); unarranged, i.e. (by implication) insubordinate (religiously)

G815.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5043 (τέκνον); childless.

G816.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a particle of union) and (to stretch); to gaze intently.
G816.kjv: behold earnestly (stedfastly), fasten (eyes), look (earnestly, stedfastly, up stedfastly), set eyes

G817.def: a particle probably akin to G427 (ἄνευ); aloof, i.e. apart from (literally or figuratively)

G818.def: from G820 (ἄτιμος); to render infamous, i.e. (by implication) contemn or maltreat.
G818.kjv: despise, dishonour, suffer shame, entreat shamefully

G819.def: from G820 (ἄτιμος); infamy, i.e. (subjectively) comparative indignity, (objectively) disgrace.

G820.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5092 (τιμή); (negatively) unhonoured or (positively) dishonoured.
G820.kjv: despised, without honour, less honourable (comparative degree)

G821.def: from G820 (ἄτιμος); used like G818 (ἀτιμάζω), to maltreat.

G822.def: from the same as G109 (ἀήρ); mist.

G823.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and the base of G5114 (τομώτερος); uncut, i.e. (by implication) indivisible (an "atom" of time)

G824.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5117 (τόπος); out of place, i.e. (figuratively) improper, injurious, wicked.

G825.def: from (a king of Pergamus); Attaleia, a place in Pamphylia.

G827.def: of uncertain derivation; a ray of light, i.e. (by implication) radiance, dawn.

G828.def: from Latin ("august"); Augustus, a title of the Roman emperor.

G829.def: from G846 (αὐτός) and the base of G2237 (ἡδονή); self-pleasing, i.e. arrogant.

G830.def: from G846 (αὐτός) and the same as G140 (αἱρετίζω); self-chosen, i.e. (by implication) voluntary.
G830.kjv: of own accord, willing of self

G831.def: from a compound of G846 (αὐτός) and an obsolete (a worker); to act of oneself, i.e. (figuratively) dominate.

G832.def: from G836 (αὐλός); to play the flute.

G833.def: from the same as G109 (ἀήρ); a yard (as open to the wind); by implication, a mansion.

G835.def: middle voice from G833 (αὐλή); to pass the night (properly, in the open air)

G836.def: from the same as G109 (ἀήρ); a flute (as blown)

G837.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb; to grow ("wax"), i.e. enlarge (literal or figurative, active or passive)

G839.def: from a derivative of the same as G109 (ἀήρ) (meaning a breeze, i.e. the morning air); properly, fresh, i.e. (adverb with ellipsis of G2250 (ἡμέρα)) to-morrow.

G840.def: from a (presumed) derivative of the same as G109 (ἀήρ) (meaning blown); rough (properly as a gale), i.e. (figuratively) severe.

G841.def: from G842 (αὐτάρκης); self-satisfaction, i.e. (abstractly) contentedness, or (concretely) a competence.

G842.def: from G846 (αὐτός) and G714 (ἀρκέω); self-complacent, i.e. contented.

G843.def: from G846 (αὐτός) and a derivative or G2632 (κατακρίνω); self-condemned.

G844.def: from G846 (αὐτός) and the same as G3155 (μάτην); self-moved ("automatic"), i.e. spontaneous.

G845.def: from G846 (αὐτός) and G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); self-seeing, i.e. an eye-witness.

G846.def: from the particle (perhaps akin to the base of G109 (ἀήρ) through the idea of a baffling wind) (backward); the reflexive pronoun self, used (alone or in the comparative G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ)) of the third person , and (with the proper personal pronoun) of the other persons.
G846.kjv: her, it(-self), one, the other, (mine) own, said, (self-), the) same, ((him-, my-, thy- )self, (your-)selves, she, that, their(-s), them(-selves), there(-at, - by, -in, -into, -of, -on, -with), they, (these) things, this (man), those, together, very, which

G847.def: genitive (i.e. possessive) of G846 (αὐτός), used as an adverb of location; properly, belonging to the same spot, i.e. in this (or that) place.

G848.def: contracted for G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ); self (in some oblique case or reflexively, relation)
G848.kjv: her (own), (of) him(-self), his (own), of it, thee, their (own), them(-selves), they

G849.def: from G846 (αὐτός) and G5495 (χείρ); self-handed, i.e. doing personally.

G850.def: from (probably from a base akin to that of G109 (ἀήρ)) (dust, as dried by wind); properly, dirty, i.e. (by implication) obscure.

G851.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G138 (αἱρέομαι); to remove (literally or figuratively)

G852.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5316 (φαίνω); non-apparent)

G853.def: from G852 (ἀφανής); to render unapparent, i.e. (actively) consume (becloud), or (passively) disappear (be destroyed)

G855.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5316 (φαίνω); non-manifested, i.e. invisible.

G856.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος); a place of sitting apart, i.e. a privy.

G857.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5339 (φείδομαι); unsparingness, i.e. austerity (asceticism)

G858.def: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and (in the sense of a stone as stubbing the foot); smoothness, i.e. (figuratively) simplicity.

G860.def: from G680 (ἅπτομαι); probably a ligament (as fastening)

G861.def: from G862 (ἄφθαρτος); incorruptibility; genitive, unending existence; (figuratively) genuineness.

G862.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5351 (φθείρω); undecaying (in essence or continuance)

G863.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and (to send; an intensive form of , to go); to send forth, in various applications (as follow)
G863.kjv: cry, forgive, forsake, lay aside, leave, let (alone, be, go, have), omit, put (send) away, remit, suffer, yield up

G864.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and the base of G2425 (ἱκανός); to go (i.e. spread) forth (by rumor)

G865.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5358 (φιλάγαθος); hostile to virtue.
G865.kjv: despiser of those that are good

G866.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5366 (φιλάργυρος); unavaricious.
G866.kjv: without covetousness, not greedy of filthy lucre

G867.def: from G864 (ἀφικνέομαι); properly, arrival, i.e. (by implication) departure.

G868.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to remove, i.e. (actively) instigate to revolt; usually (reflexively) to desist, desert, etc.
G868.kjv: depart, draw (fall) away, refrain, withdraw self

G869.def: adverb from G852 (ἀφανής) (contraction); unawares, i.e. unexpectedly.

G870.def: adverb from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5401 (φόβος); fearlessly.

G871.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G3666 (ὁμοιόω); to assimilate closely.

G872.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G3708 (ὁράω); to consider attentively.

G873.def: from G575 (ἀπό) and G3724 (ὁρίζω); to set off by boundary, i.e. (figuratively) limit, exclude, appoint, etc.

G874.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G3729 (ὁρμάω); a starting-point, i.e. (figuratively) an opportunity.

G875.def: from G876 (ἀφρός); to froth at the mouth (in epilepsy)

G876.def: apparently a primary word; froth, i.e. slaver.

G877.def: from G878 (ἄφρων); senselessness, i.e. (euphemistically) egotism; (morally) recklessness.

G878.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5424 (φρήν); properly, mindless, i.e. stupid, (by implication) ignorant, (specially) egotistic, (practically) rash, or (morally) unbelieving.

G879.def: from a compound of G575 (ἀπό) and G5258 (ὕπνος); properly, to become awake, i.e. (by implication) to drop (off) in slumber.

G880.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5456 (φωνή); voiceless, i.e. mute (by nature or choice); figuratively, unmeaning.

G881.def: of Hebrew origin (H0271); Achaz, an Israelite.

G882.def: of uncertain derivation; Achaia (i.e. Greece), a country of Europe.

G883.def: from G882 (Ἀχαΐα); an Achaian; Achaicus, a Christian.

G884.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G5483 (χαρίζομαι); thankless, i.e. ungrateful.

G885.def: probably of Hebrew origin (compare H03137); Achim, an Israelite.

G886.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5499 (χειροποίητος); unmanufactured, i.e. inartificial.

G887.def: of uncertain derivation; dimness of sight, i.e. (probably) a cataract.

G888.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5534 (χρή) (compare G5532 (χρεία)); useless, i.e. (euphemistically) unmeritorious.

G889.def: from G888 (ἀχρεῖος); to render useless, i.e. spoil.

G890.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5543 (χρηστός); inefficient, i.e. (by implication) detrimental.

G891.def: akin to G206 (ἄκρον) (through the idea of a terminus); (of time) until or (of place) up to.
G891.kjv: as far as, for, in(-to), till, (even, un-)to, until, while

G892.def: perhaps remotely from (to shed forth); chaff (as diffusive)

G893.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5579 (ψεῦδος); veracious.

G894.def: of uncertain derivation; wormwood (as a type of bitterness, i.e. (figuratively) calamity)

G895.def: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5590 (ψυχή); lifeless, i.e. inanimate (mechanical)

G896.def: of Hebrew origin (H01168); Baal, a Phœnician deity (used as a symbol of idolatry)

G897.def: of Hebrew origin (H0894); Babylon, the capitol of Chaldæa (literally or figuratively (as a type of tyranny))

G898.def: from the same as G899 (βάθος); a step, i.e. (figuratively) grade (of dignity)

G899.def: from the same as G901 (βαθύς); profundity, i.e. (by implication) extent; (figuratively) mystery.

G901.def: from the base of G939 (βάσις); profound (as going down), literally or figuratively.

G902.def: a diminutive of a derivative probably of the base of G939 (βάσις); a palm twig (as going out far)

G903.def: of Hebrew origin (H01109); Balaam, a Mesopotamian (symbolic of a false teacher)

G904.def: of Hebrew origin (H01111); Balak, a Moabite.

G905.def: probably remotely from G906 (βάλλω) (as a depository); a pouch (for money)

G906.def: a primary verb; to throw (in various applications, more or less violent or intense)
G906.kjv: arise, cast (out), X dung, lay, lie, pour, put (up), send, strike, throw (down), thrust

G907.def: from a derivative of G911 (βάπτω); to immerse, submerge; to make whelmed (i.e. fully wet); used only (in the New Testament) of ceremonial ablution, especially (technically) of the ordinance of Christian baptism.

G910.def: from G907 (βαπτίζω); a baptizer, as an epithet of Christ's forerunner.

G911.def: a primary verb; to whelm, i.e. cover wholly with a fluid; in the New Testament only in a qualified or special sense, i.e. (literally) to moisten (a part of one's person), or (by implication) to stain (as with dye)

G912.def: of Chaldee origin (H01347 and H05); son of Abba; Bar-abbas, an Israelite.

G913.def: of Hebrew origin (H01301); Barak, an Israelite.

G914.def: of Hebrew origin (H01296); Barachias (i.e. Berechijah), an Israelite.

G915.def: of uncertain derivation; a foreigner (i.e. non-Greek)

G918.def: of Chaldee origin (H01247 and H08526); son of Tolmai; Bar-tholomæus, a Christian apostle.

G919.def: of Chaldee origin (H01247 and H03091); son of Jesus (or Joshua); Bar-jesus, an Israelite.

G920.def: of Chaldee origin (H01247 and H03124); son of Jonas (or Jonah); Bar-jonas, an Israelite.

G921.def: of Chaldee origin (H01247 and H05029); son of Nabas (i.e. prophecy); Barnabas, an Israelite.

G922.def: probably from the same as G939 (βάσις) (through the notion of going down; compare G899 (βάθος)); weight; in the New Testament only, figuratively, a load, abundance, authority.

G923.def: of Chaldee origin (H01247 and probably H06634); son of Sabas (or Tsaba); Bar-sabas, the name of two Israelites.

G924.def: of Chaldee origin (H01247 and H02931); son of Timæus (or the unclean); Bar-timæus, an Israelite.

G926.def: from the same as G922 (βάρος); weighty, i.e. (fig) burdensome, grave.

G927.def: from G926 (βαρύς) and G5092 (τιμή); highly valuable.

G931.def: perhaps remotely from the same as G939 (βάσις) (through the notion of going to the bottom); a touch-stone, i.e. (by analogy) torture.

G932.def: from G935; properly, royalty, i.e., (abstractly) rule, or (concretely) a realm.

G936.def: from G935 (βασιλεύς); to rule (literally or figuratively)

G937.def: from G935 (βασιλεύς); regal (in relation), i.e. (literally) belonging to (or befitting) the sovereign (as land, dress, or a courtier), or (figuratively) preeminent.

G939.def: from (to walk); a pace ("base"), i.e. (by implication) the foot.

G940.def: akin to G5335 (φάσκω); to malign, i.e. (by extension) to fascinate (by false representations)

G941.def: perhaps remotely derived from the base of G939 (βάσις) (through the idea of removal); to lift, literally or figuratively (endure, declare, sustain, receive, etc.)

G942.def: of uncertain derivation; a brier shrub.

G943.def: of Hebrew origin (H01324); a bath, or measure for liquids.

G945.def: from (a proverbial stammerer) and G3056 (λόγος); to stutter, i.e. (by implication) to prate tediously.

G946.def: from G948 (βδελύσσω); a detestation, i.e. (specially) idolatry.

G948.def: from a (presumed) derivative of (to stink); to be disgusted, i.e. (by implication) detest (especially of idolatry)

G949.def: from the base of G939 (βάσις) (through the idea of basality); stable (literally or figuratively)

G952.def: from the base of G939 (βάσις) and (a threshold); accessible (as by crossing the door-way), i.e. (by implication, of Jewish notions) heathenish, wicked.

G954.def: of Chaldee origin (by parody on H01176); dung-god; Beelzebul, a name of Satan.

G955.def: of Hebrew origin (H01100); worthlessness; Belial, as an epithet of Satan.

G956.def: from G906 (βάλλω); a missile, i.e. spear or arrow.

G957.def: neuter of a compound of a derivative of G906 (βάλλω) (used for the comparative of G18 (ἀγαθός)); better.

G958.def: of Hebrew origin (H01144); Benjamin, an Israelite.

G959.def: from a provincial form of G5342 (φέρω) and G3529 (νίκη); victorious; Bernice, a member of the Herodian family.

G960.def: perhaps a provincial from a derivative of G4008 (πέραν) (Perœa, i.e. the region beyond the coast-line); Berœa, a place in Macedonia.

G961.def: from G960 (Βέροια); a Berœoean or native of Berœa.

G962.def: of Hebrew origin (H01004 and H05679); ferry-house; Bethabara (i.e. Bethabarah), a place on the Jordan.

G963.def: of Chaldee origin; date-house; Beth-any, a place in Palestine.

G964.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H01004 and H02617); house of kindness; Beth-esda, a pool in Jerusalem.

G965.def: of Hebrew origin (H01036); Bethleem (i.e. Beth-lechem), a place in Palestine.

G966.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H01004 and H06719); fishing-house; Bethsaida, a place in Palestine.

G967.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H01004 and H06291); fig-house; Beth-phage, a place in Palestine.

G968.def: from the base of G939 (βάσις); a step, i.e. foot-breath; by implication, a rostrum, i.e. a tribunal.

G970.def: probably akin to G979 (βίος) (through the idea of vital activity); force.

G971.def: from G979 (βίος); to force, i.e. (reflexively) to crowd oneself (into), or (passively) to be seized.

G973.def: from G971 (βιάζω); a forcer, i.e. (figuratively) energetic.

G974.def: a diminutive of G975 (βιβλίον); a booklet.

G975.def: a diminutive of G976 (βίβλος); a roll.

G976.def: properly, the inner bark of the papyrus plant, i.e. (by implication) a sheet or scroll of writing.

G977.def: a reduplicated and prolonged form of an obsolete primary verb (perhaps causative of G1006 (βόσκω)); to eat.

G978.def: of uncertain derivation; Bithynia, a region of Asia.

G979.def: a primary word; life, i.e. (literally) the present state of existence; by implication, the means of livelihood.

G981.def: from G980 (βιόω); living (properly, the act, by implication, the mode)

G982.def: from a derivative of G980 (βιόω); relating to the present existence.
G982.kjv: of (pertaining to, things that pertain to) this life

G984.def: a primary verb; properly, to hinder, i.e. (by implication) to injure.

G985.def: from (a sprout); to germinate; by implication, to yield fruit.

G986.def: perhaps the same as the base of G985 (βλαστάνω); Blastus, an officer of Herod Agrippa.

G987.def: from G989 (βλάσφημος); to vilify; specially, to speak impiously.

G990.def: from G991 (βλέπω); vision (properly concrete; by implication, abstract)

G991.def: a primary verb; to look at (literally or figuratively)
G991.kjv: behold, beware, lie, look (on, to), perceive, regard, see, sight, take heed

G992.def: from G906 (βάλλω); fit to be cast (i.e. applied)

G993.def: of Chaldee origin (H01123 and H07266); sons of commotion; Boanerges, an epithet of two of the apostles.

G994.def: apparently a prolonged form of a primary verb; to halloo, i.e. shout (for help or in a tumultuous way)

G995.def: from G994 (βοάω); a halloo, i.e. call (for aid, etc.)

G996.def: from G998 (βοηθός); aid; specially, a rope or chain for frapping a vessel.

G997.def: from G998 (βοηθός); to aid or relieve.

G998.def: from G995 (βοή) and theo (to run); a succorer.

G999.def: akin to G900 (βαθύνω); a hole (in the ground); specially, a cistern.

G1000.def: from G906 (βάλλω); a throw (as a measure of distance)

G1001.def: from G1002 (βολίς); to heave the lead.

G1002.def: from G906 (βάλλω); a missile, i.e. javelin.

G1003.def: of Hebrew origin (H01162); Booz, (i.e. Boaz), an Israelite.

G1005.def: of uncertain derivation; the north (properly, wind)

G1006.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb (compare G977 (βιβρώσκω), G1016 (βοῦς)); to pasture; by extension to, fodder; reflexively, to graze.

G1007.def: of Hebrew origin (H01160); Bosor (i.e. Beor), a Moabite.

G1008.def: from G1006 (βόσκω); herbage (as if for grazing)

G1009.def: of uncertain derivation; a bunch (of grapes)

G1010.def: from G1011 (βουλεύω); an adviser, i.e. (specially) a councillor or member of the Jewish Sanhedrin.

G1011.def: from G1012 (βουλή); to advise, i.e. (reflexively) deliberate, or (by implication) resolve.
G1011.kjv: consult, take counsel, determine, be minded, purpose

G1012.def: from G1014 (βούλομαι); volition, i.e. (objectively) advice, or (by implication) purpose.

G1014.def: middle voice of a primary verb; to "will," i.e. (reflexively) be willing.
G1014.kjv: be disposed, minded, intend, list, (be, of own) will (-ing)

G1015.def: probably of foreign origin; a hillock.

G1016.def: probably from the base of G1006 (βόσκω); an ox (as grazing), i.e. an animal of that species ("beef")

G1017.def: from (an umpire of uncertain derivation); an award (of arbitration), i.e. (specially) a prize in the public games.

G1018.def: from the same as G1017 (βραβεῖον); to arbitrate, i.e. (genitive case) to govern (figuratively, prevail)

G1020.def: from G1021 (βραδύς) and a prolonged form of G4126 (πλέω); to sail slowly.

G1021.def: of uncertain affinity; slow; figuratively, dull.

G1023.def: properly, comparative of G1024 (βραχύς), but apparently in the sense of (to wield); the arm, i.e. (figuratively) strength.

G1024.def: of uncertain affinity; short (of time, place, quantity, or number)

G1025.def: of uncertain affinity; an infant (properly, unborn) literally or figuratively.

G1026.def: a primary verb; to moisten (especially by a shower)

G1030.def: from G1031 (βρύχω); a grating (of the teeth)

G1031.def: a primary verb; to grate the teeth (in pain or rage)

G1032.def: a primary verb; to swell out, i.e. (by implication) to gush.

G1033.def: from the base of G977 (βιβρώσκω); food (literally or figuratively), especially (ceremonially) articles allowed or forbidden by the Jewish law.

G1035.def: from the base of G977 (βιβρώσκω); (abstractly) eating (literally or figuratively); by extension (concretely) food (literally or figuratively)

G1036.def: from G1037 (βυθός); to sink; by implication, to drown.

G1037.def: a variation of G899 (βάθος); depth, i.e. (by implication) the sea.

G1039.def: from G1040 (βύσσος); made of linen (neuter a linen cloth)

G1041.def: from the base of G939 (βάσις); properly, a stand, i.e. (specially) an altar.

G1042.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H01355); the knoll; gabbatha, a vernacular term for the Roman tribunal in Jerusalem.

G1043.def: of Hebrew origin (H01403); Gabriel, an archangel.

G1045.def: of Hebrew origin (H01410); Gad, a tribe of Israelites.

G1046.def: from (a town east of the Jordan); a Gadarene or inhabitant of Gadara.

G1048.def: of Hebrew origin (H05804); Gazah (i.e. Azzah), a place in Palestine.

G1049.def: from G1047 (γάζα) and G5438 (φυλακή); a treasure-house, i.e. a court in the temple for the collection-boxes.

G1050.def: of Latin origin; Gaius (i.e. Caius), a Christian.

G1052.def: from G1053 (Γαλατία); a Galatian or inhabitant of Galatia.

G1053.def: of foreign origin; Galatia, a region of Asia.

G1054.def: from G1053 (Γαλατία); Galatic or relating to Galatia.

G1056.def: of Hebrew origin (H01551); Galilæa (i.e. the heathen circle), a region of Palestine.

G1057.def: from G1056 (Γαλιλαία); Galilean or belonging to Galilea.

G1058.def: of Latin origin; Gallion (i.e. Gallio), a Roman officer.

G1059.def: of Hebrew origin (H01583); Gamaliel (i.e. Gamliel), an Israelite.

G1060.def: from G1062 (γάμος); to wed (of either sex)

G1061.def: from G1062 (γάμος); to espouse (a daughter to a husband)

G1063.def: a primary particle; properly, assigning a reason (used in argument, explanation or intensification; often with other particles)
G1063.kjv: and, as, because (that), but, even, for, indeed, no doubt, seeing, then, therefore, verily, what, why, yet

G1064.def: of uncertain derivation; the stomach; by analogy, the matrix; figuratively, a gourmand.

G1065.def: a primary particle of emphasis or qualification (often used with other particles prefixed)
G1065.kjv: and besides, doubtless, at least, yet

G1066.def: of Hebrew origin (H01439); Gedeon (i.e. Gid(e)on), an Israelite.

G1067.def: of Hebrew origin (H01516 and H02011); valley of (the son of) Hinnom; ge-henna (or Ge-Hinnom), a valley of Jerusalem, used (figuratively) as a name for the place (or state) of everlasting punishment.

G1068.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H01660 and H08081); oil-press; Gethsemane, a garden near Jerusalem.

G1069.def: from G1093 (γῆ); a neighbour (as adjoining one's ground); by implication, a friend.

G1070.def: of uncertain affinity; to laugh (as a sign of joy or satisfaction)

G1071.def: from G1070 (γελάω); laughter (as a mark of gratification)

G1072.def: transitive from G1073 (γέμω); to fill entirely.

G1073.def: a primary verb; to swell out, i.e. be full.

G1074.def: from (a presumed derivative of) G1085 (γένος); a generation; by implication, an age (the period or the persons)

G1075.def: from G1074 (γενεά) and G3056 (λόγος); to reckon by generations, i.e. trace in genealogy.

G1076.def: from the same as G1075 (γενεαλογέω); tracing by generations, i.e. "genealogy".

G1077.def: neuter plural of a derivative of G1078 (γένεσις); birthday ceremonies.

G1078.def: from the same as G1074 (γενεά); nativity; figuratively, nature.

G1079.def: feminine of a presumed derivative of the base of G1074 (γενεά); birth.

G1080.def: from a variation of G1085 (γένος); to procreate (properly, of the father, but by extension of the mother); figuratively, to regenerate.
G1080.kjv: bear, beget, be born, bring forth, conceive, be delivered of, gender, make, spring

G1081.def: from G1080 (γεννάω); offspring; by analogy, produce (literally or figuratively)

G1082.def: of Hebrew origin (compare H03672); Gennesaret (i.e. Kinnereth), a lake and plain in Palestine.

G1085.def: from G1096 (γίνομαι); "kin" (abstract or concrete, literal or figurative, individual or collective)
G1085.kjv: born, country(-man), diversity, generation, kind(-red), nation, offspring, stock

G1086.def: of Hebrew origin (H01622); a Gergesene (i.e. Girgashite) or one of the aborigines of Palestine.

G1087.def: from G1088 (γέρων); the eldership, i.e. (collectively) the Jewish Sanhedrin.

G1089.def: a primary verb; to taste; by implication, to eat; figuratively, to experience (good or ill)

G1091.def: neuter of a (presumed) derivative of G1092 (γεωργός); cultivable, i.e. a farm.

G1092.def: from G1093 (γῆ) and the base of G2041 (ἔργον); a land-worker, i.e. farmer.

G1093.def: contracted from a primary word; soil; by extension a region, or the solid part or the whole of the terrene globe.

G1096.def: a prolongation and middle voice form of a primary verb; to cause to be (generate), i.e., (reflexively) to become (come into being).

G1097.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb; to know (absolutely) in a great variety of applications and with many implications.
