G1098.def: akin to G1099 (γλυκύς); sweet wine, i.e. (properly) must (fresh juice), but used of the more saccharine (and therefore highly inebriating) fermented wine.

G1099.def: of uncertain affinity; sweet (i.e. not bitter nor salt)

G1100.def: of uncertain affinity; the tongue; by implication, a language (specially, one naturally unacquired)

G1101.def: from G1100 (γλῶσσα) and the base of G2889 (κόσμος); properly, a case (to keep mouthpieces of wind-instruments in) i.e. (by extension) a casket or (specially) purse.

G1102.def: by variation for a derivative from (to tease cloth); a cloth-dresser.

G1103.def: from the same as G1077 (γενέσια); legitimate (of birth), i.e. genuine.

G1104.def: adverb from G1103 (γνήσιος); genuinely, i.e. really.

G1105.def: akin to G3509 (νέφος); gloom (as of a storm)

G1106.def: from G1097 (γινώσκω); cognition, i.e. (subjectively) opinion, or (objectively) resolve (counsel, consent, etc.)
G1106.kjv: advice, + agree, judgment, mind, purpose, will

G1107.def: from a derivative of G1097 (γινώσκω); to make known; subjectively, to know.
G1107.kjv: certify, declare, make known, give to understand, do to wit, wot

G1108.def: from G1097 (γινώσκω); knowing (the act), i.e. (by implication) knowledge.

G1114.def: from (to wail); properly, a wizard (as muttering spells), i.e. (by implication) an imposter.

G1115.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H01538); the skull; Golgotha, a knoll near Jerusalem.

G1116.def: of Hebrew origin (H06017); Gomorrha (i.e. Amorah), a place near the Dead Sea.

G1117.def: from G1073 (γέμω); a load (as filling), i.e. (specially) a cargo, or (by extension) wares.

G1118.def: from the base of G1096 (γίνομαι); a parent.

G1120.def: from a compound of G1119 (γόνυ) and the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω); to fall on the knee.

G1121.def: from G1125 (γράφω); a writing, i.e. a letter, note, epistle, book, etc.; plural learning.
G1121.kjv: bill, learning, letter, scripture, writing, written

G1122.def: from G1121 (γράμμα). a writer, i.e. (professionally) scribe or secretary.

G1124.def: from G1125 (γράφω); a document, i.e. holy Writ (or its contents or a statement in it)

G1125.def: a primary verb; to "grave", especially to write; figuratively, to describe.

G1126.def: from (an old woman) and G1491 (εἶδος); crone-like, i.e. silly.

G1127.def: from G1453 (ἐγείρω); to keep awake, i.e. watch (literally or figuratively)

G1128.def: from G1131 (γυμνός); to practise naked (in the games), i.e. train (figuratively)

G1130.def: from a derivative of G1131 (γυμνός); to strip, i.e. (reflexively) go poorly clad.

G1131.def: of uncertain affinity; nude (absolute or relative, literal or figurative)

G1133.def: a diminutive from G1135 (γυνή); a little (i.e. foolish) woman.

G1135.def: probably from the base of G1096 (γίνομαι); a woman; specially, a wife.

G1136.def: of Hebrew origin (H01463); Gog, a symbolic name for some future Antichrist.

G1137.def: probably akin to G1119 (γόνυ); an angle.

G1138.def: of Hebrew origin (H01732); Dabid (i.e. David), the Israelite king.

G1139.def: middle voice from G1142 (δαίμων); to be exercised by a dæmon.
G1139.kjv: have a (be vexed with, be possessed with) devil(-s)

G1140.def: neuter of a derivative of G1142 (δαίμων); a dæmonic being; by extension a deity.

G1142.def: from (to distribute fortunes); a dæmon or supernatural spirit (of a bad nature)

G1143.def: a prolonged form of a primary root; to bite, i.e. (figuratively) thwart.

G1148.def: probably of Chaldee origin; Dalmanutha, a place in Palestine.

G1149.def: probably of foreign derivation; Dalmatia, a region of Europe.

G1150.def: a variation of an obsolete primary of the same meaning; to tame.

G1151.def: probably from the base of G1150 (δαμάζω); a heifer (as tame)

G1152.def: probably from the base of G1150 (δαμάζω); perhaps gentle; Damaris, an Athenian woman.

G1153.def: from G1154 (Δαμασκός); a Damascene or inhabitant of Damascus.

G1154.def: of Hebrew origin (H01834); Damascus, a city of Syria.

G1155.def: from G1156 (δάνειον); to loan on interest; reflexively, to borrow.

G1156.def: from (a gift); probably akin to the base of G1325 (δίδωμι); a loan.

G1158.def: of Hebrew origin (H01840); Daniel, an Israelite.

G1159.def: from G1160 (δαπάνη); to expend, i.e. (in a good sense) to incur cost, or (in a bad one) to waste.

G1161.def: a primary particle (adversative or continuative); but, and, etc.
G1161.kjv: also, and, but, moreover, now (often unexpressed in English)

G1163.def: 3rd person singular active present of G1210 (δέω); also deon deh-on'; neuter active participle of the same; both used impersonally; it is (was, etc.) necessary (as binding)
G1163.kjv: behoved, be meet, must (needs), (be) need(-ful), ought, should

G1164.def: from the base of G1166 (δεικνύω); a specimen (as shown)

G1166.def: a prolonged form of an obsolete primary of the same meaning; to show (literally or figuratively)

G1170.def: probably from the same as G1171 (δεινῶς) (through the idea of forgetting the name as fearful, i.e. strange); so and so (when the person is not specified)

G1171.def: adverb from a derivative of the same as G1169 (δειλός); terribly, i.e. excessively.

G1172.def: from G1173 (δεῖπνον); to dine, i.e. take the principle (or evening) meal.

G1173.def: from the same as G1160 (δαπάνη); dinner, i.e. the chief meal (usually in the evening)

G1174.def: the compound of a derivative of the base of G1169 (δειλός) and G1142 (δαίμων); more religious than others.

G1175.def: from the same as G1174 (δεισιδαιμονέστερος); religion.

G1177.def: from G1176 (δέκα) and G1417 (δύο); two and ten, i.e. twelve.

G1178.def: from G1176 (δέκα) and G4002 (πέντε); ten and five, i.e. fifteen.

G1179.def: from G1176 (δέκα) and G4172 (πόλις); the ten-city region; the Decapolis, a district in Syria.

G1180.def: from G1176 (δέκα) and G5064 (τέσσαρες); ten and four, i.e. fourteen.

G1181.def: feminine of G1182 (δέκατος); a tenth, i.e. as a percentage or (technically) tithe.

G1183.def: from G1181 (δεκάτη); to tithe, i.e. to give or take a tenth.

G1185.def: from the base of G1388 (δόλος); to entrap, i.e. (figuratively) delude.

G1187.def: from G1188 (δεξιός) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); a guardsman (as if taking the right) or light-armed soldier.

G1188.def: from G1209 (δέχομαι); the right side or (feminine) hand (as that which usually takes)

G1189.def: middle voice of G1210 (δέω); to beg (as binding oneself), i.e. petition.

G1190.def: from G1191 (Δέρβη); a Derbæan or inhabitant of Derbe.

G1191.def: of foreign origin; Derbe, a place in Asia Minor.

G1194.def: a primary verb; properly, to flay, i.e. (by implication) to scourge, or (by analogy) to thrash.

G1195.def: from a (presumed) derivative of G1196 (δεσμέω); to be a binder (captor), i.e. to enchain (a prisoner), to tie on (a load)

G1196.def: from G1199 (δεσμόν); to tie, i.e. shackle.

G1199.def: neuter and masculine respectively from G1210 (δέω); a band, i.e. ligament (of the body) or shackle (of a prisoner); figuratively, an impediment or disability.

G1200.def: from G1199 (δεσμόν) and G5441 (φύλαξ); a jailer (as guarding the prisoners)

G1201.def: from a derivative of G1199 (δεσμόν) (equivalent to G1196 (δεσμέω)); a place of bondage, i.e. a dungeon.

G1202.def: from the same as G1201 (δεσμωτήριον); (passively) a captive.

G1203.def: perhaps from G1210 (δέω) and (a husband); an absolute ruler ("despot")

G1204.def: of uncertain affinity; here; used also imperative hither!; and of time, hitherto.

G1205.def: from G1204 (δεῦρο) and an imperative form of (to go); come hither!.

G1206.def: from G1208 (δεύτερος); secondary, i.e. (specially) on the second day.

G1207.def: from G1208 (δεύτερος) and G4413 (πρῶτος); second-first, i.e. (specially) a designation of the Sabbath immediately after the Paschal week (being the second after Passover day, and the first of the seven Sabbaths intervening before Pentecost)

G1208.def: as the comparative of G1417 (δύο); (ordinal) second (in time, place, or rank; also adverb)

G1209.def: middle voice of a primary verb; to receive (in various applications, literally or figuratively)

G1210.def: a primary verb; to bind (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
G1210.kjv: bind, be in bonds, knit, tie, wind

G1211.def: probably akin to G1161 (δέ); a particle of emphasis or explicitness; now, then, etc.

G1213.def: from G1212 (δῆλος); to make plain (by words)

G1214.def: probably for G1216 (Δημήτριος); Demas, a Christian.

G1215.def: from a compound of G1218 (δῆμος) and G58 (ἀγορά); to be a people-gatherer, i.e. to address a public assembly.

G1216.def: from (Ceres); Demetrius, the name of an Ephesian and of a Christian.

G1217.def: from G1218 (δῆμος) and G2041 (ἔργον); a worker for the people, i.e. mechanic (spoken of the Creator)

G1218.def: from G1210 (δέω); the public (as bound together socially)

G1219.def: from G1218 (δῆμος); public; (feminine singular dative case as adverb) in public.

G1220.def: of Latin origin; a denarius (or ten asses)

G1221.def: from G1211 (δή) and G4218 (ποτέ); a particle of generalization; indeed, at any time.

G1222.def: from G1211 (δή) and G4225 (πού); a particle of asseveration; indeed doubtless.

G1223.def: a primary preposition denoting the channel of an act; through (in very wide applications, local, causal, or occasional)
G1223.kjv: after, always, among, at, to avoid, because of (that), briefly, by, for (cause) … fore, from, in, by occasion of, of, by reason of, for sake, that, thereby, therefore, X though, through(-out), to, wherefore, with (-in)

G1224.def: from G1223 (διά) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to cross.

G1225.def: from G1223 (διά) and G906 (βάλλω); (figuratively) to traduce.

G1226.def: middle voice of a compound of G1223 (διά) and G950 (βεβαιόω); to confirm thoroughly (by words), i.e. asseverate.

G1227.def: from G1223 (διά) and G991 (βλέπω); to look through, i.e. recover full vision.

G1228.def: from G1225 (διαβάλλω); a traducer; specially, Satan (compare H07854)

G1229.def: from G1223 (διά) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος); to herald thoroughly.

G1230.def: from G1223 (διά) and G1096 (γίνομαι); to elapse meanwhile.
G1230.kjv: X after, be past, be spent

G1231.def: from G1223 (διά) and G1097 (γινώσκω); to know thoroughly, i.e. ascertain exactly.

G1232.def: from G1123 (γραπτός) and G1107 (γνωρίζω); to tell abroad.

G1234.def: from G1223 (διά) and G1111 (γογγύζω); to complain throughout a crowd.

G1235.def: from G1223 (διά) and G1127 (γρηγορεύω); to waken thoroughly.

G1236.def: from G1223 (διά) and G71 (ἄγω); to pass time or life.

G1237.def: from G1223 (διά) and G1209 (δέχομαι); to receive in turn, i.e. (figuratively) succeed to.

G1238.def: from a compound of G1223 (διά) and G1210 (δέω); a "diadem" (as bound about the head)

G1239.def: from G1223 (διά) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to give throughout a crowd, i.e. deal out; also to deliver over (as to a successor)

G1240.def: from G1237 (διαδέχομαι); a successor in office.

G1241.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2224 (ζώννυμι); to gird tightly.

G1242.def: from G1303; properly, a disposition, i.e., (specially) a contract (especially a devisory will).

G1243.def: from G1244 (διαιρέω); a distinction or (concretely) variety.

G1244.def: from G1223 (διά) and G138 (αἱρέομαι); to separate, i.e. distribute.

G1245.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2511 (καθαρίζω); to cleanse perfectly, i.e. (specially) winnow.

G1246.def: middle voice from G1223 (διά) and a compound of G2596 (κατά) and G1651 (ἐλέγχω); to prove downright, i.e. confute.

G1247.def: from G1249 (διάκονος); to be an attendant, i.e. wait upon (menially or as a host, friend, or (figuratively) teacher); technically, to act as a Christian deacon.
G1247.kjv: (ad-)minister (unto), serve, use the office of a deacon

G1248.def: from G1249 (διάκονος); attendance (as a servant, etc.); figuratively (eleemosynary) aid, (official) service (especially of the Christian teacher, or technically of the diaconate)

G1249.def: probably from an obsolete (to run on errands; compare G1377 (διώκω)); an attendant, i.e. (genitive case) a waiter (at table or in other menial duties); specially, a Christian teacher and pastor (technically, a deacon or deaconess)

G1250.def: from G1364 (δίς) and G1540 (ἑκατόν); two hundred.

G1251.def: middle voice from G1223 (διά) and G191 (ἀκούω); to hear throughout, i.e. patiently listen (to a prisoner's plea)

G1252.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2919 (κρίνω); to separate thoroughly, i.e. (literally and reflexively) to withdraw from, or (by implication) oppose; figuratively, to discriminate (by implication, decide), or (reflexively) hesitate.
G1252.kjv: contend, make (to) differ(-ence), discern, doubt, judge, be partial, stagger, waver

G1254.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2967 (κωλύω); to hinder altogether, i.e. utterly prohibit.

G1255.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2980 (λαλέω); to talk throughout a company, i.e. converse or (genitive case) publish.

G1256.def: middle voice from G1223 (διά) and G3004 (λέγω); to say thoroughly, i.e. discuss (in argument or exhortation)

G1257.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3007 (λείπω); to leave off in the middle, i.e. intermit.

G1258.def: from G1256 (διαλέγομαι); a (mode of) discourse, i.e. "dialect".

G1259.def: from G1223 (διά) and G236 (ἀλλάσσω); to change thoroughly, i.e. (mentally) to conciliate.

G1260.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3049 (λογίζομαι); to reckon thoroughly, i.e. (genitive case) to deliberate (by reflection or discussion)
G1260.kjv: cast in mind, consider, dispute, muse, reason, think

G1261.def: from G1260 (διαλογίζομαι); discussion, i.e. (internal) consideration (by implication, purpose), or (external) debate.

G1262.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3089 (λύω); to dissolve utterly.

G1263.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3140 (μαρτυρέω); to attest or protest earnestly, or (by implication) hortatively.

G1264.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3164 (μάχομαι); to fight fiercely (in altercation)

G1265.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3306 (μένω); to stay constantly (in being or relation)

G1266.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3307 (μερίζω); to partition thoroughly (literally in distribution, figuratively in dissension)

G1267.def: from G1266 (διαμερίζω); disunion (of opinion and conduct)

G1268.def: from G1223 (διά) and the base of G3551 (νόμος); to distribute, i.e. (of information) to disseminate.

G1269.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3506 (νεύω); to nod (or express by signs) across an intervening space.

G1270.def: from a compound of G1223 (διά) and G3539 (νοιέω); something thought through, i.e. a sentiment.

G1271.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3563 (νοῦς); deep thought, properly, the faculty (mind or its disposition), by implication, its exercise.

G1272.def: from G1223 (διά) and G455 (ἀνοίγω); to open thoroughly, literally (as a first-born) or figuratively (to expound)

G1273.def: from G1223 (διά) and a derivative of G3571 (νύξ); to sit up the whole night.

G1274.def: from G1223 (διά) and (to effect); to accomplish thoroughly.

G1275.def: from G1223 (διά) and the genitive case of G3956 (πᾶς); through all time, i.e. (adverbially) constantly.

G1276.def: from G1223 (διά) and a derivative of the base of G4008 (πέραν); to cross entirely.

G1277.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4126 (πλέω); to sail through.

G1278.def: from G1223 (διά) and a derivative of G4192 (πόνος); to toil through, i.e. (passively) be worried.

G1279.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to travel through.
G1279.kjv: go through, journey in, pass by

G1280.def: from G1223 (διά) and G639 (ἀπορέω); to be thoroughly nonplussed.

G1281.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4231 (πραγματεύομαι); to thoroughly occupy oneself, i.e. (transitively and by implication) to earn in business.

G1282.def: from G1223 (διά) and the base of G4249 (πρίζω); to saw asunder, i.e. (figuratively) to exasperate.

G1283.def: from G1223 (διά) and G726 (ἁρπάζω); to seize asunder, i.e. plunder.

G1284.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4486 (ῥήγνυμι); to tear asunder.

G1285.def: from G1223 (διά) and (clear); to clear thoroughly, i.e. (figuratively) declare.

G1286.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4579 (σείω); to shake thoroughly, i.e. (figuratively) to intimidate.

G1287.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4650 (σκορπίζω); to dissipate, i.e. (genitive case) to rout or separate; specially, to winnow; figuratively, to squander.

G1288.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4685 (σπάω); to draw apart, i.e. sever or dismember.

G1289.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4687 (σπείρω); to sow throughout, i.e. (figuratively) distribute in foreign lands.

G1290.def: from G1289 (διασπείρω); dispersion, i.e. (specially and concretely) the (converted) Israelite resident in Gentile countries.

G1291.def: middle voice from G1223 (διά) and G4724 (στέλλω); to set (oneself) apart (figuratively, distinguish), i.e. (by implication) to enjoin.

G1294.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4762 (στρέφω); to distort, i.e. (figuratively) misinterpret, or (morally) corrupt.

G1295.def: from G1223 (διά) and G4982 (σώζω); to save thoroughly, i.e. (by implication or analogy) to cure, preserve, rescue, etc.
G1295.kjv: bring safe, escape (safe), heal, make perfectly whole, save

G1297.def: from G1299 (διατάσσω); an arrangement, i.e. (authoritative) edict.

G1298.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5015 (ταράσσω); to disturb wholly, i.e. agitate (with alarm)

G1299.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5021 (τάσσω); to arrange thoroughly, i.e. (specially) institute, prescribe, etc.
G1299.kjv: appoint, command, give, (set in) order, ordain

G1300.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5055 (τελέω); to accomplish thoroughly, i.e. (subjectively) to persist.

G1301.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5083 (τηρέω); to watch thoroughly, i.e. (positively and transitively) to observe strictly, or (negatively and reflexively) to avoid wholly.

G1302.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5101 (τίς); through what cause ?, i.e. why?.

G1303.def: middle voice from G1223 (διά) and G5087 (τίθημι); to put apart, i.e. (figuratively) dispose (by assignment, compact, or bequest)

G1304.def: from G1223 (διά) and the base of G5147 (τρίβος); to wear through (time), i.e. remain.

G1305.def: from a compound of G1223 (διά) and G5142 (τρέφω); nourishment.

G1306.def: from G1223 (διά) and G826 (αὐγάζω); to glimmer through, i.e. break (as day)

G1307.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5316 (φαίνω); appearing through, i.e. "diaphanous".

G1308.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5342 (φέρω); to bear through, i.e. (literally) transport; usually to bear apart, i.e. (objectively) to toss about (figuratively, report); subjectively, to "differ", or (by implication) surpass.
G1308.kjv: be better, carry, differ from, drive up and down, be (more) excellent, make matter, publish, be of more value

G1309.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5343 (φεύγω); to flee through, i.e. escape.

G1310.def: from G1223 (διά) and a derivative of G5345 (φήμη); to report thoroughly, i.e. divulgate.
G1310.kjv: blaze abroad, commonly report, spread abroad, fame

G1311.def: from G1225 (διαβάλλω) and G5351 (φθείρω); to rot thoroughly, i.e. (by implication) to ruin (passively, decay utterly, figuratively, pervert)

G1314.def: from G1223 (διά) and G5442 (φυλάσσω); to guard thoroughly, i.e. protect.

G1315.def: from G1223 (διά) and a derivative of G5495 (χείρ); to handle thoroughly, i.e. lay violent hands upon.

G1316.def: from G1223 (διά) and the middle voice of G5563 (χωρίζω); to remove (oneself) wholly, i.e. retire.

G1318.def: from G1321 (διδάσκω); (subjectively) instructed, or (objectively) communicated by teaching.

G1319.def: from G1320 (διδάσκαλος); instruction (the function or the information)

G1320.def: from G1321 (διδάσκω); an instructor (genitive case or specially)

G1321.def: a prolonged (causative) form of a primary verb (to learn); to teach (in the same broad application)

G1322.def: from G1321 (διδάσκω); instruction (the act or the matter)

G1323.def: from G1364 (δίς) and G1406 (δραχμή); a double drachma (didrachm)

G1324.def: prolongation from G1364 (δίς); double, i.e. twin; Didymus, a Christian.

G1325.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb (which is used as an alternative in most of the tenses); to give (used in a very wide application, properly, or by implication, literally or figuratively; greatly modified by the connection)
G1325.kjv: adventure, bestow, bring forth, commit, deliver (up), give, grant, hinder, make, minister, number, offer, have power, put, receive, set, shew, smite (+ with the hand), strike (+ with the palm of the hand), suffer, take, utter, yield

G1326.def: from G1223 (διά) and G1453 (ἐγείρω); to wake fully; i.e. arouse (literally or figuratively)

G1327.def: from G1223 (διά) and G1841 (ἔξοδος); an outlet through, i.e. probably an open square (from which roads diverge)

G1329.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2059 (ἑρμηνεύω); to explain thoroughly, by implication, to translate.

G1330.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι); to traverse (literally)
G1330.kjv: come, depart, go (about, abroad, everywhere, over, through, throughout), pass (by, over, through, throughout), pierce through, travel, walk through

G1331.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2065 (ἐρωτάω); to question throughout, i.e. ascertain by interrogation.

G1332.def: from G1364 (δίς) and G2094 (ἔτος); of two years (in age)

G1333.def: from G1332 (διετής); a space of two years (biennium)

G1334.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2233 (ἡγέομαι); to relate fully.

G1336.def: neuter of a compound of G1223 (διά) and a derivative of an alternate of G5342 (φέρω); carried through, i.e. (adverbially with G1519 (εἰς) and G3588 (ὁ) prefixed) perpetually.

G1337.def: from G1364 (δίς) and G2281 (θάλασσα); having two seas, i.e. a sound with a double outlet.

G1338.def: from G1223 (διά) and the base of G2425 (ἱκανός); to reach through, i.e. penetrate.

G1339.def: from G1223 (διά) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to stand apart, i.e. (reflexively) to remove, intervene.
G1339.kjv: go further, be parted, after the space of

G1340.def: from G1223 (διά) and a derivative of G2478 (ἰσχυρός); to stout it through, i.e. asservate.

G1341.def: from G1342 (δίκαιος) and G2920 (κρίσις); a just sentence.

G1342.def: from G1349 (δίκη); equitable (in character or act); by implication, innocent, holy (absolutely or relatively)

G1343.def: from G1342; equity (of character or act); specially (Christian) justification.

G1344.def: from G1342 (δίκαιος); to render (i.e. show or regard as) just or innocent.

G1345.def: from G1344 (δικαιόω); an equitable deed; by implication, a statute or decision.

G1348.def: from a derivative of G1349 (δίκη); a judger.

G1349.def: probably from G1166 (δεικνύω); right (as self-evident), i.e. justice (the principle, a decision, or its execution)

G1350.def: probably from a primary verb (to cast); a seine (for fishing)

G1351.def: from G1364 (δίς) and G3056 (λόγος); equivocal, i.e. telling a different story.

G1352.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3739 (ὅς); through which thing, i.e. consequently.

G1353.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3593 (ὁδεύω); to travel through.

G1355.def: from G1352 (διό) and G4007 (περ); on which very account.

G1356.def: from the alternate of G2203 (Ζεύς) and the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω); sky-fallen (i.e. an aerolite)

G1357.def: from a compound of G1223 (διά) and a derivative of G3717 (ὀρθός), meaning to straighten thoroughly; rectification, i.e. (specially) the Messianic restauration.

G1358.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3736 (ὀρύσσω); to penetrate burglariously.

G1359.def: from the alternate of G2203 (Ζεύς) and a form of the base of G2877 (κοράσιον); sons of Jupiter, i.e. the twins Dioscuri.

G1360.def: from G1223 (διά) and G3754 (ὅτι); on the very account that, or inasmuch as.

G1361.def: from the alternate of G2203 (Ζεύς) and G5142 (τρέφω); Jove-nourished; Diotrephes, an opponent of Christianity.

G1362.def: from G1364 (δίς) and (probably) the base of G4119 (πλείων); two-fold.

G1365.def: from G1364 (δίς); properly, to duplicate, i.e. (mentally) to waver (in opinion)

G1367.def: from G1364 (δίς) and G5507 (χίλιοι); two thousand.

G1368.def: from G1223 (διά) and (to filter); to strain out.

G1369.def: from a derivative of G1364 (δίς); to make apart, i.e. sunder (figuratively, alienate)

G1370.def: from a derivative of G1364 (δίς) and G4714 (στάσις); disunion, i.e. (figuratively) dissension.

G1371.def: from a compound of a derivative of G1364 (δίς) and a derivative of (to cut); to bisect, i.e. (by extension) to flog severely.

G1372.def: from a variation of G1373 (δίψος); to thirst for (literally or figuratively)

G1374.def: from G1364 (δίς) and G5590 (ψυχή); two-spirited, i.e. vacillating (in opinion or purpose)

G1377.def: a prolonged (and causative) form of a primary verb (to flee; compare the base of G1169 (δειλός) and G1249 (διάκονος)); to pursue (literally or figuratively); by implication, to persecute.
G1377.kjv: ensue, follow (after), given to, (suffer) persecute(-ion), press forward

G1378.def: from the base of G1380 (δοκέω); a law (civil, ceremonial or ecclesiastical)

G1379.def: from G1378 (δόγμα); to prescribe by statute, i.e. (reflexively) to submit to, ceremonially rule.

G1380.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb, (used only in an alternate in certain tenses; compare the base of G1166 (δεικνύω)) of the same meaning; to think; by implication, to seem (truthfully or uncertainly)
G1380.kjv: be accounted, (of own) please(-ure), be of reputation, seem (good), suppose, think, trow

G1381.def: from G1384 (δόκιμος); to test (literally or figuratively); by implication, to approve.
G1381.kjv: allow, discern, examine, X like, (ap-)prove, try

G1382.def: from the same as G1384 (δόκιμος); test (abstractly or concretely); by implication, trustiness.

G1383.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G1382 (δοκιμή); a testing; by implication, trustworthiness.

G1384.def: from G1380 (δοκέω); properly, acceptable (current after assayal), i.e. approved.

G1385.def: from G1209 (δέχομαι) (through the idea of holding up); a stick of timber.

G1388.def: from an obsolete primary verb, (probably meaning to decoy; compare G1185 (δελεάζω)); a trick (bait), i.e. (figuratively) wile.

G1389.def: from G1388 (δόλος); to ensnare, i.e. (figuratively) adulterate.

G1390.def: from the base of G1325 (δίδωμι); a present.

G1391.def: from the base of G1380; glory (as very apparent), in a wide application (literal or figurative, objective or subjective).

G1392.def: from G1391 (δόξα); to render (or esteem) glorious (in a wide application)
G1392.kjv: (make) glorify(-ious), full of (have) glory, honour, magnify

G1394.def: from the base of G1325 (δίδωμι); a giving; by implication, (concretely) a gift.

G1395.def: from the base of G1325 (δίδωμι); a giver.

G1396.def: from a presumed compound of G1401 (δοῦλος) and G71 (ἄγω); to be a slave-driver, i.e. to enslave (figuratively, subdue)

G1398.def: from G1401 (δοῦλος); to be a slave to (literal or figurative, involuntary or voluntary)

G1399.def: feminine of G1401 (δοῦλος); a female slave (involuntarily or voluntarily)

G1401.def: from G1210 (δέω); a slave (literal or figurative, involuntary or voluntary; frequently, therefore in a qualified sense of subjection or subserviency)

G1402.def: from G1401 (δοῦλος); to enslave (literally or figuratively)
G1402.kjv: bring into (be under) bondage, X given, become (make) servant

G1403.def: from G1209 (δέχομαι); a reception, i.e. convivial entertainment.

G1404.def: probably from an alternate form of (to look); a fabulous kind of serpent (perhaps as supposed to fascinate)

G1405.def: perhaps akin to the base of G1404 (δράκων) (through the idea of capturing); to grasp, i.e. (figuratively) entrap.

G1406.def: from G1405 (δράσσομαι); a drachma or (silver) coin (as handled)

G1407.def: from (to pluck); a gathering hook (especially for harvesting)

G1408.def: from the alternate of G5143 (τρέχω); a race, i.e. (figuratively) career.

G1409.def: a feminine diminutive of Drusus (a Roman name); Drusilla, a member of the Herodian family.

G1410.def: of uncertain affinity; to be able or possible.
G1410.kjv: be able, can (do, + -not), could, may, might, be possible, be of power

G1411.def: from G1410; force (literally or figuratively); specially, miraculous power (usually by implication, a miracle itself).

G1413.def: from G1410 (δύναμαι); a ruler or officer.

G1415.def: from G1410 (δύναμαι); powerful or capable (literally or figuratively); neuter possible.
G1415.kjv: able, could, (that is) mighty (man), possible, power, strong

G1416.def: prolonged forms of an obsolete primary (to sink); to go "down".

G1418.def: a primary inseparable particle of uncertain derivation; used only in composition as a prefix; hard, i.e. with difficulty.

G1419.def: from G1418 (δυσ-) and a derivative of G941 (βαστάζω); oppressive.

G1420.def: from G1418 (δυσ-) and a comparative of G1787 (ἐντός) (meaning a bowel); a "dysentery".

G1421.def: from G1418 (δυσ-) and a presumed derivative of G2059 (ἑρμηνεύω); difficult of explanation.

G1422.def: from G1418 (δυσ-) and (food); properly, fastidious about eating (peevish), i.e. (genitive case) impracticable.

G1424.def: from G1416 (δύνω); the sun-set, i.e. (by implication) the western region.

G1425.def: from G1418 (δυσ-) and a derivative of G3539 (νοιέω); difficult of perception.

G1426.def: from a compound of G1418 (δυσ-) and G5345 (φήμη); defamation.

G1427.def: from G1417 (δύο) and G1176 (δέκα); two and ten, i.e. a dozen.

G1429.def: from G1427 (δώδεκα) and G5443 (φυλή); the commonwealth of Israel.

G1430.def: from (to build); properly, an edifice, i.e. (specially) a roof.

G1432.def: accusative case of G1431 (δωρεά) as adverb; gratuitously (literally or figuratively)
G1432.kjv: without a cause, freely, for naught, in vain

G1433.def: middle voice from G1435 (δῶρον); to bestow gratuitously.

G1436.def: apparent imperative of G1439 (ἐάω); properly, let it be, i.e. (as interjection) aha!.

G1437.def: from G1487 (εἰ) and G302 (ἄν); a conditional particle; in case that, provided, etc.; often used in connection with other particles to denote indefiniteness or uncertainty.
G1437.kjv: before, but, except, (and) if, (if) so, (what-, whither-)soever, though, when (-soever), whether (or), to whom, (who-)so(-ever)

G1438.def: from a reflexive pronoun otherwise obsolete and the genitive case (dative case or accusative case) of G846 (αὐτός); him- (her-, it-, them-, also (in conjunction with the personal pronoun of the other persons) my-, thy-, our-, your-) self (selves), etc.
G1438.kjv: alone, her (own, -self), (he) himself, his (own), itself, one (to) another, our (thine) own(-selves), + that she had, their (own, own selves), (of) them(-selves), they, thyself, you, your (own, own conceits, own selves, -selves)

G1439.def: of uncertain affinity; to let be, i.e. permit or leave alone.

G1440.def: from G1442 (ἕβδομος) and a modified form of G1176 (δέκα); seventy.

G1441.def: multiple adverb from G1440 (ἑβδομήκοντα); seventy times.

G1443.def: of Hebrew origin (H05677); Eber, a patriarch.

G1444.def: from G1443 (Ἐβέρ); Hebraic or the Jewish language.

G1445.def: from G1443 (Ἐβέρ); a Hebræan (i.e. Hebrew) or Jew.

G1446.def: from G1443 (Ἐβέρ); the Hebraistic (Hebrew) or Jewish (Chaldee) language.

G1447.def: adverb from G1446 (Ἑβραΐς); Hebraistically or in the Jewish (Chaldee) language.

G1448.def: from G1451 (ἐγγύς); to make near, i.e. (reflexively) approach.
G1448.kjv: approach, be at hand, come (draw) near, be (come, draw) nigh

G1449.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G1125 (γράφω); to "engrave", i.e. inscribe.

G1450.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and (a limb); pledged (as if articulated by a member), i.e. a bondsman.

G1451.def: from a primary verb (to squeeze or throttle; akin to the base of G43 (ἀγκάλη)); near (literally or figuratively, of place or time)
G1451.kjv: from , at hand, near, nigh (at hand, unto), ready

G1452.def: neuter of the comparative of G1451 (ἐγγύς); nearer.

G1453.def: probably akin to the base of G58 (ἀγορά) (through the idea of collecting one's faculties); to waken (transitively or intransitively), i.e. rouse (literally, from sleep, from sitting or lying, from disease, from death; or figuratively, from obscurity, inactivity, ruins, nonexistence)
G1453.kjv: awake, lift (up), raise (again, up), rear up, (a-)rise (again, up), stand, take up

G1455.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of G2524 (καθίημι); subinduced, i.e. surreptitiously suborned as a lier-in-wait.

G1456.def: neuter plural of a presumed compound from G1722 (ἐν) and G2537 (καινός); innovatives, i.e. (specially) renewal (of religious services after the Antiochian interruption)

G1457.def: from G1456 (ἐγκαίνια); to renew, i.e. inaugurate.

G1458.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2564 (καλέω); to call in (as a debt or demand), i.e. bring to account (charge, criminate, etc.)
G1458.kjv: accuse, call in question, implead, lay to the charge

G1459.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2641 (καταλείπω); to leave behind in some place, i.e. (in a good sense) let remain over, or (in a bad sense) to desert.

G1460.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2730 (κατοικέω); to settle down in a place, i.e. reside.

G1461.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of G2759 (κέντρον); to prick in, i.e. ingraft.

G1462.def: from G1458 (ἐγκαλέω); an accusation, i.e. offence alleged.
G1462.kjv: crime laid against, laid to charge

G1463.def: middle voice from G1722 (ἐν) and (to gird); to engirdle oneself (for labor), i.e. figuratively (the apron as being a badge of servitude) to wear (in token of mutual deference)

G1465.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2875 (κόπτω); to cut into, i.e. (figuratively) impede, detain.

G1467.def: middle voice from G1468 (ἐγκρατής); to exercise self-restraint (in diet and chastity)

G1468.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2904 (κράτος); strong in a thing (masterful), i.e. (figuratively and reflexively) self-controlled (in appetite, etc.)

G1469.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2919 (κρίνω); to judge in, i.e. count among.

G1470.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2928 (κρύπτω); to conceal in, i.e. incorporate with.

G1471.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G2949 (κῦμα); swelling inside, i.e. pregnant.

G1472.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5548 (χρίω); to rub in (oil), i.e. besmear.

G1473.def: a primary pronoun of the first person I (only expressed when emphatic)

G1475.def: from the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος); a basis (bottom), i.e. the soil.

G1476.def: from a derivative of (to sit); sedentary, i.e. (by implication) immovable.

G1477.def: from a derivative of G1476 (ἑδραῖος); a support, i.e. (figuratively) basis.

G1478.def: of Hebrew origin (H02396); Ezekias (i.e. Hezekeiah), an Israelite.

G1479.def: from G2309 (θέλω) and G2356 (θρησκεία); voluntary (arbitrary and unwarranted) piety, i.e. sanctimony.

G1480.def: from G1485 (ἔθος); to accustom, i.e. (neuter passive participle) customary.

G1481.def: from G1484 (ἔθνος) and G746 (ἀρχή); the governor (not king) of a district.

G1482.def: from G1484 (ἔθνος); national ("ethnic"), i.e. (specially) a Gentile.

G1483.def: adverb from G1482 (ἐθνικός); as a Gentile.

G1484.def: probably from G1486 (ἔθω); a race (as of the same habit), i.e. a tribe; specially, a foreign (non-Jewish) one (usually, by implication, pagan)

G1485.def: from G1486 (ἔθω); a usage (prescribed by habit or law)

G1486.def: a primary verb; to be used (by habit or conventionality); neuter perfect participle usage.

G1487.def: a primary particle of conditionality; if, whether, that, etc.

G1488.def: second person singular present of G1510 (εἰμί); thou art.

G1489.def: from G1487 (εἰ) and G1065 (γέ); if indeed, seeing that, unless, (with negative) otherwise.

G1490.def: from G1487 (εἰ), G1161 (δέ), and G3361 (μή) (sometimes with G1065 (γέ) added); but if not.

G1491.def: from G1492 (εἴδω); a view, i.e. form (literally or figuratively)

G1492.def: a primary verb; used only in certain past tenses, the others being borrowed from the equivalent G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) and G3708 (ὁράω); properly, to see (literally or figuratively); by implication, (in the perfect tense only) to know.
G1492.kjv: be aware, behold, X can (+ not tell), consider, (have) know(-ledge), look (on), perceive, see, be sure, tell, understand, wish, wot

G1493.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G1497 (εἴδωλον); an image-fane.

G1494.def: neuter of a compound of G1497 (εἴδωλον) and a presumed derivative of G2380 (θύω); an image-sacrifice, i.e. part of an idolatrous offering.
G1494.kjv: (meat, thing that is) offered (in sacrifice, sacrificed) to (unto) idols

G1495.def: from G1497 (εἴδωλον) and G2999 (λατρεία); image-worship (literally or figuratively)

G1496.def: from G1497 (εἴδωλον) and the base of G3000 (λατρεύω); an image- (servant or) worshipper (literally or figuratively)

G1497.def: from G1491 (εἶδος); an image (i.e. for worship); by implication, a heathen god, or (plural) the worship of such.

G1498.def: optative (i.e. English subjunctive) present of G1510 (εἰμί) (including the other person); might (could, would, or should) be.
G1498.kjv: mean, + perish, should be, was, were

G1499.def: from G1487 (εἰ) and G2532 (καί); if also (or even)

G1500.def: probably from G1502 (εἴκω) (through the idea of failure); idly, i.e. without reason (or effect)

G1502.def: apparently a primary verb; properly, to be weak, i.e. yield.

G1503.def: apparently a primary verb (perhaps akin to G1502 (εἴκω) through the idea of faintness as a copy); to resemble.

G1504.def: from G1503 (εἴκω); a likeness, i.e. (literally) statue, profile, or (figuratively) representation, resemblance.

G1505.def: from G1506 (εἰλικρινής); clearness, i.e. (by implication) purity (figuratively)

G1506.def: from (the sun's ray) and G2919 (κρίνω); judged by sunlight, i.e. tested as genuine (figuratively)

G1507.def: a prolonged form of a primary but defective verb (of the same meaning); to coil or wrap.

G1508.def: from G1487 (εἰ) and G3361 (μή); if not.
G1508.kjv: but, except (that), if not, more than, save (only) that, saving, till

G1509.def: from G1508 (εἰ μή) and the neuter of G5100 (τὶς); if not somewhat.

G1510.def: the first person singular present indicative; a prolonged form of a primary and defective verb; I exist (used only when emphatic)
G1510.kjv: am, have been, X it is I, was

G1511.def: present infinitive from G1510 (εἰμί); to exist.

G1512.def: from G1487 (εἰ) and G4007 (περ); if perhaps.

G1513.def: from G1487 (εἰ) and G4458 (-πώς); if somehow.

G1514.kjv: be at (have, live in) peace, live peaceably

G1515.def: probably from a primary verb εἴρω (to join); peace (literally or figuratively); by implication, prosperity.

G1516.def: from G1515 (εἰρήνη); pacific; by implication, salutary.

G1517.def: from G1518 (εἰρηνοποιός); to be a peace-maker, i.e. (figuratively) to harmonize.

G1518.def: from G1515 (εἰρήνη) and G4160 (ποιέω); pacificatory, i.e. (subjectively) peaceable.

G1519.def: a primary preposition; to or into (indicating the point reached or entered), of place, time, or (figuratively) purpose (result, etc.); also in adverbial phrases.
G1519.kjv: (abundant-)ly, against, among, as, at, (back-)ward, before, by, concerning, + continual, + far more exceeding, for (intent, purpose), fore, + forth, in (among, at, unto, -so much that, -to), to the intent that, + of one mind, + never, of, (up-)on, + perish, + set at one again, (so) that, therefore(-unto), throughout, til, to (be, the end, -ward), (here-)until(-to), …ward, (where-)fore, with

G1520.kjv: a(-n, -ny, certain), + abundantly, man, one (another), only, other, some

G1521.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G71 (ἄγω); to introduce (literally or figuratively)
G1521.kjv: bring in(-to), (+ was to) lead into

G1522.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G191 (ἀκούω); to listen to.

G1523.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G1209 (δέχομαι); to take into one's favor.

G1524.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and (to go); to enter.

G1525.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι); to enter (literally or figuratively)
G1525.kjv: X arise, come (in, into), enter in(-to), go in (through)

G1526.def: 3rd person plural present indicative of G1510 (εἰμί); they are.
G1526.kjv: agree, are, be, dure, X is, were

G1527.def: from G1520 (εἷς) repeated with G2596 (κατά) inserted; severally.

G1528.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G2564 (καλέω); to invite in.

G1529.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G3598 (ὁδός); an entrance (literally or figuratively)

G1530.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and (to leap); to rush in.

G1531.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to enter (literally or figuratively)

G1532.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G5143 (τρέχω); to hasten inward.

G1533.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and G5342 (φέρω); to carry inward (literally or figuratively)

G1534.def: of uncertain affinity; a particle of succession (in time or logical enumeration), then, moreover.

G1535.def: from G1487 (εἰ) and G5037 (τέ); if too.

G1536.def: from G1487 (εἰ) and G5100 (τὶς); if any.
G1536.kjv: he that, if a(-ny) man('s thing, from any, ought), whether any, whosoever

G1537.def: a primary preposition denoting origin (the point whence action or motion proceeds), from, out (of place, time, or cause; literal or figurative; direct or remote)
G1537.kjv: after, among, X are, at, betwixt(-yond), by (the means of), exceedingly, (+ abundantly above), for(- th), from (among, forth, up), + grudgingly, + heartily, X heavenly, X hereby, + very highly, in, …ly, (because, by reason) of, off (from), on, out among (from, of), over, since, X thenceforth, through, X unto, X vehemently, with(-out)

G1538.def: as if a superlative of (afar); each or every.
G1538.kjv: any, both, each (one), every (man, one, woman), particularly

G1539.def: as if from G1538 (ἕκαστος) and G5119 (τότε); at every time.

G1542.def: from G1540 (ἑκατόν) and a presumed derivative of G4111 (πλάσσω); a hundred times.

G1543.def: from G1540 (ἑκατόν) and G757 (ἄρχω); the captain of one hundred men.

G1544.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G906 (βάλλω); to eject (literally or figuratively)
G1544.kjv: bring forth, cast (forth, out), drive (out), expel, leave, pluck (pull, take, thrust) out, put forth (out), send away (forth, out)

G1545.def: from a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G939 (βάσις) (meaning to go out); an exit (literally or figuratively)

G1546.def: from G1544 (ἐκβάλλω); ejection, i.e. (specially) a throwing overboard of the cargo.

G1547.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a form of G1061 (γαμίσκω) (compare G1548 (ἐκγαμίσκω)); to marry off a daughter.

G1548.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1061 (γαμίσκω); the same as 1547.

G1549.def: neuter of a derivative of a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and G1096 (γίνομαι); a descendant, i.e. (specially) grandchild.

G1550.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1159 (δαπανάω); to expend (wholly), i.e. (figuratively) exhaust.

G1551.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1209 (δέχομαι); to accept from some source, i.e. (by implication) to await.

G1552.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1212 (δῆλος); wholly evident.

G1553.def: from a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and G1218 (δῆμος); to emigrate, i.e. (figuratively) vacate or quit.

G1554.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to give forth, i.e. (specially) to lease.

G1555.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a compound of G1223 (διά) and G2233 (ἡγέομαι); to narrate through wholly.

G1556.def: from G1558 (ἔκδικος); to vindicate, retaliate, punish.

G1558.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1349 (δίκη); carrying justice out, i.e. a punisher.

G1559.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1377 (διώκω); to pursue out, i.e. expel or persecute implacably.

G1560.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of G1325 (δίδωμι); given out or over, i.e. surrendered.

G1562.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G1416 (δύνω); to cause to sink out of, i.e. (specially as of clothing) to divest.

G1563.def: of uncertain affinity; there; by extension, thither.

G1565.def: from G1563 (ἐκεῖ); that one (or (neuter) thing); often intensified by the article prefixed.
G1565.kjv: he, it, the other (same), selfsame, that (same, very), X their, X them, they, this, those

G1567.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2212 (ζητέω); to search out, i.e. (figuratively)investigate, crave, demand, (by Hebraism) worship.

G1569.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2285 (θάμβος); utterly astounded.

G1570.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι); put out, i.e. exposed to perish.

G1571.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2508 (καθαίρω); to cleanse thoroughly.

G1572.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2545 (καίω); to inflame deeply.

G1573.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2556 (κακός); to be (bad or) weak, i.e. (by implication) to fail (in heart)

G1574.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G2759 (κέντρον); to transfix.

G1575.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2806 (κλάω); to exscind.

G1576.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2808 (κλείω); to shut out (literally or figuratively)

G1577.def: from a compound of G1537 and a derivative of G2564; a calling out, i.e., (concretely) a popular meeting, especially a religious congregation.

G1578.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2827 (κλίνω); to deviate, i.e. (absolutely) to shun (literally or figuratively), or (relatively) to decline (from piety)
G1578.kjv: avoid, eschew, go out of the way

G1579.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2860 (κολυμβάω); to escape by swimming.

G1580.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2865 (κομίζω); to bear forth (to burial)

G1581.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2875 (κόπτω); to exscind; figuratively, to frustrate.
G1581.kjv: cut down (off, out), hew down, hinder

G1582.def: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2910 (κρεμάννυμι); to hang upon the lips of a speaker, i.e. listen closely.

G1583.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2980 (λαλέω); to divulge.

G1584.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2989 (λάμπω); to be resplendent.

G1585.def: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2990 (λανθάνω); to be utterly oblivious of.

G1586.def: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3004 (λέγω) (in its primary sense); to select.

G1587.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3007 (λείπω); to omit, i.e. (by implication) cease (die)

G1588.def: from G1586 (ἐκλέγομαι); select; by implication, favorite.

G1590.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3089 (λύω); to relax (literally or figuratively)

G1591.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G3145 (μασσάομαι); to knead out, i.e. (by analogy) to wipe dry.

G1592.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3456 (μυκτηρίζω); to sneer outright at.

G1593.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3506 (νεύω); (by analogy) to slip off, i.e. quietly withdraw.

G1594.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3525 (νήφω); (figuratively) to rouse (oneself) out of stupor.

G1595.def: neuter of a derivative from G1635 (ἑκών); voluntariness.

G1596.def: adverb from the same as G1595 (ἑκούσιον); voluntarily.

G1597.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3819 (πάλαι); long ago, for a long while.
G1597.kjv: of a long time, of old

G1598.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3985 (πειράζω); to test thoroughly.

G1599.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3992 (πέμπω); to despatch.

G1600.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a form of G4072 (πέτομαι); to fly out, i.e. (by analogy) to extend.

G1601.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4098 (πίπτω); to drop away; specially, be driven out of one's course; figuratively, to lose, become inefficient.
G1601.kjv: be cast, fail, fall (away, off), take none effect

G1602.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4126 (πλέω); to depart by ship.

G1603.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4137 (πληρόω); to accomplish entirely.

G1605.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4141 (πλήσσω); to strike with astonishment.

G1606.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4154 (πνέω); to expire.

G1607.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to depart, be discharged, proceed, project.
G1607.kjv: come (forth, out of), depart, go (forth, out), issue, proceed (out of)

G1608.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4203 (πορνεύω); to be utterly unchaste.

G1609.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4429 (πτύω); to spit out, i.e. (figuratively) spurn.

G1610.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4492 (ῥιζόω); to uproot.
G1610.kjv: pluck up by the root, root up

G1611.def: from G1839 (ἐξίστημι); a displacement of the mind, i.e. bewilderment, "ecstasy".

G1612.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G4762 (στρέφω); to pervert (figuratively)

G1613.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5015 (ταράσσω); to disturb wholly.

G1614.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and teino (to stretch); to extend.

G1615.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5055 (τελέω); to complete fully.

G1617.def: neuter of the comparative of G1618 (ἐκτενής); more intently.

G1620.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5087 (τίθημι); to expose; figuratively, to declare.

G1621.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and tinasso (to swing); to shake violently.

G1622.def: from G1537 (ἐκ); the exterior; figuratively (as a preposition) aside from, besides.
G1622.kjv: but, except(-ed), other than, out of, outside, unless, without

G1624.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G5157 (τροπή); to deflect, i.e. turn away (literally or figuratively)
G1624.kjv: avoid, turn (aside, out of the way)

G1625.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5142 (τρέφω); to rear up to maturity, i.e. (genitive case) to cherish or train.

G1626.def: from a comparative of G1537 (ἐκ) and (to wound); a miscarriage (abortion), i.e. (by analogy) untimely birth.

G1627.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5342 (φέρω); to bear out (literally or figuratively)

G1628.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5343 (φεύγω); to flee out.

G1629.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5399 (φοβέω); to frighten utterly.

G1630.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5401 (φόβος); frightened out of one's wits.

G1631.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5453 (φύω); to sprout up.

G1632.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and (to pour); to pour forth; figuratively, to bestow.
G1632.kjv: gush (pour) out, run greedily (out), shed (abroad, forth), spill

G1633.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5562 (χωρέω); to depart.

G1634.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G5594 (ψύχω); to expire.

G1636.def: feminine of a presumed derivative from an obsolete primary; an olive (the tree or the fruit)

G1637.def: neuter of the same as G1636 (ἐλαία); olive oil.

G1638.def: from G1636 (ἐλαία); an olive-orchard, i.e. (specially) the Mount of Olives.

G1639.def: of Hebrew origin (H05867); an Elamite or Persian.

G1640.def: comparative of the same as G1646 (ἐλάχιστος); smaller (in size, quantity, age or quality)

G1641.def: from G1640 (ἐλάσσων); to diminish, i.e. fall short.

G1642.def: from G1640 (ἐλάσσων); to lessen (in rank or influence)

G1643.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb (obsolete except in certain tenses as an alternative of this) of uncertain affinity; to push (as wind, oars or dæmonical power)

G1645.def: probably akin to G1643 (ἐλαύνω) and the base of G1640 (ἐλάσσων); light, i.e. easy.

G1646.def: superlative of (short); used as equivalent to G3398 (μικρός); least (in size, amount, dignity, etc.)

G1648.def: of Hebrew origin (H0499); Eleazar, an Israelite.

G1651.def: of uncertain affinity; to confute, admonish.
G1651.kjv: convict, convince, tell a fault, rebuke, reprove

G1653.def: from G1656 (ἔλεος); to compassionate (by word or deed, specially, by divine grace)
G1653.kjv: have compassion (pity on), have (obtain, receive, shew) mercy (on)

G1654.def: from G1656 (ἔλεος); compassionateness, i.e. (as exercised towards the poor) beneficence, or (concretely) a benefaction.

G1656.def: of uncertain affinity; compassion (human or divine, especially active)

G1657.def: from G1658 (ἐλεύθερος); freedom (legitimate or licentious, chiefly moral or ceremonial)

G1658.def: probably from the alternate of G2064 (ἔρχομαι); unrestrained (to go at pleasure), i.e. (as a citizen) not a slave (whether freeborn or manumitted), or (genitive case) exempt (from obligation or liability)

G1659.def: from G1658 (ἐλεύθερος); to liberate, i.e. (figuratively) to exempt (from moral, ceremonial or mortal liability)

G1660.def: from the alternate of G2064 (ἔρχομαι); an advent.

G1661.def: from (an "elephant"); elephantine, i.e. (by implication) composed of ivory.

G1662.def: of Hebrew origin (H0471); Eliakim, an Israelite.

G1663.def: of Hebrew origin (H0461); Eliezer, an Israelite.

G1664.def: of Hebrew origin (H0410 and H01935); God of majesty; Eliud, an Israelite.

G1665.def: of Hebrew origin (H0472); Elisabet, an Israelitess.

G1666.def: of Hebrew origin (H0477); Elissæus, an Israelite.

G1667.def: a form of G1507 (εἱλίσσω); to coil or wrap.

G1668.def: probably from G1670 (ἑλκύω); an ulcer (as if drawn together)

G1669.def: from G1668 (ἕλκος); to cause to ulcerate, i.e. (passively) be ulcerous.

G1670.def: probably akin to G138 (αἱρέομαι); to drag (literally or figuratively)

G1671.def: of uncertain affinity; Hellas (or Greece), a country of Europe.

G1672.def: from G1671 (Ἑλλάς); a Hellen (Grecian) or inhabitant of Hellas; by extension a Greek-speaking person, especially a non-Jew.

G1673.def: from G1672 (Ἕλλην); Hellenic, i.e. Grecian (in language)

G1674.def: feminine of G1672 (Ἕλλην); a Grecian (i.e. non-Jewish) woman.

G1675.def: from a derivative of G1672 (Ἕλλην); a Hellenist or Greek-speaking Jew.

G1676.def: adverb from the same as G1675 (Ἑλληνιστής); Hellenistically, i.e. in the Grecian language.

G1677.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G3056 (λόγος) (in the sense of account); to reckon in, i.e. attribute.

G1678.def: of Hebrew origin (perhaps for H0486); Elmodam, an Israelite.

G1679.def: from G1680 (ἐλπίς); to expect or confide.

G1680.def: from a primary ἔλπω (to anticipate, usually with pleasure); expectation (abstractly or concretely) or confidence.

G1681.def: of foreign origin; Elymas, a wizard.

G1682.def: of Chaldean origin (H0426 with pronominal suffix) my God.

G1683.def: genitive case compound of G1700 (ἐμοῦ) and G846 (αὐτός); of myself so likewise the dative case , and accusative case.

G1684.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to walk on, i.e. embark (aboard a vessel), reach (a pool)
G1684.kjv: come (get) into, enter (into), go (up) into, step in, take ship

G1685.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw on, i.e. (figuratively) subject to (eternal punishment)

G1686.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G911 (βάπτω); to whelm on, i.e. wet (a part of the person, etc.) by contact with a fluid.

G1687.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and a presumed derivative of the base of G939 (βάσις); equivalent to G1684 (ἐμβαίνω); to intrude on (figuratively)

G1688.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and (to mount; causative of G1684 (ἐμβαίνω)); to place on, i.e. transfer (aboard a vessel)

G1689.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G991 (βλέπω); to look on, i.e. (relatively) to observe fixedly, or (absolutely) to discern clearly.
G1689.kjv: behold, gaze up, look upon, (could) see

G1690.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and (to snort with anger); to have indignation on, i.e. (transitively) to blame, (intransitively) to sigh with chagrin, (specially) to sternly enjoin.

G1691.def: a prolonged form of G3165 (μέ); me.

G1693.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G3105 (μαίνομαι); to rave on, i.e. rage at.

G1694.def: of Hebrew origin (H06005); God with us; Emmanuel, a name of Christ.

G1695.def: probably of Hebrew origin (compare H03222); Emmaus, a place in Palestine.

G1696.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G3306 (μένω); to stay in the same place, i.e. (figuratively) persevere.

G1697.def: of Hebrew origin (H02544); Emmor (i.e. Chamor), a Canaanite.

G1698.def: a prolonged form of G3427 (μοί); to me.

G1699.def: from the oblique cases of G1473 (ἐγώ) (G1698 (ἐμοί), G1700 (ἐμοῦ), G1691 (ἐμέ)); my.

G1700.def: a prolonged form of G3449 (μόχθος); of me.

G1702.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G3815 (παίζω); to jeer at, i.e. deride.

G1703.def: from G1702 (ἐμπαίζω); a derider, i.e. (by implication) a false teacher.

G1704.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G4043 (περιπατέω); to perambulate on a place, i.e. (figuratively) to be occupied among persons.

G1705.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G4118 (πλεῖστος); to fill in (up), i.e. (by implication) to satisfy (literally or figuratively)

G1706.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G4098 (πίπτω); to fall on, i.e. (literally) to be entrapped by, or (figuratively) be overwhelmed with.

G1707.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G4120 (πλέκω); to entwine, i.e. (figuratively) involve with.

G1708.def: from G1707 (ἐμπλέκω); elaborate braiding of the hair.

G1709.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G4154 (πνέω); to inhale, i.e. (figuratively) to be animated by (bent upon)

G1710.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to travel in (a country as a pedlar), i.e. (by implication) to trade.

G1713.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G4198 (πορεύομαι); a (wholesale) tradesman.

G1714.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and (to blow a flame); to enkindle, i.e. set on fire.

G1715.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G4314 (πρός); in front of (in place (literally or figuratively) or time)
G1715.kjv: against, at, before, (in presence, sight) of

G1716.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G4429 (πτύω); to spit at or on.

G1717.def: from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G5316 (φαίνω); apparent in self.

G1718.def: from G1717 (ἐμφανής); to exhibit (in person) or disclose (by words)
G1718.kjv: appear, declare (plainly), inform, (will) manifest, shew, signify

G1719.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5401 (φόβος); in fear, i.e. alarmed.

G1720.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and (to puff) (compare G5453 (φύω)); to blow at or on.

G1721.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of G5453 (φύω); implanted (figuratively)

G1722.def: a primary preposition denoting (fixed) position (in place, time or state), and (by implication) instrumentality.

G1723.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of G43 (ἀγκάλη); to take in one's arms, i.e. embrace.

G1724.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G251 (ἅλς); in the sea, i.e. marine.

G1725.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G473 (ἀντί); in front (i.e. figuratively, presence) of.

G1726.def: neuter of G1727 (ἐναντίος); (adverbially) in the presence (view) of.

G1728.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G756 (ἄρχομαι); to commence on.

G1729.def: from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G1210 (δέω) (in the sense of lacking); deficient in.

G1731.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G1166 (δεικνύω); to indicate (by word or act)

G1733.def: from (the neuter of) G1520 (εἷς) and G1176 (δέκα); one and ten, i.e. eleven.

G1735.def: third person singular present of a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G1209 (δέχομαι); (impersonally) it is accepted in, i.e. admitted (possible)

G1736.def: from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G1218 (δῆμος); to be in one's own country, i.e. home (figuratively)

G1737.def: a prolonged form of G1746 (ἐνδύω); to invest (with a garment)

G1738.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G1349 (δίκη); in the right, i.e. equitable.

G1739.def: from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of the base of G1218 (δῆμος); a housing in (residence), i.e. structure.

G1741.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G1391 (δόξα); in glory, i.e. splendid, (figuratively) noble.

G1742.def: from G1746 (ἐνδύω); apparel (especially the outer robe)

G1743.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G1412 (δυναμόω); to empower.

G1744.def: from G1772 (ἔννομος) and G1416 (δύνω); to sink (by implication, wrap (compare G1746 (ἐνδύω)) on, i.e. (figuratively) sneak.

G1746.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G1416 (δύνω) (in the sense of sinking into a garment); to invest with clothing (literally or figuratively)

G1747.def: feminine from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος); an ambuscade, i.e. (figuratively) murderous purpose.

G1748.def: from G1747 (ἐνέδρα); to lurk, i.e. (figuratively) plot assassination.

G1749.def: neuter of the same as G1747 (ἐνέδρα); an ambush, i.e. (figuratively) murderous design.

G1750.def: from G1772 (ἔννομος) and the base of G1507 (εἱλίσσω); to enwrap.

G1751.def: from G1772 (ἔννομος) and G1510 (εἰμί); to be within (neuter participle plural)

G1752.def: of uncertain affinity; on account of.
G1752.kjv: because, for (cause, sake), (where-)fore, by reason of, that

G1754.def: from G1756 (ἐνεργής); to be active, efficient.
G1754.kjv: do, (be) effectual (fervent), be mighty in, shew forth self, work (effectually in)

G1756.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2041 (ἔργον); active, operative.

G1757.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2127 (εὐλογέω); to confer a benefit on.

G1758.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2192 (ἔχω); to hold in or upon, i.e. ensnare; by implication, to keep a grudge.
G1758.kjv: entangle with, have a quarrel against, urge

G1759.def: from a prolonged form of G1722 (ἐν); properly, within, i.e. (of place) here, hither.

G1760.def: from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G2372 (θυμός); to be inspirited, i.e. ponder.

G1762.def: contraction for the third person singular present indicative of G1751 (ἔνειμι); impersonally, there is in or among.

G1763.def: prolongation from a primary (a year); a year.

G1764.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to place on hand, i.e. (reflexively) impend, (participle) be instant.

G1765.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G2480 (ἰσχύω); to invigorate (transitively or reflexively)

G1768.def: from a (tenth) multiple of G1767 (ἐννέα) and G1767 (ἐννέα) itself; ninety-nine.

G1769.def: from G1770 (ἐννεύω); dumb (as making signs), i.e. silent from astonishment.

G1770.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G3506 (νεύω); to nod at, i.e. beckon or communicate by gesture.

G1771.def: from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G3563 (νοῦς); thoughtfulness, i.e. moral understanding.

G1772.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G3551 (νόμος); (subjectively) legal, or (objectively) subject to.

G1773.def: neuter of a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G3571 (νύξ); (adverbially) by night.

G1774.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G3611 (οἰκέω); to inhabit (figuratively)

G1776.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G3791 (ὀχλέω); to crowd in, i.e. (figuratively) to annoy.

G1777.def: from G1758 (ἐνέχω); liable to (a condition, penalty or imputation)
G1777.kjv: in danger of, guilty of, subject to

G1778.def: from G1781 (ἐντέλλομαι); an injunction, i.e. religious precept.

G1779.def: from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G5028 (τάφος); to inswathe with cerements for interment.

G1781.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G5056 (τέλος); to enjoin.

G1782.def: from the same as G1759 (ἐνθάδε); hence (literally or figuratively); (repeated) on both sides.

G1783.def: from G1793 (ἐντυγχάνω); an interview, i.e. (specially) supplication.

G1784.kjv: dear, more honourable, precious, in reputation

G1785.def: from G1781 (ἐντέλλομαι); injunction, i.e. an authoritative prescription.

G1786.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5117 (τόπος); a resident.

G1788.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and the base of G5157 (τροπή); to invert, i.e. (figuratively and reflexively) in a good sense, to respect; or in a bad one, to confound.

G1789.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5142 (τρέφω); (figuratively) to educate.

G1792.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5171 (τρυφάω); to revel in.

G1793.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5177 (τυγχάνω); to chance upon, i.e. (by implication) confer with; by extension to entreat (in favor or against)

G1794.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and (to twist; probably akin to G1507 (εἱλίσσω)); to entwine, i.e. wind up in.

G1795.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of G5179 (τύπος); to enstamp, i.e. engrave.

G1796.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5195 (ὑβρίζω); to insult.

G1797.def: middle voice from G1798 (ἐνύπνιον); to dream.

G1798.def: from G1722 (ἐν) and G5258 (ὕπνος); something seen in sleep, i.e. a dream (vision in a dream)

G1799.def: neuter of a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and a derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); in the face of (literally or figuratively)
G1799.kjv: before, in the presence (sight) of, to

G1800.def: of Hebrew origin (H0583); Enos (i.e. Enosh), a patriarch.

G1801.def: middle voice from a compound of G1722 (ἐν) and G3775 (οὖς); to take in one's ear, i.e. to listen.

G1802.def: of Hebrew origin (H02585); Enoch (i.e. Chanok), an antediluvian.

G1804.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος); to publish, i.e. celebrate.

G1805.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G59 (ἀγοράζω); to buy up, i.e. ransom; figuratively, to rescue from loss (improve opportunity)

G1806.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G71 (ἄγω); to lead forth.

G1807.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G138 (αἱρέομαι); actively, to tear out; middle voice, to select; figuratively, to release.

G1808.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G142 (αἴρω); to remove.

G1809.def: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G154 (αἰτέω); to demand (for trial)

G1810.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the base of G160 (αἰφνίδιος); of a sudden (unexpectedly)

G1811.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G190 (ἀκολουθέω); to follow out, i.e. (figuratively) to imitate, obey, yield to.

G1812.def: plural ordinal from G1803 (ἕξ) and G1540 (ἑκατόν); six hundred.

G1813.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G218 (ἀλείφω); to smear out, i.e. obliterate (erase tears, figuratively, pardon sin)

G1814.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G242 (ἅλλομαι); to spring forth.

G1815.def: from G1817 (ἐξανίστημι); a rising from death.

G1816.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G393 (ἀνατέλλω); to start up out of the ground, i.e. germinate.

G1817.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G450 (ἀνίστημι); objectively, to produce, i.e. (figuratively) beget; subjectively, to arise, i.e. (figuratively) object.

G1818.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G538 (ἀπατάω); to seduce wholly.

G1819.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of the same as G160 (αἰφνίδιος); of a sudden, i.e. unexpectedly.

G1820.def: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G639 (ἀπορέω); to be utterly at a loss, i.e. despond.

G1821.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G649 (ἀποστέλλω); to send away forth, i.e. (on a mission) to despatch, or (peremptorily) to dismiss.

G1822.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of G739 (ἄρτιος); to finish out (time); figuratively, to equip fully (a teacher)

G1823.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G797 (ἀστράπτω); to lighten forth, i.e. (figuratively) to be radiant (of very white garments)

G1824.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and the genitive case singular feminine of G846 (αὐτός) (G5610 (ὥρα) being understood); from that hour, i.e. instantly.
G1824.kjv: by and by, immediately, presently, straightway

G1825.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1453 (ἐγείρω); to rouse fully, i.e. (figuratively) to resuscitate (from death), release (from infliction)

G1826.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and (to go); to issue, i.e. leave (a place), escape (to the shore)

G1827.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1651 (ἐλέγχω); to convict fully, i.e. (by implication) to punish.

G1828.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G1670 (ἑλκύω); to drag forth, i.e. (figuratively) to entice (to sin)

G1829.def: from a comparative of G1537 (ἐκ) and a presumed (to spue); vomit, i.e. food disgorged.

G1830.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2045 (ἐρευνάω); to explore (figuratively)

G1831.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι); to issue (literally or figuratively)
G1831.kjv: come (forth, out), depart (out of), escape, get out, go (abroad, away, forth, out, thence), proceed (forth), spread abroad

G1832.def: third person singular present indicative of a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and G1510 (εἰμί); so also neuter present participle of the same (with or without some form of G1510 (εἰμί) expressed); impersonally, it is right (through the figurative idea of being out in public)

G1833.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and (to examine); to test thoroughly (by questions), i.e. ascertain or interrogate.

G1834.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2233 (ἡγέομαι); to consider out (aloud), i.e. rehearse, unfold.

G1835.def: the tenth multiple of G1803 (ἕξ); sixty.

G1836.def: from G2192 (ἔχω) (in the sense of taking hold of, i.e. adjoining); successive.

G1837.def: middle voice from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2278 (ἠχέω); to "echo" forth, i.e. resound (be generally reported)

G1838.def: from G2192 (ἔχω); habit, i.e. (by implication) practice.

G1839.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to put (stand) out of wits, i.e. astound, or (reflexively) become astounded, insane.
G1839.kjv: amaze, be (make) astonished, be beside self (selves), bewitch, wonder

G1840.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G2480 (ἰσχύω); to have full strength, i.e. be entirely competent.

G1841.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3598 (ὁδός); an exit, i.e. (figuratively) death.

G1842.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3645 (ὀλοθρεύω); to extirpate.

G1843.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3670 (ὁμολογέω); to acknowledge or (by implication, of assent) agree fully.

G1844.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3726 (ὁρκίζω); to exact an oath, i.e. conjure.

G1845.def: from G1844 (ἐξορκίζω); one that binds by an oath (or spell), i.e. (by implication) an "exorcist" (conjurer)

G1846.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and G3736 (ὀρύσσω); to dig out, i.e. (by extension) to extract (an eye), remove (roofing)

G1847.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of the neuter of G3762 (οὐδείς); to make utterly nothing of, i.e. despise.

G1848.def: a variation of G1847 (ἐξουδενόω) and meaning the same.
G1848.kjv: contemptible, despise, least esteemed, set at nought

G1849.def: from G1832 (ἔξεστι) (in the sense of ability); privilege, i.e. (subjectively) force, capacity, competency, freedom, or (objectively) mastery (concretely, magistrate, superhuman, potentate, token of control), delegated influence.
G1849.kjv: authority, jurisdiction, liberty, power, right, strength

G1850.kjv: exercise authority upon, bring under the (have) power of

G1851.def: from a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and G2192 (ἔχω) (meaning to stand out); prominence (figuratively)

G1854.def: adverb from G1537 (ἐκ); out(-side, of doors), literally or figuratively.

G1856.def: from G1537 (ἐκ) and (to push); to expel; by implication, to propel.

G1858.def: from G1859 (ἑορτή); to observe a festival.

G1860.def: from G1861 (ἐπαγγέλλω); an announcement (for information, assent or pledge; especially a divine assurance of good)

G1861.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος); to announce upon (reflexively), i.e. (by implication) to engage to do something, to assert something respecting oneself.

G1862.def: from G1861 (ἐπαγγέλλω); a self-committal (by assurance of conferring some good)

G1863.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G71 (ἄγω); to superinduce, i.e. inflict (an evil), charge (a crime)

G1864.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G75 (ἀγωνίζομαι); to struggle for.

G1865.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and (to assemble); to accumulate.

G1866.def: from G1867 (ἐπαινέω); praised; Epænetus, a Christian.

G1867.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G134 (αἰνέω); to applaud.

G1868.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G134 (αἰνέω); laudation; concretely, a commendable thing.

G1869.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G142 (αἴρω); to raise up (literally or figuratively)

G1870.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G153 (αἰσχύνομαι); to feel shame for something.

G1871.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G154 (αἰτέω); to ask for.

G1872.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G190 (ἀκολουθέω); to accompany.

G1873.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G191 (ἀκούω); to hearken (favorably) to.

G1874.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G202 (ἀκροατής); to listen (intently) to.

G1875.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G302 (ἄν); a particle of indefinite contemporaneousness; whenever, as soon as.

G1876.def: neuter of a presumed compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G318 (ἀνάγκη); (adverbially) on necessity, i.e. necessarily.

G1877.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G321 (ἀνάγω); to lead up on, i.e. (technical) to put out (to sea); (intransitively) to return.

G1878.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G363 (ἀναμιμνήσκω); to remind of.

G1879.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G373 (ἀναπαύω); to settle on; literally (remain) or figuratively (rely)

G1880.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G424 (ἀνέρχομαι); to come up on, i.e. return.

G1881.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G450 (ἀνίστημι); to stand up on, i.e. (figuratively) to attack.

G1882.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G461 (ἀνορθόω); a straightening up again, i.e. (figuratively) rectification (reformation)

G1883.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G507 (ἄνω); up above, i.e. over or on (of place, amount, rank, etc.)

G1884.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G714 (ἀρκέω); to avail for, i.e. help.

G1885.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G757 (ἄρχω) (meaning a governor of a district, "eparch"); a special region of government, i.e. a Roman præfecture.

G1886.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and an equivalent of G833 (αὐλή); a hut over the head, i.e. a dwelling.

G1887.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G839 (αὔριον); occurring on the succeeding day, i.e. (G2250 (ἡμέρα) being implied) to-morrow.

G1888.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G846 (αὐτός) and (the dative case singular of) a derivative of (a thief); in theft itself, i.e. (by analogy) in actual crime.

G1889.def: contracted from G1891 (Ἐπαφρόδιτος); Epaphras, a Christian.

G1890.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G875 (ἀφρίζω); to foam upon, i.e. (figuratively) to exhibit (a vile passion)

G1891.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) (in the sense of devoted to) and (Venus); Epaphroditus, a Christian.

G1892.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1453 (ἐγείρω); to rouse upon, i.e. (figuratively) to excite against.

G1893.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1487 (εἰ); thereupon, i.e. since (of time or cause)
G1893.kjv: because, else, for that (then, -asmuch as), otherwise, seeing that, since, when

G1894.def: from G1893 (ἐπεί) and G1211 (δή); since now, i.e. (of time) when, or (of cause) whereas.
G1894.kjv: after that, because, for (that, -asmuch as), seeing, since

G1895.def: from G1894 (ἐπειδή) and G4007 (περ); since indeed (of cause)

G1896.def: and other moods and persons of the same tense; from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1492 (εἴδω); to regard (favorably or otherwise)

G1897.def: from G1893 (ἐπεί) and G4007 (περ); since indeed (of cause)

G1898.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G1521 (εἰσάγω); a superintroduction.

G1900.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and (the accusative case plural neuter of) G1565 (ἐκεῖνος); upon those parts of, i.e. on the further side of.

G1901.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1614 (ἐκτείνω); to stretch (oneself) forward upon.

G1902.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1746 (ἐνδύω); to invest upon oneself.

G1903.def: from G1902 (ἐπενδύομαι); a wrapper, i.e. outer garment.

G1904.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι); to supervene, i.e. arrive, occur, impend, attack, (figuratively) influence.

G1905.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2065 (ἐρωτάω); to ask for, i.e. inquire, seek.

G1907.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2192 (ἔχω); to hold upon, i.e. (by implication) to retain; (by extension) to detain; (with implication, of G3563 (νοῦς)) to pay attention to.
G1907.kjv: give (take) heed unto, hold forth, mark, stay

G1908.def: from a comparative of G1909 (ἐπί) and (probably) (threats); to insult, slander.

G1909.def: a primary preposition; properly, meaning superimposition (of time, place, order, etc.), as a relation of distribution (with the genitive case), i.e. over, upon, etc.; of rest (with the dative case) at, on, etc.; of direction (with the accusative case) towards, upon, etc.
G1909.kjv: about (the times), above, after, against, among, as long as (touching), at, beside, X have charge of, (be-, (where-))fore, in (a place, as much as, the time of, -to), (because) of, (up-)on (behalf of), over, (by, for) the space of, through(-out), (un-)to(-ward), with

G1910.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to walk upon, i.e. mount, ascend, embark, arrive.
G1910.kjv: come (into), enter into, go abroad, sit upon, take ship

G1911.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw upon (literal or figurative, transitive or reflexive; usually with more or less force); specially (with G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ) implied) to reflect; impersonally, to belong to.
G1911.kjv: beat into, cast (up-)on, fall, lay (on), put (unto), stretch forth, think on

G1912.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G916 (βαρέω); to be heavy upon, i.e. (pecuniarily) to be expensive to; figuratively, to be severe towards.

G1913.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a reduplicated derivative of the base of G939 (βάσις) (compare G307 (ἀναβιβάζω)); to cause to mount (an animal)

G1914.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G991 (βλέπω); to gaze at (with favor, pity or partiality)
G1914.kjv: look upon, regard, have respect to

G1916.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G994 (βοάω); to exclaim against.

G1917.def: from a presumed compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G1014 (βούλομαι); a plan against someone, i.e. a plot.

G1918.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G1062 (γάμος); to form affinity with, i.e. (specially) in a levirate way.

G1919.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1093 (γῆ); worldly (physically or morally)

G1920.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1096 (γίνομαι); to arrive upon, i.e. spring up (as a wind)

G1921.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1097 (γινώσκω); to know upon some mark, i.e. recognize; by implication, to become fully acquainted with, to acknowledge.

G1922.def: from G1921 (ἐπιγινώσκω); recognition, i.e. (by implication) full discernment, acknowledgement.

G1924.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1125 (γράφω); to inscribe (physically or mentally)

G1925.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1166 (δεικνύω); to exhibit (physically or mentally)

G1926.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1209 (δέχομαι); to admit (as a guest or (figuratively) teacher)

G1927.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G1218 (δῆμος); to make oneself at home, i.e. (by extension) to reside (in a foreign country)

G1928.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1299 (διατάσσω); to appoint besides, i.e. supplement (as a codicil)

G1929.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to give over (by hand or surrender)
G1929.kjv: deliver unto, give, let (+ (her drive)), offer

G1930.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G3717 (ὀρθός); to straighten further, i.e. (figuratively) arrange additionally.

G1931.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1416 (δύνω); to set fully (as the sun)

G1932.def: from G1933 (ἐπιεικής); suitableness, i.e. (by implication) equity, mildness.

G1933.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G1503 (εἴκω); appropriate, i.e. (by implication) mild.

G1934.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2212 (ζητέω); to search (inquire) for; intensively, to demand, to crave.

G1935.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2288 (θάνατος); doomed to death.

G1936.def: from G2007 (ἐπιτίθημι); an imposition (of hands officially)

G1937.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2372 (θυμός); to set the heart upon, i.e. long for (rightfully or otherwise)

G1939.def: from G1937 (ἐπιθυμέω); a longing (especially for what is forbidden)

G1940.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2523 (καθίζω); to seat upon.

G1941.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2564 (καλέω); to entitle; by implication, to invoke (for aid, worship, testimony, decision, etc.)

G1942.def: from G1943 (ἐπικαλύπτω); a covering, i.e. (figuratively) pretext.

G1943.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2572 (καλύπτω); to conceal, i.e. (figuratively) forgive.

G1944.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G2672 (καταράομαι); imprecated, i.e. execrable.

G1945.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2749 (κεῖμαι); to rest upon (literally or figuratively)
G1945.kjv: impose, be instant, (be) laid (there-, up-)on, (when) lay (on), lie (on), press upon

G1946.def: from (compare G1947 (ἐπικουρία)) (a noted philosopher); an Epicurean or follower of Epicurus.

G1947.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and a (prolonged) form of the base of G2877 (κοράσιον) (in the sense of servant); assistance.

G1948.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2919 (κρίνω); to adjudge.

G1949.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to seize (for help, injury, attainment, or any other purpose; literally or figuratively)
G1949.kjv: catch, lay hold (up-)on, take (by, hold of, on)

G1950.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2990 (λανθάνω); to lose out of mind; by implication, to neglect.

G1951.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3004 (λέγω); to surname, select.

G1952.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3007 (λείπω); to leave upon, i.e. (figuratively) to be insufficient for.

G1953.def: from a derivative of G1950 (ἐπιλανθάνομαι); negligence.

G1954.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3062 (λοιποί); left over, i.e. remaining.

G1956.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3089 (λύω); to solve further, i.e. (figuratively) to explain, decide.

G1957.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3140 (μαρτυρέω); to attest further, i.e. corroborate.

G1958.def: from G1959 (ἐπιμελέομαι); carefulness, i.e. kind attention (hospitality)

G1959.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and the same as G3199 (μέλω); to care for (physically or otherwise)

G1960.def: adverb from a derivative of G1959 (ἐπιμελέομαι); carefully.

G1961.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3306 (μένω); to stay over, i.e. remain (figuratively, persevere)

G1962.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3506 (νεύω); to nod at, i.e. (by implication) to assent.

G1963.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3563 (νοῦς); attention of the mind, i.e. (by implication) purpose.

G1965.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3727 (ὅρκος); on oath, i.e. (falsely) a forswearer.

G1966.def: feminine singular participle of a comparative of G1909 (ἐπί) and (to go); supervening, i.e. (G2250 (ἡμέρα) or G3571 (νύξ) being expressed or implied) the ensuing day or night.
