G1967.def: perhaps from the same as G1966 (ἐπιοῦσα); tomorrow's; but more probably from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of the present participle feminine of G1510 (εἰμί); for subsistence, i.e. needful.

G1968.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4098 (πίπτω); to embrace (with affection) or seize (with more or less violence; literally or figuratively)
G1968.kjv: fall into (on, upon) lie on, press upon

G1969.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4141 (πλήσσω); to chastise, i.e. (with words) to upbraid.

G1970.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4155 (πνίγω); to throttle upon, i.e. (figuratively) overgrow.

G1971.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and potheo (to yearn); to dote upon, i.e. intensely crave possession (lawfully or wrongfully)

G1973.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of the latter part of G1971 (ἐπιποθέω); yearned upon, i.e. greatly loved.

G1975.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to journey further, i.e. travel on (reach)

G1976.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G4476 (ῥαφίς); to stitch upon, i.e. fasten with the needle.

G1977.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4496 (ῥίπτω); to throw upon (literally or figuratively)

G1978.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and some form of the base of G4591 (σημαίνω); remarkable, i.e. (figuratively) eminent.

G1979.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G4621 (σῖτος); a provisioning, i.e. (concretely) food.

G1980.def: middle voice from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G4649 (σκοπός); to inspect, i.e. (by implication) to select; by extension, to go to see, relieve.

G1981.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4637 (σκηνόω); to tent upon, i.e. (figuratively) abide with.

G1982.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G4639 (σκιά); to cast a shade upon, i.e. (by analogy) to envelop in a haze of brilliancy; figuratively, to invest with preternatural influence.

G1983.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4648 (σκοπέω); to oversee; by implication, to beware.

G1984.def: from G1980 (ἐπισκέπτομαι); inspection (for relief); by implication, superintendence; specially, the Christian "episcopate".
G1984.kjv: the office of a "bishop", bishoprick, visitation

G1985.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4649 (σκοπός) (in the sense of G1983 (ἐπισκοπέω)); a superintendent, i.e. Christian officer in genitive case charge of a (or the) church (literally or figuratively)

G1986.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4685 (σπάω); to draw over, i.e. (with G203 (ἀκροβυστία) implied) efface the mark of circumcision (by recovering with the foreskin)

G1987.def: apparently a middle voice of G2186 (ἐφίστημι) (with G3563 (νοῦς) implied); to put the mind upon, i.e. comprehend, or be acquainted with.

G1988.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a presumed derivative of G2476 (ἵστημι); an appointee over, i.e. commander (teacher)

G1989.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4724 (στέλλω); to enjoin (by writing), i.e. (genitive case) to communicate by letter (for any purpose)

G1991.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4741 (στηρίζω); to support further, i.e. reestablish.

G1993.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4750 (στόμα); to put something over the mouth, i.e. (figuratively) to silence.

G1994.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4762 (στρέφω); to revert (literally, figuratively or morally)

G1995.def: from G1994 (ἐπιστρέφω); reversion, i.e. morally, revolution.

G1996.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4863 (συνάγω); to collect upon the same place.

G1997.def: from G1996 (ἐπισυνάγω); a complete collection; especially a Christian meeting (for worship)

G1998.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4936 (συντρέχω); to hasten together upon one place (or a particular occasion)

G1999.def: from the middle voice of a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G4921 (συνιστάω); a conspiracy, i.e. concourse (riotous or friendly)
G1999.kjv: that which cometh upon, + raising up

G2000.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and (to trip); figuratively, insecure.

G2001.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2480 (ἰσχύω); to avail further, i.e. (figuratively) insist stoutly.

G2002.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G4987 (σωρεύω); to accumulate further, i.e. (figuratively) seek additionally.

G2003.def: from G2004 (ἐπιτάσσω); an injunction or decree; by implication, authoritativeness.

G2004.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5021 (τάσσω); to arrange upon, i.e. order.

G2005.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5055 (τελέω); to fulfill further (or completely), i.e. execute; by implication, to terminate, undergo.

G2007.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5087 (τίθημι); to impose (in a friendly or hostile sense)
G2007.kjv: add unto, lade, lay upon, put (up) on, set on (up), + surname, X wound

G2008.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5091 (τιμάω); to tax upon, i.e. censure or admonish; by implication, forbid.

G2009.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G5092 (τιμή); properly, esteem, i.e. citizenship; used (in the sense of G2008 (ἐπιτιμάω)) of a penalty.

G2010.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and the base of G5157 (τροπή); to turn over (transfer), i.e. allow.
G2010.kjv: give leave (liberty, license), let, permit, suffer

G2011.def: from G2010 (ἐπιτρέπω); permission, i.e. (by implication) full power.

G2012.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5158 (τρόπος) (in the sense of G2011 (ἐπιτροπή)); a commissioner, i.e. domestic manager, guardian.

G2013.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5177 (τυγχάνω); to chance upon, i.e. (by implication) to attain.

G2014.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5316 (φαίνω); to shine upon, i.e. become (literally) visible or (figuratively) known.

G2015.def: from G2016 (ἐπιφανής); a manifestation, i.e. (specially) the advent of Christ (past or future)

G2017.def: a form of G2014 (ἐπιφαίνω); to illuminate (figuratively)

G2018.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5342 (φέρω); to bear upon (or further), i.e. adduce (personally or judicially (accuse, inflict)), superinduce.

G2019.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5455 (φωνέω); to call at something, i.e. exclaim.

G2020.def: a form of G2017 (ἐπιφαύω); to begin to grow light.
G2020.kjv: begin to dawn, X draw on

G2021.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5495 (χείρ); to put the hand upon, i.e. undertake.

G2023.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5524 (χορηγέω); to furnish besides, i.e. fully supply, (figuratively) aid or contribute.

G2025.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G5548 (χρίω); to smear over.

G2026.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3618 (οἰκοδομέω); to build upon, i.e. (figuratively) to rear up.

G2027.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and (to urge); to drive upon the shore, i.e. to beach a vessel.

G2028.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3687 (ὀνομάζω); to name further, i.e. denominate.

G2029.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); to inspect, i.e. watch.

G2030.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a presumed derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); a looker-on.

G2032.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G3772 (οὐρανός); above the sky.

G2035.def: from G2034 (ἑπτάκις) and G5507 (χίλιοι); seven times a thousand.

G2036.def: a primary verb (used only in the definite past tense, the others being borrowed from G2046 (ἐρέω), G4483 (ῥέω), and G5346 (φημί)); to speak or say (by word or writing)
G2036.kjv: answer, bid, bring word, call, command, grant, say (on), speak, tell

G2037.def: from (to love); beloved; Erastus, a Christian.

G2038.def: middle voice from G2041 (ἔργον); to toil (as a task, occupation, etc.), (by implication) effect, be engaged in or with, etc.
G2038.kjv: commit, do, labor for, minister about, trade (by), work

G2039.def: from G2040 (ἐργάτης); occupation; by implication, profit, pains.

G2040.def: from G2041 (ἔργον); a toiler; figuratively, a teacher.

G2041.def: from a primary (but obsolete) (to work); toil (as an effort or occupation); by implication, an act.

G2042.def: from a presumed prolonged form of G2054 (ἔρις); to stimulate (especially to anger)

G2043.def: of obscure affinity; to prop, i.e. (reflexively) get fast.

G2044.def: of uncertain affinity; to belch, i.e. (figuratively) to speak out.

G2045.def: apparently from G2046 (ἐρέω) (through the idea of inquiry); to seek, i.e. (figuratively) to investigate.

G2046.def: probably a fuller form of G4483 (ῥέω); an alternate for G2036 (ἔπω) in certain tenses; to utter, i.e. speak or say.

G2048.def: of uncertain affinity; lonesome, i.e. (by implication) waste (usually as a noun, G5561 (χώρα) being implied)

G2049.def: from G2048 (ἔρημος); to lay waste (literally or figuratively)
G2049.kjv: (bring to, make) desolate(-ion), come to nought

G2052.def: perhaps as the same as G2042 (ἐρεθίζω); properly, intrigue, i.e. (by implication) faction.

G2054.def: of uncertain affinity; a quarrel, i.e. (by implication) wrangling.

G2055.def: from G2056 (ἔριφος); a kidling, i.e. (genitive case) goat (symbolically, wicked person)

G2056.def: perhaps from the same as G2053 (ἔριον) (through the idea of hairiness); a kid or (genitive case) goat.

G2057.def: probably from G2060 (Ἑρμῆς); Hermas, a Christian.

G2058.def: from the same as G2059 (ἑρμηνεύω); translation.

G2059.def: from a presumed derivative of G2060 (Ἑρμῆς) (as the god of language); to translate.

G2060.def: perhaps from G2046 (ἐρέω); Hermes, the name of the messenger of the Greek deities; also of a Christian.

G2061.def: from G2060 (Ἑρμῆς) and G1096 (γίνομαι); born of Hermes; Hermogenes, an apostate Christian.

G2062.def: neuter of a derivative of (to creep); a reptile, i.e. (by Hebraism (compare H07431)) a small animal.

G2063.def: of uncertain affinity; red, i.e. (with G2281 (θάλασσα)) the Red Sea.

G2064.def: middle voice of a primary verb (used only in the present and imperfect tenses, the others being supplied by a kindred (middle voice) , or (active) , which do not otherwise occur); to come or go (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
G2064.kjv: accompany, appear, bring, come, enter, fall out, go, grow, X light, X next, pass, resort, be set

G2065.def: apparently from G2046 (ἐρέω) (compare G2045 (ἐρευνάω)); to interrogate; by implication, to request.

G2067.def: from a derivative of G2066 (ἐσθής); clothing (concretely)

G2068.def: strengthened for a primary (to eat); used only in certain tenses, the rest being supplied by G5315 (φάγω); to eat (usually literal)

G2069.def: of Hebrew origin (probably for H0454); Esli, an Israelite.

G2070.def: first person plural indicative of G1510 (εἰμί); we are.
G2070.kjv: are, be, have our being, X have hope, + (the gospel) was (preached unto) us

G2071.kjv: shall (should) be (have), (shall) come (to pass), X may have, X fall, what would follow, X live long, X sojourn

G2072.def: from G1519 (εἰς) and a presumed derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); a mirror (for looking into)

G2073.def: feminine of an adjective hesperos (evening); the eve (G5610 (ὥρα) being implied)

G2074.def: of Hebrew origin (H02696); Esrom (i.e. Chetsron), an Israelite.

G2075.def: second person plural present indicative of G1510 (εἰμί); ye are.

G2076.def: third person singular present indicative of G1510 (εἰμί); he (she or it) is; also (with neuter plural) they are.
G2076.kjv: are, be(-long), call, X can(-not), come, consisteth, X dure for a while, + follow, X have, (that) is (to say), make, meaneth, X must needs, + profit, + remaineth, + wrestle

G2077.def: second person singular present imperative of G1510 (εἰμί); be thou; also , third person of the same; let them be.

G2078.def: a superlative probably from G2192 (ἔχω) (in the sense of contiguity); farthest, final (of place or time)
G2078.kjv: ends of, last, latter end, lowest, uttermost

G2079.def: adverb from G2078 (ἔσχατος); finally, i.e. (with G2192 (ἔχω)) at the extremity of life.

G2080.def: from G1519 (εἰς); inside (as preposition or adjective)

G2081.def: from G2080 (ἔσω); from inside; also used as equivalent to G2080 (ἔσω) (inside)

G2084.def: from G2087 (ἕτερος) and G1100 (γλῶσσα); other- tongued, i.e. a foreigner.

G2085.def: from G2087 (ἕτερος) and G1320 (διδάσκαλος); to instruct differently.

G2086.def: from a compound of G2087 (ἕτερος) and G2218 (ζυγός); to yoke up differently, i.e. (figuratively) to associate discordantly.

G2087.def: of uncertain affinity; (an-, the) other or different.
G2087.kjv: altered, else, next (day), one, (an-)other, some, strange

G2089.def: perhaps akin to G2094 (ἔτος); "yet," still (of time or degree)
G2089.kjv: after that, also, ever, (any) further, (t-)henceforth (more), hereafter, (any) longer, (any) more(-one), now, still, yet

G2092.def: from an old noun (fitness); adjusted, i.e. ready.

G2094.def: apparently a primary word; a year.

G2096.def: of Hebrew origin (H02332); Eua (or Eva, i.e. Chavvah), the first woman.

G2097.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G32 (ἄγγελος); to announce good news ("evangelize") especially the gospel.
G2097.kjv: declare, bring (declare, show) glad (good) tidings, preach (the gospel)

G2098.def: from the same as G2097 (εὐαγγελίζω); a good message, i.e. the gospel.

G2099.def: from G2097 (εὐαγγελίζω); a preacher of the gospel.

G2101.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G701 (ἀρεστός); fully agreeable.

G2103.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G1014 (βούλομαι); good-willer; Eubulus, a Christian.

G2104.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G1096 (γίνομαι); well born, i.e. (literally) high in rank, or (figuratively) generous.

G2105.def: feminine from G2095 (εὖ) and the alternate of G2203 (Ζεύς) (as the god of the weather); a clear sky, i.e. fine weather.

G2106.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G1380 (δοκέω); to think well of, i.e. approve (an act); specially, to approbate (a person or thing)
G2106.kjv: think good, (be well) please(-d), be the good (have, take) pleasure, be willing

G2107.def: from a presumed compound of G2095 (εὖ) and the base of G1380 (δοκέω); satisfaction, i.e. (subjectively) delight, or (objectively) kindness, wish, purpose.
G2107.kjv: desire, good pleasure (will), X seem good

G2108.def: from G2110 (εὐεργέτης); beneficence (genitive case or specially)

G2110.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and the base of G2041 (ἔργον); a worker of good, i.e. (specially) a philanthropist.

G2111.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι); well placed, i.e. (figuratively) appropriate.

G2112.def: adverb from G2117 (εὐθύς); directly, i.e. at once or soon.
G2112.kjv: anon, as soon as, forthwith, immediately, shortly, straightway

G2113.def: from G2117 (εὐθύς) and G1408 (δρόμος); to lay a straight course, i.e. sail direct.

G2114.def: from G2115 (εὔθυμος); to cheer up, i.e. (intransitively) be cheerful; neuter comparative (adverbially) more cheerfully.

G2115.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G2372 (θυμός); in fine spirits, i.e. cheerful.
G2115.kjv: of good cheer, the more cheerfully

G2116.def: from G2117 (εὐθύς); to straighten (level); technically, to steer.

G2117.def: perhaps from G2095 (εὖ) and G5087 (τίθημι); straight, i.e. (literally) level, or (figuratively) true; adverbially (of time) at once.
G2117.kjv: anon, by and by, forthwith, immediately, straightway

G2119.def: from G2121 (εὔκαιρος); to have good time, i.e. opportunity or leisure.

G2121.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G2540 (καιρός); well-timed, i.e. opportune.

G2123.def: comparative of a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G2873 (κόπος); better for toil, i.e. more facile.

G2124.def: from G2126 (εὐλαβής); properly, caution, i.e. (religiously) reverence (piety); by implication, dread (concretely)

G2125.def: middle voice from G2126 (εὐλαβής); to be circumspect, i.e. (by implication) to be apprehensive; religiously, to reverence.

G2126.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); taking well (carefully), i.e. circumspect (religiously, pious)

G2127.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G3056 (λόγος); to speak well of, i.e. (religiously) to bless (thank or invoke a benediction upon, prosper)

G2129.def: from the same as G2127 (εὐλογέω); fine speaking, i.e. elegance of language; commendation ("eulogy"), i.e. (reverentially) adoration; religiously, benediction; by implication, consecration; by extension, benefit or largess.
G2129.kjv: blessing (a matter of) bounty (X -tifully), fair speech

G2130.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and a presumed derivative of G3330 (μεταδίδωμι); good at imparting, i.e. liberal.

G2131.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G3529 (νίκη); victorious; Eunice, a Jewess.

G2132.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G3563 (νοῦς); to be well- minded, i.e. reconcile.

G2133.def: from the same as G2132 (εὐνοέω); kindness; euphemistically, conjugal duty.

G2134.def: from G2135 (εὐνοῦχος); to castrate (figuratively, live unmarried)

G2135.def: from (a bed) and G2192 (ἔχω); a castrated person (such being employed in Oriental bed-chambers); by extension an impotent or unmarried man; by implication, a chamberlain (state-officer)

G2136.def: from the same as G2137 (εὐοδόω); fine travelling; Euodia, a Christian woman.

G2137.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G3598 (ὁδός); to help on the road, i.e. (passively) succeed in reaching; figuratively, to succeed in business affairs.

G2138.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G3982 (πείθω); good for persuasion, i.e. (intransitively) complaint.

G2139.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of a presumed compound of G4012 (περί) and G2476 (ἵστημι); well standing around, i.e. (a competitor) thwarting (a racer) in every direction (figuratively, of sin in genitive case)

G2140.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G4160 (ποιέω); well-doing, i.e. beneficence.

G2141.def: from a compound of G2090 (ἑτοιμάζω) and the base of G4197 (πορεία); (intransitively) to be good for passing through, i.e. (figuratively) have pecuniary means.

G2142.def: from the same as G2141 (εὐπορέω); pecuniary resources.

G2143.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G4241 (πρέπω); good suitableness, i.e. gracefulness.

G2144.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G4327 (προσδέχομαι); well-received, i.e. approved, favorable.

G2145.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and the same as G4332 (προσεδρεύω); sitting well towards, i.e. (figuratively) assiduous (neuter, diligent service)

G2146.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G4383 (πρόσωπον); to be of good countenance, i.e. (figuratively) to make a display.

G2147.def: a prolonged form of a primary , which (together with another cognate form) is used for it in all the tenses except the present and imperfect; to find (literally or figuratively)

G2148.def: from (the east wind) and G2830 (κλύδων); a storm from the East (or southeast), i.e. (in modern phrase) a Levanter.

G2150.def: from G2152 (εὐσεβής); piety; specially, the gospel scheme.

G2151.def: from G2152 (εὐσεβής); to be pious, i.e. (towards God) to worship, or (towards parents) to respect (support)

G2152.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G4576 (σέβομαι); well-reverent, i.e. pious.

G2154.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and the base of G4591 (σημαίνω); well indicated, i.e. (figuratively) significant.

G2155.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G4698 (σπλάγχνον); well compassioned, i.e. sympathetic.

G2158.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G4976 (σχῆμα); well-formed, i.e. (figuratively) decorous, noble (in rank)

G2159.def: adverb from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of (to stretch); in a well-strung manner, i.e. (figuratively) intensely (in a good sense, cogently; in a bad one, fiercely)

G2160.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of the base of G5157 (τροπή) (meaning well-turned, i.e. ready at repartee, jocose); witticism, i.e. (in a vulgar sense) ribaldry.

G2161.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G5177 (τυγχάνω); well- fated, i.e. fortunate; Eutychus, a young man.

G2162.def: from G2163 (εὔφημος); good language ("euphemy"), i.e. praise (repute)

G2163.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G5345 (φήμη); well spoken of, i.e. reputable.

G2164.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G5409 (φορέω); to bear well, i.e. be fertile.

G2165.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G5424 (φρήν); to put (middle voice or passively, be) in a good frame of mind, i.e. rejoice.
G2165.kjv: fare, make glad, be (make) merry, rejoice

G2166.def: of foreign origin (compare H06578); Euphrates, a river of Asia.

G2167.def: from the same as G2165 (εὐφραίνω); joyfulness.

G2168.def: from G2170 (εὐχάριστος); to be grateful, i.e. (actively) to express gratitude (towards); specially, to say grace at a meal.

G2169.def: from G2170 (εὐχάριστος); gratitude; actively, grateful language (to God, as an act of worship)

G2170.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G5483 (χαρίζομαι); well favored, i.e. (by implication) grateful.

G2171.def: from G2172 (εὔχομαι); properly, a wish, expressed as a petition to God, or in votive obligation.

G2172.def: middle voice of a primary verb; to wish; by implication, to pray to God.

G2173.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G5543 (χρηστός); easily used, i.e. useful.

G2174.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and G5590 (ψυχή); to be in good spirits, i.e. feel encouraged.

G2175.def: from a compound of G2095 (εὖ) and a derivative of G3605 (ὄζω); good-scentedness, i.e. fragrance.

G2176.def: from G2095 (εὖ) and G3686 (ὄνομα); properly, well-named (good-omened), i.e. the left (which was the lucky side among the pagan Greeks); neuter as adverbial, at the left hand.

G2177.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G242 (ἅλλομαι); to spring upon.

G2178.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G530 (ἅπαξ); upon one occasion (only)

G2179.def: from G2181 (Ἔφεσος); Ephesine, or situated at Ephesus.

G2180.def: from G2181 (Ἔφεσος); an Ephesian or inhabitant of Ephesus.

G2181.def: probably of foreign origin; Ephesus, a city of Asia Minor.

G2182.def: from a compound of G1909 (ἐπί) and G2147 (εὑρίσκω); a discoverer, i.e. contriver.

G2183.def: from G2184 (ἐφήμερος); diurnality, i.e. (specially) the quotidian rotation or class of the Jewish priests' service at the Temple, as distributed by families.

G2184.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2250 (ἡμέρα); for a day ("ephemeral"), i.e. diurnal.

G2185.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and a cognate of G2240 (ἥκω); to arrive upon, i.e. extend to.

G2186.def: from G1909 (ἐπί) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to stand upon, i.e. be present (in various applications, friendly or otherwise, usually literal);.
G2186.kjv: assault, come (in, to, unto, upon), be at hand (instant), present, stand (before, by, over)

G2187.def: of Hebrew origin (H0669 or better H06085); Ephraim, a place in Palestine.

G2189.def: feminine of G2190 (ἐχθρός); hostility; by implication, a reason for opposition.

G2190.def: from a primary (to hate); hateful (passively, odious, or actively, hostile); usually as a noun, an adversary (especially Satan)

G2191.def: of uncertain origin; an adder or other poisonous snake (literally or figuratively)

G2192.def: a primary verb; to hold (used in very various applications, literally or figuratively, direct or remote; such as possession; ability, contiuity, relation, or condition)
G2192.kjv: be (able, X hold, possessed with), accompany, + begin to amend, can(+ -not), X conceive, count, diseased, do + eat, + enjoy, + fear, following, have, hold, keep, + lack, + go to law, lie, + must needs, + of necessity, + need, next, + recover, + reign, + rest, + return, X sick, take for, + tremble, + uncircumcised, use

G2193.def: of uncertain affinity; a conjunction, preposition and adverb of continuance, until (of time and place)
G2193.kjv: even (until, unto), (as) far (as), how long, (un-)til(-l), (hither-, un-, up) to, while(-s)

G2194.def: of Hebrew origin (H02074); Zabulon (i.e. Zebulon), a region of Palestine.

G2195.def: of Hebrew origin (compare H02140); Zacchæus, an Israelite.

G2196.def: of Hebrew origin (H02226); Zara, (i.e. Zerach), an Israelite.

G2197.def: of Hebrew origin (H02148); Zacharias (i.e. Zechariah), the name of two Israelites.

G2198.def: a primary verb; to live (literally or figuratively)

G2199.def: of Hebrew origin (compare H02067); Zebedæus, an Israelite.

G2200.def: from G2204 (ζέω); boiled, i.e. (by implication) calid (figuratively, fervent)

G2201.def: from the same as G2218 (ζυγός); a couple, i.e. a team (of oxen yoked together) or brace (of birds tied together)

G2202.def: feminine of a derivative (at the second stage) from the same as G2218 (ζυγός); a fastening (tiller-rope)

G2203.def: of uncertain affinity; in the oblique cases there is used instead of it a (probably cognate) name , which is otherwise obsolete; Zeus or Dis (among the Latins, Jupiter or Jove), the supreme deity of the Greeks.

G2204.def: a primary verb; to be hot (boil, of liquids; or glow, of solids), i.e. (figuratively) be fervid (earnest)

G2205.def: from G2204 (ζέω); properly, heat, i.e. (figuratively) "zeal" (in a favorable sense, ardor; in an unfavorable one, jealousy, as of a husband (figuratively, of God), or an enemy, malice)
G2205.kjv: emulation, envy(-ing), fervent mind, indignation, jealousy, zeal

G2206.def: from G2205 (ζῆλος); to have warmth of feeling for or against.
G2206.kjv: affect, covet (earnestly), (have) desire, (move with) envy, be jealous over, (be) zealous(-ly affect)

G2208.def: the same as G2207 (ζηλωτής); a Zealot, i.e. (specially) partisan for Jewish political independence.

G2209.def: probably akin to the base of G1150 (δαμάζω) (through the idea of violence); detriment.

G2210.def: from G2209 (ζημία); to injure, i.e. (reflexively or passively) to experience detriment.
G2210.kjv: be cast away, receive damage, lose, suffer loss

G2211.def: probably contracted from a poetic form of G2203 (Ζεύς) and G1435 (δῶρον); Jove-given; Zenas, a Christian.

G2212.def: of uncertain affinity; to seek (literally or figuratively); specially, (by Hebraism) to worship (God), or (in a bad sense) to plot (against life)
G2212.kjv: be (go) about, desire, endeavour, enquire (for), require, (X will) seek (after, for, means)

G2213.def: from G2212 (ζητέω); a search (properly concretely), i.e. (in words) a debate.

G2214.def: from G2212 (ζητέω); a searching (properly, the act), i.e. a dispute or its theme.

G2215.def: of uncertain origin; darnel or false grain.

G2216.def: of Hebrew origin (H02216); Zorobabel (i.e. Zerubbabel), an Israelite.

G2217.def: akin to the base of G3509 (νέφος); gloom (as shrouding like a cloud)

G2218.def: from the root of (to join, especially by a "yoke"); a coupling, i.e. (figuratively) servitude (a law or obligation); also (literally) the beam of the balance (as connecting the scales)

G2219.def: probably from G2204 (ζέω); ferment (as if boiling up)

G2220.def: from G2219 (ζύμη); to cause to ferment.

G2221.def: from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and G64 (ἀγρεύω); to take alive (make a prisoner of war), i.e. (figuratively) to capture or ensnare.

G2223.def: probably akin to the base of G2218 (ζυγός); a belt; by implication, a pocket.

G2224.def: from G2223 (ζώνη); to bind about (especially with a belt)

G2225.def: from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and a derivative of G1096 (γίνομαι); to engender alive, i.e. (by analogy) to rescue (passively, be saved) from death.

G2226.def: neuter of a derivative of G2198 (ζάω); a live thing, i.e. an animal.

G2227.def: from the same as G2226 (ζῶον) and G4160 (ποιέω); to (re-)vitalize (literally or figuratively)

G2228.def: a primary particle of distinction between two connected terms; disjunctive, or; comparative, than.
G2228.kjv: and, but (either), (n-)either, except it be, (n-)or (else), rather, save, than, that, what, yea

G2229.def: an adverb of confirmation; perhaps intensive of G2228 (ἤ); used only (in the New Testament) before G3303 (μέν); assuredly.

G2230.def: from G2232 (ἡγεμών); to act as ruler.

G2231.def: from G2232 (ἡγεμών); government, i.e. (in time) official term.

G2232.def: from G2233 (ἡγέομαι); a leader, i.e. chief person (or figuratively, place) of a province.

G2233.def: middle voice of a (presumed) strengthened form of G71 (ἄγω); to lead, i.e. command (with official authority); figuratively, to deem, i.e. consider.
G2233.kjv: account, (be) chief, count, esteem, governor, judge, have the rule over, suppose, think

G2234.def: adverb from a derivative of the base of G2237 (ἡδονή); sweetly, i.e. (figuratively) with pleasure.

G2235.def: apparently from G2228 (ἤ) (or possibly G2229 (ἦ)) and G1211 (δή); even now.

G2236.def: neuter plural of the superlative of the same as G2234 (ἡδέως); with great pleasure.

G2237.def: from (to please); sensual delight; by implication, desire.

G2238.def: neuter of the compound of the same as G2234 (ἡδέως) and G3744 (ὀσμή); a sweet-scented plant, i.e. mint.

G2239.def: a strengthened form of G1485 (ἔθος); usage, i.e. (plural) moral habits.

G2240.def: a primary verb; to arrive, i.e. be present (literally or figuratively)

G2241.def: of Hebrew origin (H0410 with pronominal suffix); my God.

G2242.def: of Hebrew origin (H05941); Heli (i.e. Eli), an Israelite.

G2243.def: of Hebrew origin (H0452); Helias (i.e. Elijah), an Israelite.

G2244.def: from the same as G2245 (ἡλίκος); maturity (in years or size)

G2245.def: from (a comrade, i.e. one of the same age); as big as, i.e. (interjectively) how much.

G2246.def: from (a ray; perhaps akin to the alternate of G138 (αἱρέομαι)); the sun; by implication, light.

G2247.def: of uncertain affinity; a stud, i.e. spike.

G2248.def: accusative case plural of G1473 (ἐγώ); us.

G2249.def: nominative plural of G1473 (ἐγώ); we (only used when emphatic)

G2250.def: feminine (with G5610 (ὥρα) implied) of a derivative of (to sit; akin to the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος)) meaning tame, i.e. gentle; day, i.e. (literally) the time space between dawn and dark, or the whole 24 hours (but several days were usually reckoned by the Jews as inclusive of the parts of both extremes); figuratively, a period (always defined more or less clearly by the context)
G2250.kjv: age, + alway, (mid-)day (by day, (-ly)), + for ever, judgment, (day) time, while, years

G2252.def: a prolonged form of G2258 (ἦν); I was.

G2253.def: from a presumed compound of the base of G2255 (ἥμισυ) and G2348 (θνήσκω); half dead, i.e. entirely exhausted.

G2254.def: dative case plural of G1473 (ἐγώ); to (or for, with, by) us.

G2255.def: neuter of a derivative from an inseparable prefix akin to G260 (ἅμα) (through the idea of partition involved in connection) and meaning semi-; (as noun) half.

G2256.def: from the base of G2255 (ἥμισυ) and G5610 (ὥρα); a half-hour.

G2257.def: genitive case plural of G1473 (ἐγώ); of (or from) us.

G2258.def: imperfect of G1510 (εἰμί); I (thou, etc.) was (wast or were)
G2258.kjv: + agree, be, X have (+ charge of), hold, use, was(-t), were

G2259.def: of uncertain affinity; at which time.

G2260.def: from G2228 (ἤ) and G4007 (περ); than at all (or than perhaps, than indeed)

G2261.def: probably from G2031 (ἔπος); properly, affable, i.e. mild or kind.

G2262.def: of Hebrew origin (H06147); Er, an Israelite.

G2263.def: perhaps by transposition from G2048 (ἔρημος) (through the idea of stillness); tranquil.

G2264.def: compound of (a "hero") and G1491 (εἶδος); heroic; Herod, the name of four Jewish kings.

G2265.def: plural of a derivative of G2264 (Ἡρώδης); Herodians, i.e. partisans of Herod.

G2266.def: from G2264 (Ἡρώδης); Herodias, a woman of the Heodian family.

G2268.def: of Hebrew origin (H03470); Hesaias (i.e. Jeshajah), an Israelite.

G2269.def: of Hebrew origin (H06215); Esau, an Edomite.

G2270.def: from the same as G2272 (ἡσύχιος); to keep still (intransitively), i.e. refrain from labor, meddlesomeness or speech.
G2270.kjv: cease, hold peace, be quiet, rest

G2271.def: feminine of G2272 (ἡσύχιος); (as noun) stillness, i.e. desistance from bustle or language.

G2272.def: a prolonged form of a compound probably of a derivative of the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος) and perhaps G2192 (ἔχω); properly, keeping one's seat (sedentary), i.e. (by implication) still (undisturbed, undisturbing)

G2273.def: from G2228 (ἤ) and G5104 (τοί); either indeed.

G2274.def: from the same as G2276 (ἥττον); to make worse, i.e. vanquish (literally or figuratively); by implication, to rate lower.

G2275.def: from G2274 (ἡττάω); a deterioration, i.e. (objectively) failure or (subjectively) loss.

G2276.def: neuter of comparative of (slightly) used for that of G2556 (κακός); worse (as noun); by implication, less (as adverb)

G2277.def: third person singular imperative of G1510 (εἰμί); let him (or it) be.

G2278.def: from G2279 (ἦχος); to make a loud noise, i.e. reverberate.

G2279.def: of uncertain affinity; a loud or confused noise ("echo"), i.e. roar; figuratively, a rumor.

G2280.def: of uncertain origin; Thaddæus, one of the Apostles.

G2281.def: probably prolonged from G251 (ἅλς); the sea (genitive case or specially)

G2282.def: probably akin to (to warm); to brood, i.e. (figuratively) to foster.

G2283.def: of Hebrew origin (H08559); Thamar (i.e. Tamar), an Israelitess.

G2284.def: from G2285 (θάμβος); to stupefy (with surprise), i.e. astound.

G2285.def: akin to an obsolete (to dumbfound); stupefaction (by surprise), i.e. astonishment.

G2287.def: from (the feminine form of) G2288 (θάνατος) and G5342 (φέρω); death-bearing, i.e. fatal.

G2288.def: from G2348; (properly, an adjective used as a noun) death (literally or figuratively).

G2289.def: from G2288 (θάνατος) to kill (literally or figuratively)
G2289.kjv: become dead, (cause to be) put to death, kill, mortify

G2290.def: a primary verb; to celebrate funeral rites, i.e. inter.

G2291.def: of Hebrew origin (H08646); Thara (i.e. Terach), the father of Abraham.

G2292.def: another form for G2293 (θαρσέω); to exercise courage.
G2292.kjv: be bold, X boldly, have confidence, be confident

G2295.def: apparently from a form of G2300 (θεάομαι); wonder (properly concrete; but by implication, abstract)

G2296.def: from G2295 (θαῦμα); to wonder; by implication, to admire.
G2296.kjv: admire, have in admiration, marvel, wonder

G2297.def: from G2295 (θαῦμα); wondrous, i.e. (neuter as noun) a miracle.

G2298.def: from G2296 (θαυμάζω); wondered at, i.e. (by implication) wonderful.

G2299.def: feminine of G2316 (θεός); a female deity.

G2300.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb; to look closely at, i.e. (by implication) perceive (literally or figuratively); by extension to visit.

G2301.def: from G2302 (θέατρον); to expose as a spectacle.

G2302.def: from G2300 (θεάομαι); a place for public show ("theatre"), i.e. general audience-room; by implication, a show itself (figuratively)

G2303.def: probably neuter of G2304 (θεῖος) (in its original sense of flashing); sulphur.

G2304.def: from G2316 (θεός); godlike (neuter as noun, divinity)

G2306.def: from G2303 (θεῖον) and 1491; sulphur-like, i.e. sulphurous.

G2307.def: from the prolonged form of G2309 (θέλω); a determination (properly, the thing), i.e. (actively) choice (specially, purpose, decree; abstractly, volition) or (passively) inclination.

G2308.def: from G2309 (θέλω); determination (properly, the act), i.e. option.

G2309.def: apparently strengthened from the alternate form of G138 (αἱρέομαι); to determine (as an active option from subjective impulse; whereas G1014 (βούλομαι) properly denotes rather a passive acquiescence in objective considerations), i.e. choose or prefer (literally or figuratively); by implication, to wish, i.e. be inclined to (sometimes adverbially, gladly); impersonally for the future tense, to be about to; by Hebraism, to delight in.
G2309.kjv: desire, be disposed (forward), intend, list, love, mean, please, have rather, (be) will (have, -ling, - ling(-ly))

G2310.def: from a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι); something put down, i.e. a substruction (of a building, etc.), (literally or figuratively)

G2311.def: from G2310 (θεμέλιος); to lay a basis for, i.e. (literally) erect, or (figuratively) consolidate.

G2312.def: from G2316 (θεός) and G1321 (διδάσκω); divinely instructed.

G2314.def: from G2316 (θεός) and G3164 (μάχομαι); an opponent of deity.

G2315.def: from G2316 (θεός) and a presumed derivative of G4154 (πνέω); divinely breathed in.

G2316.def: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588) the supreme Divinity; figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very.

G2318.def: from G2316 (θεός) and G4576 (σέβομαι); reverent of God, i.e. pious.

G2319.def: from G2316 (θεός) and the base of G4767 (στυγνητός); hateful to God, i.e. impious.

G2321.def: from G2316 (θεός) and G5384 (φίλος); friend of God; Theophilus, a Christian.

G2322.def: from G2323 (θεραπεύω); attendance (specially, medical, i.e. cure); figuratively and collectively, domestics.

G2323.def: from the same as G2324 (θεράπων); to wait upon menially, i.e. (figuratively) to adore (God), or (specially) to relieve (of disease)

G2324.def: apparently a participle from an otherwise obsolete derivative of the base of G2330 (θέρος); a menial attendant (as if cherishing)

G2325.def: from G2330 (θέρος) (in the sense of the crop); to harvest.

G2326.def: from G2325 (θερίζω); reaping, i.e. the crop.

G2329.def: from the base of G2330 (θέρος); warmth.

G2330.def: from a primary (to heat); properly, heat, i.e. summer.

G2331.def: from G2332 (Θεσσαλονίκη); a Thessalonican, i.e. inhabitant of Thessalonice.

G2332.def: from (a Thessalian) and G3529 (νίκη); Thessalonice, a place in Asia Minor.

G2333.def: of uncertain origin; Theudas, an Israelite.

G2334.def: from a derivative of G2300 (θεάομαι) (perhaps by addition of G3708 (ὁράω)); to be a spectator of, i.e. discern, (literally, figuratively (experience) or intensively (acknowledge))
G2334.kjv: behold, consider, look on, perceive, see

G2335.def: from the same as G2334 (θεωρέω); spectatorship, i.e. (concretely) a spectacle.

G2336.def: from G5087 (τίθημι); a receptacle, i.e. scabbard.

G2337.def: from (the nipple); to suckle, (by implication) to suck.

G2338.def: from the same as G2337 (θηλάζω); female.

G2339.def: from (a wild animal, as game); hunting, i.e. (figuratively) destruction.

G2340.def: from G2339 (θήρα); to hunt (an animal), i.e. (figuratively) to carp at.

G2341.def: from a compound of G2342 (θηρίον) and G3164 (μάχομαι); to be a beast-fighter (in the gladiatorial show), i.e. (figuratively) to encounter (furious men)

G2342.def: diminutive from the same as G2339 (θήρα); a dangerous animal.

G2343.def: from G2344 (θησαυρός); to amass or reserve (literally or figuratively)
G2343.kjv: lay up (treasure), (keep) in store, (heap) treasure (together, up)

G2344.def: from G5087 (τίθημι); a deposit, i.e. wealth (literally or figuratively)

G2345.def: a prolonged form of an obsolete primary (to finger); to manipulate, i.e. have to do with; by implication, to injure.

G2346.def: akin to the base of G5147 (τρίβος); to crowd (literally or figuratively)
G2346.kjv: afflict, narrow, throng, suffer tribulation, trouble

G2347.kjv: afflicted(-tion), anguish, burdened, persecution, tribulation, trouble

G2348.def: a strengthened form of a simpler primary (which is used for it only in certain tenses); to die (literally or figuratively)

G2350.def: from G2351 (θόρυβος); to be in tumult, i.e. disturb, clamor.
G2350.kjv: make ado (a noise), trouble self, set on an uproar

G2351.def: from the base of G2360 (θροέω); a disturbance.

G2353.def: from G5142 (τρέφω); stock (as raised on a farm)

G2355.def: from the base of G2360 (θροέω); wailing.

G2356.def: from a derivative of G2357 (θρησκός); ceremonial observance.

G2357.def: probably from the base of G2360 (θροέω); ceremonious in worship (as demonstrative), i.e. pious.

G2358.def: from a prolonged compound of the base of G2360 (θροέω); and a derivative of G680 (ἅπτομαι) (meaning a noisy iambus, sung in honor of Bacchus); to make an acclamatory procession, i.e. (figuratively) to conquer or (by Hebraism) to give victory.

G2359.def: genitive case , etc.; of uncertain derivation; hair.

G2360.def: from to wail; to clamor, i.e. (by implication) to frighten.

G2361.def: perhaps from G5142 (τρέφω) (in the sense of thickening); a clot.

G2362.def: from (to sit); a stately seat ("throne"); by implication, power or (concretely) a potentate.

G2363.def: of uncertain derivation; Thyatira, a place in Asia Minor.

G2364.def: apparently a primary word (compare "daughter"); a female child, or (by Hebraism) descendant (or inhabitant)

G2366.def: from G2380 (θύω) (in the sense of blowing) a storm.

G2367.def: from a derivative of G2380 (θύω) (in the sense of blowing; denoting a certain fragrant tree); made of citron-wood.

G2368.def: from G2370 (θυμιάω); an aroma, i.e. fragrant powder burnt in religious service; by implication, the burning itself.

G2369.def: from a derivative of G2370 (θυμιάω); a place of fumigation, i.e. the alter of incense (in the Temple)

G2370.def: from a derivative of G2380 (θύω) (in the sense of smoking); to fumigate, i.e. offer aromatic fumes.

G2371.def: from a presumed compound of G2372 (θυμός) and G3164 (μάχομαι); to be in a furious fight, i.e. (figuratively) to be exasperated.

G2372.def: from G2380 (θύω); passion (as if breathing hard)

G2373.def: from G2372 (θυμός); to put in a passion, i.e. enrage.

G2374.def: apparently a primary word (compare "door"); a portal or entrance (the opening or the closure, literally or figuratively)

G2375.def: from G2374 (θύρα); a large shield (as door-shaped)

G2376.def: from G2374 (θύρα); an aperture, i.e. window.

G2377.def: from G2374 (θύρα) and (a watcher); a gate- warden.

G2378.def: from G2380 (θύω); sacrifice (the act or the victim, literally or figuratively)

G2379.def: from a derivative of G2378 (θυσία); a place of sacrifice, i.e. an altar (special or genitive case, literal or figurative)

G2380.def: a primary verb; properly, to rush (breathe hard, blow, smoke), i.e. (by implication) to sacrifice (properly, by fire, but genitive case); by extension to immolate (slaughter for any purpose)

G2381.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H08380); the twin; Thomas, a Christian.

G2382.def: of uncertain affinity; the chest ("thorax"), i.e. (by implication) a corslet.

G2383.def: of Hebrew origin (H02971); Jairus (i.e. Jair), an Israelite.

G2384.def: of Hebrew origin (H03290); Jacob (i.e. Ja`akob), the progenitor of the Israelites.

G2385.def: the same as G2384 (Ἰακώβ) Græcized; Jacobus, the name of three Israelites.

G2387.def: of Egyptian origin; Jambres, an Egyptian.

G2388.def: probably of Hebrew origin (compare H03238); Janna, an Israelite.

G2389.def: of Egyptian origin; Jannes, an Egyptian.

G2390.def: middle voice of apparently a primary verb; to cure (literally or figuratively)

G2391.def: of Hebrew origin (H03382); Jared (i.e. Jered), an antediluvian.

G2393.def: probably of foreign origin (see H03471); "jasper", a gem.

G2394.def: future active participle masculine of G2390 (ἰάομαι); about to cure; Jason, a Christian.

G2396.def: second person singular imperative active of G1492 (εἴδω); used as an interjection to denote surprise; lo!.

G2397.def: from G1492 (εἴδω); a sight (comparative figuratively "idea"), i.e. aspect.

G2398.def: of uncertain affinity; pertaining to self, i.e. one's own; by implication, private or separate.
G2398.kjv: X his acquaintance, when they were alone, apart, aside, due, his (own, proper, several), home, (her, our, thine, your) own (business), private(-ly), proper, severally, their (own)

G2399.def: from G2398 (ἴδιος); a private person, i.e. (by implication) an ignoramus (compare "idiot")

G2400.def: second person singular imperative middle voice of G1492 (εἴδω); used as imperative lo!;.

G2401.def: of Hebrew origin (H0123); Idumæa (i.e. Edom), a region East (and South) of Palestine.

G2402.def: a strengthened form of a primary idos (sweat); perspiration.

G2403.def: of Hebrew origin (H0348); Jezabel (i.e. Jezebel), a Tyrian woman (used as a synonym of a termagant or false teacher)

G2404.def: from G2413 (ἱερός) and G4172 (πόλις); holy city; Hierapolis, a place in Asia Minor.

G2405.def: from G2407 (ἱερατεύω); priestliness, i.e. the sacerdotal function.
G2405.kjv: office of the priesthood, priest's office

G2406.def: from G2407 (ἱερατεύω); the priestly fraternity, i.e. sacerdotal order (figuratively)

G2407.def: prolongation from G2409 (ἱερεύς); to be a priest, i.e. perform his functions.

G2408.def: of Hebrew origin (H03414); Hieremias (i.e. Jermijah), an Israelite.

G2409.def: from G2413 (ἱερός); a priest (literally or figuratively)

G2410.def: of Hebrew origin (H03405); Jericho, a place in Palestine.

G2411.def: neuter of G2413 (ἱερός); a sacred place, i.e. the entire precincts (whereas G3485 (ναός) denotes the central sanctuary itself) of the Temple (at Jerusalem or elsewhere)

G2412.def: from G2413 (ἱερός) and the same as G4241 (πρέπω); reverent.

G2414.def: of Hebrew origin (H03389); Hierosolyma (i.e. Jerushalaim), the capitol of Palestine.

G2415.def: from G2414 (Ἱεροσόλυμα); a Hierosolymite, i.e. inhabitant of Hierosolyma.

G2416.def: from G2417 (ἱερόσυλος); to be a temple-robber (figuratively)

G2417.def: from G2411 (ἱερόν) and G4813 (συλάω); a temple-despoiler.

G2418.def: from a compound of G2411 (ἱερόν) and the base of G2041 (ἔργον); to be a temple-worker, i.e. officiate as a priest (figuratively)

G2419.def: of Hebrew origin (H03389); Hierusalem (i.e. Jerushalem), the capitol of Palestine.

G2420.def: from G2413 (ἱερός); sacredness, i.e. (by implication) the priestly office.

G2421.def: of Hebrew origin (H03448); Jessæ (i.e. Jishai), an Israelite.

G2422.def: of Hebrew origin (H03316); Jephthaë (i.e. Jiphtach), an Israelite.

G2423.def: of Hebrew origin (H03204); Jechonias (i.e. Jekonjah), an Israelite.

G2424.def: of Hebrew origin (H3091); Jesus (i.e., Jehoshua), the name of our Lord and two (three) other Israelites.

G2425.def: from ( or , akin to G2240 (ἥκω)) (to arrive); competent (as if coming in season), i.e. ample (in amount) or fit (in character)
G2425.kjv: able, + content, enough, good, great, large, long (while), many, meet, much, security, sore, sufficient, worthy

G2427.def: from G2425 (ἱκανός); to enable, i.e. qualify.

G2428.def: from a derivative of the base of G2425 (ἱκανός) (through the idea of approaching for a favor); intreaty.

G2430.def: perhaps from G1504 (εἰκών); image-like; Iconium, a place in Asia Minor.

G2431.def: from the same as G2436 (ἵλεως); propitious or merry ("hilarious"), i.e. prompt or willing.

G2433.def: middle voice from the same as G2436 (ἵλεως); to conciliate, i.e. (transitively) to atone for (sin), or (intransitively) be propitious.

G2435.def: neuter of a derivative of G2433 (ἱλάσκομαι); an expiatory (place or thing), i.e. (concretely) an atoning victim, or (specially) the lid of the Ark (in the Temple)

G2436.def: perhaps from the alternate form of G138 (αἱρέομαι); cheerful (as attractive), i.e. propitious; adverbially (by Hebraism) God be gracious!, i.e. (in averting some calamity) far be it.

G2437.def: neuter of an adjective from a name of uncertain derivation; (the) Illyrican (shore), i.e. (as a name itself) Illyricum, a region of Europe.

G2438.def: perhaps from the same as G260 (ἅμα); a strap, i.e. (specially) the tie (of a sandal) or the lash (of a scourge)

G2440.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of ennumi (to put on); a dress (inner or outer)
G2440.kjv: apparel, cloke, clothes, garment, raiment, robe, vesture

G2442.def: middle voice from (a yearning; of uncertain affinity); to long for.

G2443.def: probably from the same as the former part of G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ) (through the demonstrative idea; compare G3588 (ὁ)); in order that (denoting the purpose or the result)
G2443.kjv: albeit, because, to the intent (that), lest, so as, (so) that, (for) to

G2444.def: from G2443 (ἵνα) and G5101 (τίς); for what reason ?, i.e. why?.

G2445.def: of Hebrew origin (H03305); Joppe (i.e. Japho), a place in Palestine.

G2446.def: of Hebrew origin (H03383); the Jordanes (i.e. Jarden), a river of Palestine.

G2447.def: perhaps from (to go) or (to send); rust (as if emitted by metals); also venom (as emitted by serpents)

G2448.def: of Hebrew origin (H03063 or perhaps H03194); Judah (i.e. Jehudah or Juttah), a part of (or place in) Palestine.

G2449.def: feminine of G2453 (Ἰουδαῖος) (with G1093 (γῆ) implied); the Judæan land (i.e. Judæa), a region of Palestine.

G2450.def: from G2453 (Ἰουδαῖος); to become a Judæan, i.e. "Judaize".

G2451.def: from G2453 (Ἰουδαῖος); Judaïc, i.e. resembling a Judæan.

G2452.def: adverb from G2451 (Ἰουδαϊκός); Judaïcally or in a manner resembling a Judæan.

G2453.def: from G2448 (Ἰουδά) (in the sense of G2455 (Ἰούδας) as a country); Judæan, i.e. belonging to Jehudah.

G2454.def: from G2450 (Ἰουδαΐζω); "Judaism", i.e. the Jewish faith and usages.

G2455.def: of Hebrew origin (H03063); Judas (i.e. Jehudah), the name of ten Israelites; also of the posterity of one of them and its region.

G2456.def: feminine of the same as G2457 (Ἰούλιος); Julia, a Christian woman.

G2457.def: of Latin origin; Julius, a centurion.

G2458.def: of Latin origin; Junias, a Christian.

G2459.def: of Latin origin ("just"); Justus, the name of three Christian.

G2460.def: from G2462 (ἵππος); an equestrian, i.e. member of a cavalry corps.

G2461.def: neuter of a derivative of G2462 (ἵππος); the cavalry force.

G2463.def: perhaps from G2046 (ἐρέω) (as a symbol of the female messenger of the pagan deities); a rainbow ("iris")

G2464.def: of Hebrew origin (H03327); Isaac (i.e. Jitschak), the son of Abraham.

G2465.def: from G2470 (ἴσος) and G32 (ἄγγελος); like an angel, i.e. angelic.

G2466.def: of Hebrew origin (H03485); Isachar (i.e. Jissaskar), a son of Jacob (figuratively, his descendant)

G2467.def: assumed by some as the base of certain irregular forms of G1492 (εἴδω); to know.

G2468.def: second person imperative present of G1510 (εἰμί); be thou.
G2468.kjv: + agree, be, X give thyself wholly to

G2469.def: of Hebrew origin (probably H0377 and H07149); inhabitant of Kerioth; Iscariotes (i.e. Keriothite), an epithet of Judas the traitor.

G2470.def: probably from G1492 (εἴδω) (through the idea of seeming); similar (in amount and kind)

G2471.def: likeness (in condition or proportion); by implication, equity.

G2472.def: from G2470 (ἴσος) and G5092 (τιμή); of equal value or honor.

G2473.def: from G2470 (ἴσος) and G5590 (ψυχή); of similar spirit.

G2474.def: of Hebrew origin (H03478); Israel (i.e. Jisrael), the adopted name of Jacob, including his descendants (literally or figuratively)

G2475.def: from G2474 (Ἰσραήλ); an "Israelite", i.e. descendant of Israel (literally or figuratively)

G2476.def: a prolonged form of a primary (of the same meaning, and used for it in certain tenses); to stand (transitively or intransitively), used in various applications (literally or figuratively)
G2476.kjv: abide, appoint, bring, continue, covenant, establish, hold up, lay, present, set (up), stanch, stand (by, forth, still, up)

G2477.def: from a derivative of G1492 (εἴδω); to be knowing (learned), i.e. (by implication) to visit for information (interview)

G2478.kjv: boisterous, mighty(-ier), powerful, strong(-er, man), valiant

G2479.def: from a derivative of (force; compare , a form of G2192 (ἔχω)); forcefulness (literally or figuratively)

G2480.def: from G2479 (ἰσχύς); to have (or exercise) force (literally or figuratively)
G2480.kjv: be able, avail, can do(-not), could, be good, might, prevail, be of strength, be whole, + much work

G2481.def: adverb from G2470 (ἴσος); likely, i.e. perhaps.

G2482.def: probably of foreign origin; Italia, a region of Europe.

G2483.def: from G2482 (Ἰταλία); Italic, i.e. belonging to Italia.

G2484.def: of Hebrew origin (H03195); Ituræa (i.e. Jetur), a region of Palestine.

G2485.def: diminutive from G2486 (ἰχθύς); a petty fish.

G2487.def: from (to arrive; compare G2240 (ἥκω)); a track (figuratively)

G2488.def: of Hebrew origin (H03147); Joatham (i.e. Jotham), an Israelite.

G2489.def: feminine of the same as G2491 (Ἰωάννης); Joanna, a Christian.

G2490.def: a form of G2491 (Ἰωάννης); Joannas, an Israelite.

G2491.def: of Hebrew origin (H03110); Joannes (i.e. Jochanan), the name of four Israelites.

G2492.def: of Hebrew origin (H0347); Job (i.e. Ijob), a patriarch.

G2493.def: of Hebrew origin (H03100); Joel, an Israelite.

G2494.def: probably for G2491 (Ἰωάννης) or G2495 (Ἰωνᾶς); Jonan, an Israelite.

G2495.def: of Hebrew origin (H03124); Jonas (i.e. Jonah), the name of two Israelites.

G2496.def: of Hebrew origin (H03141); Joram, an Israelite.

G2497.def: perhaps for G2496 (Ἰωράμ); Jorim, an Israelite.

G2498.def: of Hebrew origin (H03092); Josaphat (i.e. Jehoshaphat), an Israelite.

G2499.def: genitive case of G2500 (Ἰωσῆς); Jose, an Israelite.

G2500.def: perhaps for G2501 (Ἰωσήφ); Joses, the name of two Israelites.

G2501.def: of Hebrew origin (H03130); Joseph, the name of seven Israelites.

G2502.def: of Hebrew origin (H02977); Josias (i.e. Joshiah), an Israelite.

G2503.def: of Hebrew origin (the tenth letter of the Hebrew alphabet); "iota", the name of the eighth letter of the Greek alphabet, put (figuratively) for a very small part of anything.

G2504.def: from G2532 (καί) and G1473 (ἐγώ); so also the dative case , and accusative case and (or also, even, etc.) I, (to) me.
G2504.kjv: (and, even, even so, so) I (also, in like wise), both me, me also

G2505.def: from G2596 (κατά) and the neuter plural of G3739 (ὅς); according to which things, i.e. just as.

G2507.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G138 (αἱρέομαι) (including its alternate); to lower (or with violence) demolish (literally or figuratively)

G2508.def: from G2513 (καθαρός); to cleanse, i.e. (specially) to prune; figuratively, to expiate.

G2509.def: from G2505 (καθά) and G4007 (περ); exactly as.

G2510.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G680 (ἅπτομαι); to seize upon.

G2511.def: from G2513 (καθαρός); to cleanse (literally or figuratively)

G2512.def: from G2511 (καθαρίζω); a washing off, i.e. (ceremonially) ablution, (morally) expiation.

G2513.def: of uncertain affinity; clean (literally or figuratively)

G2515.def: from G2596 (κατά) and the same as G1476 (ἑδραῖος); a bench (literally or figuratively)

G2516.def: from G2596 (κατά) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος); to sit down.

G2517.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1836 (ἑξῆς); thereafter, i.e. consecutively; as a noun (by ellipsis of noun) a subsequent person or time.

G2518.def: from G2596 (κατά) and (to sleep); to lie down to rest, i.e. (by implication) to fall asleep (literally or figuratively)

G2519.def: from a compound of G2596 (κατά) and G2233 (ἡγέομαι); a guide, i.e. (figuratively) a teacher.

G2520.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2240 (ἥκω); to reach to, i.e. (neuter of present active participle, figuratively as adjective) becoming.

G2521.def: from G2596 (κατά); and (to sit; akin to the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος)); to sit down; figuratively, to remain, reside.

G2523.def: another (active) form for G2516 (καθέζομαι); to seat down, i.e. set (figuratively, appoint); intransitively, to sit (down); figuratively, to settle (hover, dwell)

G2524.def: from G2596 (κατά); and (to send); to lower.

G2525.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to place down (permanently), i.e. (figuratively) to designate, constitute, convoy.
G2525.kjv: appoint, be, conduct, make, ordain, set

G2526.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3739 (ὅς); according to which thing, i.e. precisely as, in proportion as.

G2527.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3650 (ὅλος); on the whole, i.e. entirely.

G2528.def: from G2596 (κατά); and G3695 (ὁπλίζω); to equip fully with armor.

G2529.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3708 (ὁράω); to behold fully, i.e. (figuratively) distinctly apprehend.

G2530.def: from G2596 (κατά); and G3739 (ὅς) and G5100 (τὶς); according to which certain thing, i.e. as far (or inasmuch) as.

G2531.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5613 (ὡς); just (or inasmuch) as, that.
G2531.kjv: according to, (according, even) as, how, when

G2532.def: apparently, a primary particle, having a copulative and sometimes also a cumulative force; and, also, even, so then, too, etc.; often used in connection (or composition) with other particles or small words.
G2532.kjv: and, also, both, but, even, for, if, or, so, that, then, therefore, when, yet

G2533.def: of Chaldee origin; the dell; Caiaphas (i.e. Cajepha), an Israelite.

G2534.def: from G2532 (καί) and G1065 (γέ); and at least (or even, indeed)

G2535.def: of Hebrew origin (H07014); Cain, (i.e. Cajin), the son of Adam.

G2536.def: of Hebrew origin (H07018); Cainan (i.e. Kenan), the name of two patriarchs.

G2537.def: of uncertain affinity; new (especially in freshness; while G3501 (νέος) is properly so with respect to age.

G2539.def: from G2532 (καί) and G4007 (περ); and indeed, i.e. nevertheless or notwithstanding.

G2540.def: of uncertain affinity; an occasion, i.e. set or proper time.
G2540.kjv: X always, opportunity, (convenient, due) season, (due, short, while) time, a while

G2541.def: of Latin origin; Cæsar, a title of the Roman emperor.

G2542.def: from G2541 (Καῖσαρ); Cæsaria, the name of two places in Palestine.

G2543.def: from G2532 (καί) and G5104 (τοί); and yet, i.e. nevertheless.

G2544.def: from G2543 (καίτοι) and G1065 (γέ); and yet indeed, i.e. although really.

G2545.def: apparently a primary verb; to set on fire, i.e. kindle or (by implication) consume.

G2546.def: from G2532 (καί) and G1563 (ἐκεῖ); likewise in that place.

G2547.def: from G2532 (καί) and G1564 (ἐκεῖθεν); likewise from that place (or time)

G2548.def: from G2532 (καί) and G1565 (ἐκεῖνος); likewise that (or those)
G2548.kjv: and him (other, them), even he, him also, them (also), (and) they

G2549.def: from G2556 (κακός); badness, i.e. (subjectively) depravity, or (actively) malignity, or (passively) trouble.

G2550.def: from a compound of G2556 (κακός) and G2239 (ἦθος); bad character, i.e. (specially) mischievousness.

G2551.def: from a compound of G2556 (κακός) and G3056 (λόγος); to revile.

G2552.def: from a compound of G2256 (ἡμιώριον) and G3806 (πάθος); hardship.

G2553.def: from the same as G2552 (κακοπάθεια); to undergo hardship.
G2553.kjv: be afflicted, endure afflictions (hardness), suffer trouble

G2554.def: from G2555 (κακοποιός); to be a bad-doer, i.e. (objectively) to injure, or (genitive) to sin.

G2555.def: from G2556 (κακός) and G4160 (ποιέω); a bad-doer; (specially), a criminal.

G2556.def: apparently a primary word; worthless (intrinsically, such; whereas G4190 (πονηρός) properly refers to effects), i.e. (subjectively) depraved, or (objectively) injurious.
G2556.kjv: bad, evil, harm, ill, noisome, wicked

G2557.def: from G2556 (κακός) and the base of G2041 (ἔργον); a wrong-doer, i.e. criminal.

G2558.def: from a presumed compound of G2556 (κακός) and G2192 (ἔχω); to maltreat.

G2559.def: from G2556 (κακός); to injure; figuratively, to exasperate.
G2559.kjv: make evil affected, entreat evil, harm, hurt, vex

G2560.kjv: amiss, diseased, evil, grievously, miserably, sick, sore

G2562.def: feminine of G2563 (κάλαμος); a stalk of grain, i.e. (collectively) stubble.

G2563.def: of uncertain affinity; a reed (the plant or its stem, or that of a similar plant); by implication, a pen.

G2564.def: akin to the base of G2753 (κελεύω); to "call" (properly, aloud, but used in a variety of applications, directly or otherwise)

G2565.def: from the base of G2566 (καλλίον) and G1636 (ἐλαία); a cultivated olive tree, i.e. a domesticated or improved one.

G2566.def: neuter of the (irregular) comparative of G2570 (καλός); (adverbially) better than many.

G2567.def: from G2570 (καλός) and G1320 (διδάσκαλος); a teacher of the right.

G2568.def: plural of G2570 (καλός) and G3040 (λιμήν); Good Harbors, i.e. Fairhaven, a bay of Crete.

G2569.def: from G2570 (καλός) and G4160 (ποιέω); to do well, i.e. live virtuously.

G2570.def: of uncertain affinity; properly, beautiful, but chiefly (figuratively) good (literally or morally), i.e. valuable or virtuous (for appearance or use, and thus distinguished from G18 (ἀγαθός), which is properly intrinsic)
G2570.kjv: X better, fair, good(-ly), honest, meet, well, worthy

G2571.def: from G2572 (καλύπτω); a cover, i.e. veil.

G2572.def: akin to G2813 (κλέπτω) and G2928 (κρύπτω); to cover up (literally or figuratively)

G2576.def: from a compound of G2596 (κατά) and the base of G3466 (μυστήριον); to shut down, i.e. close the eyes.

G2577.def: apparently a primary verb; properly, to toil, i.e. (by implication) to tire (figuratively, faint, sicken)

G2578.def: apparently a primary verb; to bend.

G2579.def: from G2532 (καί) and G1437 (ἐάν); and (or even) if.
G2579.kjv: and (also) if (so much as), if but, at the least, though, yet

G2580.def: of Hebrew origin (compare H07071); Cana, a place in Palestine.

G2581.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H07067); zealous; Cananites, an epithet.
G2581.kjv: Canaanite (by mistake for a derivative from G5477 (Χαναάν))

G2582.def: of foreign origin; Candacè, an Egyptian queen.

G2583.def: from (a straight reed, i.e. rod); a rule ("canon"), i.e. (figuratively) a standard (of faith and practice); by implication, a boundary, i.e. (figuratively) a sphere (of activity)

G2584.def: of Hebrew origin (probably H03723 and H05151); Capernaum (i.e. Caphanachum), a place in Palestine.

G2585.def: from (a huckster); to retail, i.e. (by implication) to adulterate (figuratively)

G2587.def: of foreign origin; Cappadocia, a region of Asia Minor.

G2588.def: prolonged from a primary κάρ (Latin cor, 'heart'); the heart, i.e., (figuratively) the thoughts or feelings (mind); also (by analogy) the middle.

G2589.def: from G2588 (καρδία) and G1097 (γινώσκω); a heart-knower.

G2590.def: probably from the base of G726 (ἁρπάζω); fruit (as plucked), literally or figuratively.

G2591.def: perhaps for G2590 (καρπός); Carpus, probably a Christian.

G2592.def: from G2593 (καρποφόρος); to be fertile (literally or figuratively)

G2594.def: from a derivative of G2904 (κράτος) (transposed); to be strong, i.e. (figuratively) steadfast (patient)

G2595.def: from (to wither); a dry twig or straw.

G2596.def: a primary particle; (prepositionally) down (in place or time), in varied relations (according to the case (genitive, dative or accusative) with which it is joined)
G2596.kjv: about, according as (to), after, against, (when they were) X alone, among, and, X apart, (even, like) as (concerning, pertaining to touching), X aside, at, before, beyond, by, to the charge of, (charita-)bly, concerning, + covered, (dai-)ly, down, every, (+ far more) exceeding, X more excellent, for, from … to, godly, in(-asmuch, divers, every, -to, respect of), … by, after the manner of, + by any means, beyond (out of) measure, X mightily, more, X natural, of (up-)on (X part), out (of every), over against, (+ your) X own, + particularly, so, through(-oughout, -oughout every), thus, (un-)to(-gether, -ward), X uttermost, where(-by), with

G2597.def: from G2596 (κατά) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to descend (literally or figuratively)

G2598.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw down.

G2599.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G916 (βαρέω); to impose upon.

G2601.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of the base of G939 (βάσις); to cause to go down, i.e. precipitate.

G2602.def: from G2598 (καταβάλλω); a deposition, i.e. founding; figuratively, conception.

G2603.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1018 (βραβεύω) (in its original sense); to award the price against, i.e. (figuratively) to defraud (of salvation)

G2605.def: from G2596 (κατά) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος); to proclaim, promulgate.
G2605.kjv: declare, preach, shew, speak of, teach

G2607.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1097 (γινώσκω); to note against, i.e. find fault with.

G2608.def: from G2596 (κατά) and the base of G4486 (ῥήγνυμι); to rend in pieces, i.e. crack apart.

G2609.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G71 (ἄγω); to lead down; specially, to moor a vessel.

G2610.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G75 (ἀγωνίζομαι); to struggle against, i.e. (by implication) to overcome.

G2611.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1210 (δέω); to tie down, i.e. bandage (a wound)

G2612.def: from G2596 (κατά) intensive and G1212 (δῆλος); manifest.

G2613.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G1349 (δίκη); to adjudge against, i.e. pronounce guilty.

G2614.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1377 (διώκω); to hunt down, i.e. search for.

G2615.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1402 (δουλόω); to enslave utterly.

G2616.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G1413 (δυνάστης); to exercise dominion against, i.e. oppress.

G2617.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G153 (αἰσχύνομαι); to shame down, i.e. disgrace or (by implication) put to the blush.

G2618.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2545 (καίω); to burn down (to the ground), i.e. consume wholly.

G2619.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2572 (καλύπτω); to cover wholly, i.e. veil.

G2620.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2744 (καυχάομαι); to exult against (i.e. over)

G2621.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2749 (κεῖμαι); to lie down, i.e. (by implication) be sick; specially, to recline at a meal.

G2622.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2806 (κλάω); to break down, i.e. divide.

G2623.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2808 (κλείω); to shut down (in a dungeon), i.e. incarcerate.

G2624.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of a compound of G2819 (κλῆρος) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to be a giver of lots to each, i.e. (by implication) to apportion an estate.

G2625.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2827 (κλίνω); to recline down, i.e. (specially) to take a place at table.

G2626.def: from G2596 (κατά) and the base of G2830 (κλύδων); to dash (wash) down, i.e. (by implication) to deluge.

G2628.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G190 (ἀκολουθέω); to accompany closely.

G2629.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2875 (κόπτω); to chop down, i.e. mangle.

G2630.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G2911 (κρημνός); to precipitate down.

G2631.def: from G2632 (κατακρίνω); an adverse sentence (the verdict)

G2632.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2919 (κρίνω); to judge against, i.e. sentence.

G2634.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2961 (κυριεύω); to lord against, i.e. control, subjugate.
G2634.kjv: exercise dominion over (lordship), be lord over, overcome

G2635.def: from G2637 (κατάλαλος); to be a traducer, i.e. to slander.

G2637.def: from G2596 (κατά) and the base of G2980 (λαλέω); talkative against, i.e. a slanderer.

G2638.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to take eagerly, i.e. seize, possess, etc. (literally or figuratively)
G2638.kjv: apprehend, attain, come upon, comprehend, find, obtain, perceive, (over-)take

G2639.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3004 (λέγω) (in its original meaning); to lay down, i.e. (figuratively) to enrol.

G2640.def: from G2641 (καταλείπω); a remainder, i.e. (by implication) a few.

G2641.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3007 (λείπω); to leave down, i.e. behind; by implication, to abandon, have remaining.

G2642.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3034 (λιθάζω); to stone down, i.e. to death.

G2643.def: from G2644 (καταλλάσσω); exchange (figuratively, adjustment), i.e. restoration to (the divine) favor.

G2644.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G236 (ἀλλάσσω); to change mutually, i.e. (figuratively) to compound a difference.

G2645.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3062 (λοιποί); left down (behind), i.e remaining (plural the rest)

G2646.def: from G2647 (καταλύω); properly, a dissolution (breaking up of a journey), i.e. (by implication) a lodging-place.

G2647.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3089 (λύω); to loosen down (disintegrate), i.e. (by implication) to demolish (literally or figuratively); specially (compare G2646 (κατάλυμα)) to halt for the night.
G2647.kjv: destroy, dissolve, be guest, lodge, come to nought, overthrow, throw down

G2648.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3129 (μανθάνω); to learn thoroughly, i.e. (by implication) to note carefully.

G2649.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3140 (μαρτυρέω); to testify against.

G2650.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3306 (μένω); to stay fully, i.e. reside.

G2651.def: from G2596 (κατά) and accusative case plural feminine of G3441 (μόνος) (with G5561 (χώρα) implied); according to sole places, i.e. (adverbially) separately.

G2652.def: from G2596 (κατά) (intensive) and G331 (ἀνάθεμα); an imprecation.

G2653.def: from G2596 (κατά) (intensive) and G332 (ἀναθεματίζω); to imprecate.

G2654.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G355 (ἀναλίσκω); to consume utterly.

G2655.def: from G2596 (κατά) and (to be numb); to grow utterly torpid, i.e. (by implication) slothful (figuratively, expensive)

G2656.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3506 (νεύω); to nod down (towards), i.e. (by analogy) to make signs to.

G2657.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3539 (νοιέω); to observe fully.

G2658.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G473 (ἀντί); to meet against, i.e. arrive at (literally or figuratively)

G2659.def: from G2660 (κατανύσσω); a prickling (sensation, as of the limbs asleep), i.e. (by implication, (perhaps by some confusion with G3506 (νεύω) or even with G3571 (νύξ))) stupor (lethargy)

G2660.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3572 (νύσσω); to pierce thoroughly, i.e. (figuratively) to agitate violently ("sting to the quick")

G2661.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G515 (ἀξιόω); to deem entirely deserving.

G2662.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3961 (πατέω); to trample down; figuratively, to reject with disdain.

G2663.def: from G2664 (καταπαύω); reposing down, i.e. (by Hebraism) abode.

G2664.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3973 (παύω); to settle down, i.e. (literally) to colonize, or (figuratively) to (cause to) desist.

G2665.def: from a compound of G2596 (κατά) and a congener of G4072 (πέτομαι); something spread thoroughly, i.e. (specially) the door screen (to the Most Holy Place) in the Jewish Temple.

G2666.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4095 (πίνω); to drink down, i.e. gulp entire (literally or figuratively)

G2667.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4098 (πίπτω); to fall down.

G2668.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4126 (πλέω); to sail down upon a place, i.e. to land at.

G2669.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G4192 (πόνος); to labor down, i.e. wear with toil (figuratively, harass)

G2670.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of the same as G4195 (Πόντος); to plunge down, i.e. submerge.

G2671.def: from G2596 (κατά) (intensive) and G685 (ἀρά); imprecation, execration.

G2672.def: middle voice from G2671 (κατάρα); to execrate; by analogy, to doom.

G2673.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G691 (ἀργέω); to be (render) entirely idle (useless), literally or figuratively.
G2673.kjv: abolish, cease, cumber, deliver, destroy, do away, become (make) of no (none, without) effect, fail, loose, bring (come) to nought, put away (down), vanish away, make void

G2674.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G705 (ἀριθμέω); to reckon among.

G2675.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G739 (ἄρτιος); to complete thoroughly, i.e. repair (literally or figuratively) or adjust.
G2675.kjv: fit, frame, mend, (make) perfect(-ly join together), prepare, restore

G2678.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4579 (σείω); to sway downward, i.e. make a signal.

G2679.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4626 (σκάπτω); to undermine, i.e. (by implication) destroy.

G2680.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G4632 (σκεῦος); to prepare thoroughly (properly, by external equipment; whereas G2090 (ἑτοιμάζω) refers rather to internal fitness); by implication, to construct, create.

G2681.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4637 (σκηνόω); to camp down, i.e. haunt; figuratively, to remain.

G2682.def: from G2681 (κατασκηνόω); an encamping, i.e. (figuratively) a perch.

G2683.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G4639 (σκιά); to overshade, i.e. cover.

G2684.def: from G2685 (κατάσκοπος); to be a sentinel, i.e. to inspect insidiously.

G2685.def: from G2596 (κατά) (intensive) and G4649 (σκοπός) (in the sense of a watcher); a reconnoiterer.

G2686.def: middle voice from G2596 (κατά) and G4679 (σοφίζω); to be crafty against, i.e. circumvent.

G2687.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4724 (στέλλω); to put down, i.e. quell.

G2688.def: from G2525 (καθίστημι); properly, a position or condition, i.e. (subjectively) demeanor.

G2689.def: from G2687 (καταστέλλω); a deposit, i.e. (specially) costume.

G2690.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4762 (στρέφω); to turn upside down, i.e. upset.

G2691.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4763 (στρηνιάω); to become voluptuous against.

G2692.def: from G2690 (καταστρέφω); an overturn ("catastrophe"), i.e. demolition; figuratively, apostasy.

G2693.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4766 (στρώννυμι); to strew down, i.e. (by implication) to prostrate (slay)

G2694.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4951 (σύρω); to drag down, i.e. arrest judicially.

G2695.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4969 (σφάζω); to kill down, i.e. slaughter.

G2696.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G4972 (σφραγίζω); to seal closely.

G2697.def: from G2722 (κατέχω); a holding down, i.e. occupancy.

G2698.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5087 (τίθημι); to place down, i.e. deposit (literally or figuratively)

G2699.def: from a compound of G2596 (κατά) and (to cut); a cutting down (off), i.e. mutilation (ironically)

G2700.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G5115 (τόξον); to shoot down with an arrow or other missile.

G2701.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5143 (τρέχω); to run down, i.e. hasten from a tower.

G2702.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5342 (φέρω) (including its alternate); to bear down, i.e. (figuratively) overcome (with drowsiness); specially, to cast a vote.

G2703.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5343 (φεύγω); to flee down (away)

G2704.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5351 (φθείρω); to spoil entirely, i.e. (literally) to destroy; or (figuratively) to deprave;.

G2706.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5426 (φρονέω); to think against, i.e. disesteem.

G2708.def: from G2596 (κατά) and cheo (to pour); to pour down (out)

G2709.def: from G2596 (κατά) and (the ground); subterranean, i.e. infernal (belonging to the world of departed spirits)

G2710.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5530 (χράομαι); to overuse, i.e. misuse.

G2711.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G5594 (ψύχω); to cool down (off), i.e. refresh.

G2712.def: from G2596 (κατά) (intensively) and G1497 (εἴδωλον); utterly idolatrous.

G2713.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1725 (ἔναντι); directly opposite.

G2714.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1799 (ἐνώπιον); directly in front of.
G2714.kjv: before (the presence of), in the sight of

G2715.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G1850 (ἐξουσιάζω); to have (wield) full privilege over.

G2716.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2038 (ἐργάζομαι); to work fully, i.e. accomplish; by implication, to finish, fashion.

G2718.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι) (including its alternate); to come (or go) down (literally or figuratively)
G2718.kjv: come (down), depart, descend, go down, land

G2719.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2068 (ἐσθίω) (including its alternate); to eat down, i.e. devour (literally or figuratively)

G2720.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2116 (εὐθύνω); to straighten fully, i.e. (figuratively) direct.

G2721.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2186 (ἐφίστημι); to stand over against, i.e. rush upon (assault)

G2722.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2192 (ἔχω); to hold down (fast), in various applications (literally or figuratively)
G2722.kjv: have, hold (fast), keep (in memory), let, X make toward, possess, retain, seize on, stay, take, withhold

G2723.def: from G2725 (κατήγορος); to be a plaintiff, i.e. to charge with some offence.

G2724.def: from G2725 (κατήγορος); a complaint ("category"), i.e. criminal charge.

G2725.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G58 (ἀγορά); against one in the assembly, i.e. a complainant at law; specially, Satan.

G2726.def: from a compound of G2596 (κατά) and perhaps a derivative of the base of G5316 (φαίνω) (meaning downcast in look); demureness, i.e. (by implication) sadness.

G2727.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2279 (ἦχος); to sound down into the ears, i.e. (by implication) to indoctrinate ("catechize") or (genitive case) to apprise of.

G2728.def: from G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G2447 (ἰός); to rust down, i.e. corrode.

G2729.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G2480 (ἰσχύω); to overpower.

G2730.def: from G2596 (κατά) and G3611 (οἰκέω); to house permanently, i.e. reside (literally or figuratively)

G2731.def: from G2730 (κατοικέω); residence (properly, the act; but by implication, concretely, the mansion)

G2732.def: from a derivative of G2730 (κατοικέω); a dwelling-place.

G2733.def: residence (properly, the condition; but by implication, the abode itself)

G2734.def: middle voice from a compound of G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) (compare G2072 (ἔσοπτρον)); to mirror oneself, i.e. to see reflected (figuratively)

G2735.def: from a compound of G2596 (κατά) and a derivative of G3717 (ὀρθός) (compare G1357 (διόρθωσις)); something made fully upright, i.e. (figuratively) rectification (specially, good public administration)

G2737.def: comparative from G2736 (κάτω); inferior (locally, of Hades)

G2738.def: from G2545 (καίω); properly, a burn (concretely), but used (abstractly) of a glow.

G2741.def: from G2740 (καῦσις); to set on fire.

G2743.def: from a derivative of G2545 (καίω); to brand ("cauterize"), i.e. (by implication) to render unsensitive (figuratively)

G2744.def: from some (obsolete) base akin to that of (to boast) and G2172 (εὔχομαι); to vaunt (in a good or a bad sense)

G2745.def: from G2744 (καυχάομαι); a boast (properly, the object; by implication, the act) in a good or a bad sense.

G2746.def: from G2744 (καυχάομαι); boasting (properly, the act; by implication, the object), in a good or a bad sense.
G2746.kjv: boasting, whereof I may glory, glorying, rejoicing

G2747.def: probably from kegchros (millet); Cenchreæ, a port of Corinth.

G2748.def: of Hebrew origin (H06939); Cedron (i.e. Kidron), a brook near Jerusalem.

G2749.def: middle voice of a primary verb; to lie outstretched (literally or figuratively)
G2749.kjv: be (appointed, laid up, made, set), lay, lie

G2750.def: of uncertain affinity; a swathe, i.e. winding-sheet.

G2752.def: from G2753 (κελεύω); a cry of incitement.

G2753.def: from a primary (to urge on); "hail"; to incite by word, i.e. order.

G2754.def: from G2755 (κενόδοξος); empty glorying, i.e. self-conceit.

G2755.def: from G2756 (κενός) and G1391 (δόξα); vainly glorifying, i.e. self-conceited.

G2756.def: apparently a primary word; empty (literally or figuratively)

G2757.def: from a presumed compound of G2756 (κενός) and G5456 (φωνή); empty sounding, i.e. fruitless discussion.

G2758.def: from G2756 (κενός); to make empty, i.e. (figuratively) to abase, neutralize, falsify.
G2758.kjv: make (of none effect, of no reputation, void), be in vain

G2759.def: from (to prick); a point ("centre"), i.e. a sting (figuratively, poison) or goad (figuratively, divine impulse)

G2760.def: of Latin origin; a centurion, i.e. captain of one hundred soldiers.

G2761.def: adverb from G2756 (κενός); vainly, i.e. to no purpose.

G2762.def: feminine of a presumed derivative of the base of G2768 (κέρας); something horn-like, i.e. (specially) the apex of a Hebrew letter (figuratively, the least particle)

G2764.def: from G2766 (κέραμος); made of clay, i.e. earthen.

G2765.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G2766 (κέραμος); an earthenware vessel, i.e. jar.

G2766.def: probably from the base of G2767 (κεράννυμι) (through the idea of mixing clay and water); earthenware, i.e. a tile (by analogy, a thin roof or awning)

G2767.def: prolonged form of a more primary (which is used in certain tenses); to mingle, i.e. (by implication) to pour out (for drinking)

G2768.def: from a primary (the hair of the head); a horn (literally or figuratively)

G2769.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G2768 (κέρας); something horned, i.e. (specially) the pod of the carob-tree.

G2770.def: from G2771 (κέρδος); to gain (literally or figuratively)

G2771.def: of uncertain affinity; gain (pecuniary or genitive case)

G2772.def: from G2751 (κείρω); a clipping (bit), i.e. (specially) a coin.

G2773.def: from a derivative of G2772 (κέρμα); a handler of coins, i.e. money-broker.

G2774.def: neuter of a derivative of G2776 (κεφαλή); a principal thing, i.e. main point; specially, an amount (of money)

G2775.def: from the same as G2774 (κεφάλαιον); (specially) to strike on the head.

G2776.def: from the primary (in the sense of seizing); the head (as the part most readily taken hold of), literally or figuratively.

G2777.def: from G2776 (κεφαλή); properly, a knob, i.e. (by implication) a roll (by extension from the end of a stick on which the manuscript was rolled)

G2778.def: of Latin origin; properly, an enrollment ("census"), i.e. (by implication) a tax.

G2780.def: from G2779 (κῆπος) and (a warden); a garden-keeper, i.e. gardener.

G2781.def: diminutive from (wax); a cell for honey, i.e. (collectively) the comb.
