G2782.def: from G2784 (κηρύσσω); a proclamation (especially of the gospel; by implication, the gospel itself)

G2783.def: from G2784 (κηρύσσω); a herald, i.e. of divine truth (especially of the gospel)

G2784.def: of uncertain affinity; to herald (as a public crier), especially divine truth (the gospel)

G2785.def: probably from the base of G5490 (χάσμα); a huge fish (as gaping for prey)

G2786.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H03710); the Rock; Cephas (i.e. Kepha), a surname of Peter.

G2787.def: of uncertain derivation; a box, i.e. the sacred ark and that of Noah.

G2789.def: from G2788 (κιθάρα); to play on a lyre.

G2790.def: from G2788 (κιθάρα) and a derivative of the same as G5603 (ᾠδή); a lyre-singer(-player), i.e. harpist.

G2791.def: probably of foreign origin; Cilicia, a region of Asia Minor.

G2793.kjv: be in danger, be (stand) in jeopardy

G2795.def: from (poetic for , to go); to stir (transitively), literally or figuratively.

G2797.def: of Hebrew origin (H07027); Cis (i.e. Kish), an Israelite.

G2798.def: from G2806 (κλάω); a twig or bough (as if broken off)

G2799.def: of uncertain affinity; to sob, i.e. wail aloud (whereas 1145 is rather to cry silently)

G2802.def: of uncertain derivation; Claude, an island near Crete.

G2803.def: feminine of G2804 (Κλαύδιος); Claudia, a Christian woman.

G2804.def: of Latin origin; Claudius, the name of two Romans.

G2806.def: a primary verb; to break (specially, of bread)

G2807.def: from G2808 (κλείω); a key (as shutting a lock), literally or figuratively.

G2808.def: a primary verb; to close (literally or figuratively)

G2809.def: from G2813 (κλέπτω); stealing (properly, the thing stolen, but used of the act)

G2810.def: probably contracted from (compound of G2811 (κλέος) and G3962 (πατήρ)); Cleopas, a Christian.

G2811.def: from a shorter form of G2564 (καλέω); renown (as if being called)

G2812.def: from G2813 (κλέπτω); a stealer (literally or figuratively)

G2814.def: from G2806 (κλάω); a limb or shoot (as if broken off)

G2815.def: of Latin origin; merciful; Clemes (i.e. Clemens), a Christian.

G2816.def: from G2818 (κληρονόμος); to be an heir to (literally or figuratively)

G2817.def: from G2818 (κληρονόμος); heirship, i.e. (concretely) a patrimony or (genitive case) a possession.

G2818.def: from G2819 (κλῆρος) and the base of G3551 (νόμος) (in its original sense of partitioning, i.e. (reflexively) getting by apportionment); a sharer by lot, i.e. inheritor (literally or figuratively); by implication, a possessor.

G2819.def: probably from G2806 (κλάω) (through the idea of using bits of wood, etc., for the purpose; a die (for drawing chances); by implication, a portion (as if so secured); by extension, an acquisition (especially a patrimony, figuratively)

G2820.def: from G2819 (κλῆρος); to allot, i.e. (figuratively) to assign (a privilege)

G2821.def: from a shorter form of G2564 (καλέω); an invitation (figuratively)

G2822.def: from the same as G2821 (κλῆσις); invited, i.e. appointed, or (specially), a saint.

G2823.def: of uncertain derivation; an earthen pot used for baking in.

G2824.def: from G2827 (κλίνω); a slope, i.e. (specially) a "clime" or tract of country.

G2825.def: from G2827 (κλίνω); a couch (for sleep, sickness, sitting or eating)

G2826.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G2825 (κλίνη); a pallet or little couch.

G2827.def: a primary verb; to slant or slope, i.e. incline or recline (literally or figuratively)
G2827.kjv: bow (down), be far spent, lay, turn to flight, wear away

G2828.def: from a derivative of G2827 (κλίνω); properly, reclination, i.e. (concretely and specially), a party at a meal.

G2830.def: from (to billow or dash over); a surge of the sea (literally or figuratively)

G2831.def: middle voice from G2830 (κλύδων); to surge, i.e. (figuratively) to fluctuate.

G2832.def: of Chaldee origin (corresponding to H0256); Clopas, an Israelite.

G2833.def: from a primary (to scrape); to scratch, i.e. (by implication) to tickle.

G2834.def: probably of foreign origin; Cnidus, a place in Asia Minor.

G2835.def: of Latin origin; a quadrans, i.e. the fourth part of an as.

G2836.def: from ("hollow"); a cavity, i.e. (especially) the abdomen; by implication, the matrix; figuratively, the heart.

G2837.def: from G2749 (κεῖμαι); to put to sleep, i.e. (passively or reflexively) to slumber; figuratively, to decease.
G2837.kjv: (be a-, fall a-, fall on) sleep, be dead

G2838.def: from G2837 (κοιμάω); sleeping, i.e. (by implication) repose.

G2839.def: probably from G4862 (σύν); common, i.e. (literally) shared by all or several, or (ceremonially) profane.

G2840.def: from G2839 (κοινός); to make (or consider) profane (ceremonially)

G2841.def: from G2844 (κοινωνός); to share with others (objectively or subjectively)

G2842.def: from G2844 (κοινωνός); partnership, i.e. (literally) participation, or (social) intercourse, or (pecuniary) benefaction.

G2844.def: from G2839 (κοινός); a sharer, i.e. associate.

G2845.def: from G2749 (κεῖμαι); a couch; by extension, cohabitation; by implication, the male sperm.

G2847.def: from G2848 (κόκκος) (from the kernel-shape of the insect); crimson-colored.

G2848.def: apparently a primary word; a kernel of seed.

G2849.def: from (dwarf); properly, to curtail, i.e. (figuratively) to chastise (or reserve for infliction)

G2850.def: from a derivative of (a fawner); flattery.

G2852.def: from a derivative of the base of G2849 (κολάζω); to rap with the fist.

G2853.def: from ("glue"); to glue, i.e. (passively or reflexively) to stick (figuratively)

G2854.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of (a cake; prob akin to the base of G2853 (κολλάω)); properly, a poultice (as made of or in the form of crackers), i.e. (by analogy) a plaster.

G2855.def: from a presumed derivative of (a small coin; probably akin to G2854 (κολλούριον)); a coin-dealer.

G2856.def: from a derivative of the base of G2849 (κολάζω); to dock, i.e. (figuratively) abridge.

G2857.def: apparently feminine plural of kolossos ("colossal"); Colossæ, a place in Asia Minor.

G2858.def: from G2857 (Κολοσσαί); a Colossæan, (i.e. inhabitant of Colossæ.

G2859.def: apparently a primary word; the bosom; by analogy, a bay.

G2860.def: from (a diver); to plunge into water.

G2861.def: from G2860 (κολυμβάω); a diving-place, i.e. pond for bathing (or swimming)

G2862.def: of Latin origin; a Roman "colony" for veterans.

G2863.def: from G2864 (κόμη); to wear tresses of hair.

G2864.def: apparently from the same as G2865 (κομίζω); the hair of the head (locks, as ornamental, and thus differing from G2359 (θρίξ); which properly denotes merely the scalp)

G2865.def: from a primary (to tend, i.e. take care of); properly, to provide for, i.e. (by implication) to carry off (as if from harm; genitive case obtain)

G2866.def: neuter comparative of a derivative of the base of 2865 (meaning, properly, well dressed, i.e. nice); figuratively, convalescent.

G2867.def: from (dust; by analogy, lime); to whitewash.

G2868.def: from the base of G2867 (κονιάω) and ornumi (to "rouse"); pulverulence (as blown about)

G2869.def: from G2873 (κόπος); to tire, i.e. (figuratively) to relax.

G2870.def: from G2875 (κόπτω); mourning (properly, by beating the breast)

G2872.def: from a derivative of G2873 (κόπος); to feel fatigue; by implication, to work hard.

G2873.def: from G2875 (κόπτω); a cut, i.e. (by analogy) toil (as reducing the strength), literally or figuratively; by implication, pains.

G2874.def: from (ordure; perhaps akin to G2875 (κόπτω)); manure.

G2875.def: a primary verb; to "chop"; specially, to beat the breast in grief.

G2876.def: perhaps from G2880 (κορέννυμι); a crow (from its voracity)

G2877.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of (a maiden); a (little) girl.

G2878.def: of Hebrew and Chaldee origin respectively (H07133); a votive offering and the offering; a consecrated present (to the Temple fund); by extension (the latter term) the Treasury itself, i.e. the room where the contribution boxes stood.

G2879.def: of Hebrew origin (H07141); Core (i.e. Korach), an Israelite.

G2880.def: a primary verb; to cram, i.e. glut or sate.

G2881.def: from G2882 (Κόρινθος); a Corinthian, i.e. inhabitant of Corinth.

G2882.def: of uncertain derivation; Corinthus, a city of Greece.

G2883.def: of Latin origin; Cornelius, a Roman.

G2884.def: of Hebrew origin (H03734); a cor, i.e. a specific measure.

G2885.def: from G2889 (κόσμος); to put in proper order, i.e. decorate (literally or figuratively); specially, to snuff (a wick)

G2886.def: from G2889 (κόσμος) (in its secondary sense); terrene ("cosmic"), literally (mundane) or figuratively (corrupt)

G2887.def: from G2889 (κόσμος) (in its primary sense); orderly, i.e. decorous.

G2888.def: from G2889 (κόσμος) and G2902 (κρατέω); a world-ruler, an epithet of Satan.

G2889.def: probably from the base of G2865; orderly arrangement, i.e., decoration; by implication, the world (in a wide or narrow sense, including its inhabitants).

G2890.def: of Latin origin (fourth); Quartus, a Christian.

G2892.def: of Latin origin; "custody", i.e. a Roman sentry.

G2895.def: probably of foreign origin; a mattress.

G2896.def: a primary verb; properly, to "croak" (as a raven) or scream, i.e. (genitive case) to call aloud (shriek, exclaim, intreat)

G2897.def: probably from the same as G726 (ἁρπάζω); properly, a headache (as a seizure of pain) from drunkenness, i.e. (by implication) a debauch (by analogy, a glut)

G2898.def: diminutive of a derivative of the base of G2768 (κέρας); a skull ("cranium")

G2899.def: of uncertain derivation; a margin, i.e. (specially), a fringe or tassel.

G2901.def: from G2900 (κραταιός); to empower, i.e. (passively) increase in vigor.

G2902.def: from G2904 (κράτος); to use strength, i.e. seize or retain (literally or figuratively)
G2902.kjv: hold (by, fast), keep, lay hand (hold) on, obtain, retain, take (by)

G2903.def: superlative of a derivative of G2904 (κράτος); strongest, i.e. (in dignity) very honorable.

G2904.def: perhaps a primary word; vigor ("great") (literally or figuratively)

G2906.def: from G2896 (κράζω); an outcry (in notification, tumult or grief)

G2908.def: neuter of an alternate form of G2909 (κρείττων); (as noun) better, i.e. greater advantage.

G2909.def: comparative of a derivative of G2904 (κράτος); stronger, i.e. (figuratively) better, i.e. nobler.

G2910.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb; to hang.

G2911.def: from G2910 (κρεμάννυμι); overhanging, i.e. a precipice.

G2912.def: from G2914 (Κρήτη); a Cretan, i.e. inhabitant of Crete.

G2913.def: of Latin origin; growing; Cresces (i.e. Crescens), a Christian.

G2914.def: of uncertain derivation; Crete, an island in the Mediterranean.

G2917.def: from G2919 (κρίνω); a decision (the function or the effect, for or against ("crime"))
G2917.kjv: avenge, condemned, condemnation, damnation, + go to law, judgment

G2918.def: perhaps a prim word; a lily.

G2919.def: properly, to distinguish, i.e. decide (mentally or judicially); by implication, to try, condemn, punish.
G2919.kjv: avenge, conclude, condemn, damn, decree, determine, esteem, judge, go to (sue at the) law, ordain, call in question, sentence to, think

G2920.def: decision (subjectively or objectively, for or against); by extension, a tribunal; by implication, justice (especially, divine law)

G2921.def: of Latin origin; "crisp"; Crispus, a Corinthian.

G2922.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G2923 (κριτής); a rule of judging ("criterion"), i.e. (by implication) a tribunal.

G2923.def: from G2919 (κρίνω); a judge (genitive case or specially)

G2925.def: apparently a primary verb; to rap.

G2926.def: feminine of G2927 (κρυπτός); a hidden place, i.e. cellar ("crypt")

G2928.def: a primary verb; to conceal (properly, by covering)

G2929.def: from G2930 (κρύσταλλος); to make (i.e. intransitively, resemble) ice ("crystallize")

G2930.def: from a derivative of (frost); ice, i.e. (by analogy) rock "crystal".

G2932.def: a primary verb; to get, i.e. acquire (by any means; own)

G2933.def: from G2932 (κτάομαι); an acquirement, i.e. estate.

G2934.def: from G2932 (κτάομαι); property, i.e. (specially) a domestic animal.

G2936.def: probably akin to G2932 (κτάομαι) (through the idea of proprietorship of the manufacturer); to fabricate, i.e. found (form originally)

G2937.def: from G2936 (κτίζω); original formation (properly, the act; by implication, the thing, literally or figuratively)

G2938.def: from G2936 (κτίζω); an original formation (concretely), i.e. product (created thing)

G2939.def: from G2936 (κτίζω); a founder, i.e. God (as author of all things)

G2940.def: from (a "cube", i.e. die for playing); gambling, i.e. (figuratively) artifice or fraud.

G2941.def: from (of Latin origin, to steer); pilotage, i.e. (figuratively) directorship (in the church)

G2942.def: from the same as G2941 (κυβέρνησις); helmsman, i.e. (by implication) captain.

G2943.def: adverb from the same as G2945 (κύκλῳ); from the circle, i.e. all around.

G2944.def: from the same as G2945 (κύκλῳ); to encircle, i.e. surround.

G2945.def: as if dative case of (a ring, "cycle"; akin to G2947 (κυλιόω)); i.e. in a circle (by implication, of G1722 (ἐν)), i.e. (adverbially) all around.

G2946.def: from G2947 (κυλιόω); a wallow (the effect of rolling), i.e. filth.

G2947.def: from the base of G2949 (κῦμα) (through the idea of circularity; compare G2945 (κύκλῳ), G1507 (εἱλίσσω)); to roll about.

G2948.def: from the same as G2947 (κυλιόω); rocking about, i.e. crippled (maimed, in feet or hands)

G2949.def: from (to swell (with young), i.e. bend, curve); a billow (as bursting or toppling)

G2950.def: from a derivative of the base of G2949 (κῦμα); a "cymbal" (as hollow)

G2951.def: of foreign origin (compare H03646); dill or fennel ("cummin")

G2952.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G2965 (κύων); a puppy.

G2953.def: from G2954 (Κύπρος); a Cyprian (Cypriot), i.e. inhabitant of Cyprus.

G2954.def: of uncertain origin; Cyprus, an island in the Mediterranean.

G2955.def: probably from the base of G2949 (κῦμα); to bend forward.

G2956.def: from G2957 (Κυρήνη); i.e. Cyrenæan, i.e. inhabitant of Cyrene.

G2957.def: of uncertain derivation; Cyrene, a region of Africa.

G2958.def: of Latin origin; Cyrenius (i.e. Quirinus), a Roman.

G2959.def: feminine of G2962 (κύριος); Cyria, a Christian woman.

G2960.def: from G2962 (κύριος); belonging to the Lord (Jehovah or Jesus)

G2961.kjv: have dominion over, lord, be lord of, exercise lordship over

G2962.def: from κῦρος (supremacy); supreme in authority, i.e., (as noun) controller; by implication, Master (as a respectful title).

G2963.def: from G2962 (κύριος); mastery, i.e. (concretely and collectively) rulers.

G2964.def: from the same as G2962 (κύριος); to make authoritative, i.e. ratify.

G2965.def: a primary word; a dog ("hound") (literally or figuratively)

G2966.def: from the base of G2849 (κολάζω); a limb of the body (as if lopped)

G2967.def: from the base of G2849 (κολάζω); to estop, i.e. prevent (by word or act)
G2967.kjv: forbid, hinder, keep from, let, not suffer, withstand

G2968.def: from G2749 (κεῖμαι); a hamlet (as if laid down)

G2969.def: from G2968 (κώμη) and G4172 (πόλις); an unwalled city.

G2970.def: from G2749 (κεῖμαι); a carousal (as if letting loose)

G2971.def: apparently a derivative of the base of G2759 (κέντρον) and a derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); a mosquito (from its stinging proboscis)

G2972.def: of uncertain origin; Cos, an island in the Mediterranean.

G2973.def: of Hebrew origin (compare H07081); Cosam (i.e. Kosam) an Israelite.

G2974.def: from G2875 (κόπτω); blunted, i.e. (figuratively) of hearing (deaf) or speech (dumb)

G2975.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb, which is only used as an alternate in certain tenses; to lot, i.e. determine (by implication, receive) especially by lot.
G2975.kjv: his lot be, cast lots, obtain

G2976.def: probably of Hebrew origin (H0499); Lazarus (i.e. Elazar), the name of two Israelites (one imaginary)

G2980.def: a prolonged form of an otherwise obsolete verb; to talk, i.e. utter words.
G2980.kjv: preach, say, speak (after), talk, tell, utter

G2982.def: of Hebrew origin (H04100 with prepositional prefix); lama (i.e. why)

G2983.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb, which is use only as an alternate in certain tenses; to take (in very many applications, literally and figuratively (properly objective or active, to get hold of; whereas G1209 (δέχομαι) is rather subjective or passive, to have offered to one; while G138 (αἱρέομαι) is more violent, to seize or remove))
G2983.kjv: accept, + be amazed, assay, attain, bring, X when I call, catch, come on (X unto), + forget, have, hold, obtain, receive (X after), take (away, up)

G2984.def: of Hebrew origin (H03929); Lamech (i.e. Lemek), a patriarch.

G2986.def: from the same as G2985 (λαμπάς); radiant; by analogy, limpid; figuratively, magnificent or sumptuous (in appearance)
G2986.kjv: bright, clear, gay, goodly, gorgeous, white

G2988.def: adverb from G2986 (λαμπρός); brilliantly, i.e. figuratively, luxuriously.

G2989.def: a primary verb; to beam, i.e. radiate brilliancy (literally or figuratively)

G2990.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb, which is used only as an alternate in certain tenses; to lie hid (literally or figuratively); often used adverbially, unwittingly.
G2990.kjv: be hid, be ignorant of, unawares

G2991.def: from a compound of (a stone) and the base of G3584 (ξηρός) (in its original sense of scraping); rock-quarried.

G2992.def: apparently a primary word; a people (in general; thus differing from G1218 (δῆμος), which denotes one's own populace)

G2993.def: from a compound of G2992 (λαός) and G1349 (δίκη); Laodicia, a place in Asia Minor.

G2994.def: from G2993 (Λαοδίκεια); a Laodicean, i.e. inhabitant of Laodicia.

G2996.def: of uncertain origin; Lasæa, a place in Crete.

G2997.def: a strengthened form of a primary verb, which only occurs in this and another prolonged form as alternate in certain tenses; to crack open (from a fall)

G2998.def: from the same as the first part of G2991 (λαξευτός) and the base of G5114 (τομώτερος); to quarry.

G2999.def: from G3000 (λατρεύω); ministration of God, i.e. worship.

G3000.def: from (a hired menial); to minister (to God), i.e. render religious homage.

G3002.def: of uncertain origin; Lebbæus, a Christian.

G3003.def: of Latin origin; a "legion", i.e. Roman regiment (figuratively)

G3004.def: a primary verb; properly, to "lay" forth, i.e. (figuratively) relate (in words (usually of systematic or set discourse; whereas G2036 (ἔπω) and G5346 (φημί) generally refer to an individual expression or speech respectively; while G4483 (ῥέω) is properly to break silence merely, and G2980 (λαλέω) means an extended or random harangue)); by implication, to mean.
G3004.kjv: ask, bid, boast, call, describe, give out, name, put forth, say(-ing, on), shew, speak, tell, utter

G3006.def: apparently a primary word; smooth, i.e. "level".

G3007.def: a primary verb; to leave, i.e. (intransitively or passively) to fail or be absent.

G3008.def: from G3011 (λειτουργός); to be a public servant, i.e. (by analogy) to perform religious or charitable functions (worship, obey, relieve)

G3009.def: from G3008 (λειτουργέω); public function (as priest ("liturgy") or almsgiver)

G3010.def: from the same as G3008 (λειτουργέω); functional publicly ("liturgic"); i.e. beneficient.

G3011.def: from a derivative of G2992 (λαός) and G2041 (ἔργον); a public servant, i.e. a functionary in the Temple or Gospel, or (genitive case) a worshipper (of God) or benefactor (of man)

G3012.def: of Latin origin; a "linen" cloth, i.e. apron.

G3014.def: from the same as G3013 (λεπίς); scaliness, i.e. "leprosy".

G3015.def: from the same as G3014 (λέπρα); scaly, i.e. leprous (a leper)

G3016.def: neuter of a derivative of the same as G3013 (λεπίς); something scaled (light), i.e. a small coin.

G3017.def: of Hebrew origin (H03878); Levi, the name of three Israelites.

G3018.def: a form of G3017 (Λευΐ); Lewis (i.e. Levi), a Christian.

G3019.def: from G3017 (Λευΐ); a Levite, i.e. descendant of Levi.

G3020.def: from G3019 (Λευΐτης); Levitic, i.e. relating to the Levites.

G3025.def: apparently a primary word; a trough, i.e. wine-vat.

G3026.def: apparently a primary word; twaddle, i.e. an incredible story.

G3030.def: of foreign origin (H03828); the incense-tree, i.e. (by implication) incense itself.

G3031.def: from G3030 (λίβανος); frankincense, i.e. (by extension) a censer for burning it.

G3032.def: of Latin origin; a Roman freedman.

G3033.def: probably from G3047 (λίψ); Libye, a region of Africa.

G3035.def: from G3037 (λίθος); stony, i.e. made of stone.

G3036.def: from a compound of G3037 (λίθος) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw stones, i.e. lapidate.

G3037.def: apparently a primary word; a stone (literally or figuratively)

G3038.def: from G3037 (λίθος) and a derivative of G4766 (στρώννυμι); stone-strewed, i.e. a tessellated mosaic on which the Roman tribunal was placed.

G3039.def: from , the equivalent of (a winnowing fan or basket); to winnow, i.e. (by analogy), to triturate.

G3040.def: apparently a primary word; a harbor.

G3041.def: probably from G3040 (λιμήν) (through the idea of nearness of shore); a pond (large or small)

G3042.def: probably from G3007 (λείπω) (through the idea of destitution); a scarcity of food.

G3043.def: probably a primary word; flax, i.e. (by implication) "linen".

G3044.def: perhaps from G3043 (λίνον); Linus, a Christian.

G3046.def: of Latin origin (libra); a pound in weight.

G3047.def: probably from (to pour a "libation"); the south(- west) wind (as bringing rain, i.e. (by extension) the south quarter)

G3048.def: from G3056 (λόγος) (in the commercial sense); a contribution.

G3049.def: middle voice from G3056 (λόγος); to take an inventory, i.e. estimate (literally or figuratively)
G3049.kjv: conclude, (ac-)count (of), + despise, esteem, impute, lay, number, reason, reckon, suppose, think (on)

G3051.def: neuter of G3052 (λόγιος); an utterance (of God)

G3052.def: from G3056 (λόγος); fluent, i.e. an orator.

G3053.def: from G3049 (λογίζομαι); computation, i.e. (figuratively) reasoning (conscience, conceit)

G3054.def: from a compound of G3056 (λόγος) and G3164 (μάχομαι); to be disputatious (on trifles)

G3055.def: from the same as G3054 (λογομαχέω); disputation about trifles ("logomachy")

G3056.def: from G3004; something said (including the thought); by implication, a topic (subject of discourse), also reasoning (the mental faculty).

G3058.def: from G3060 (λοίδορος); to reproach, i.e. vilify.

G3061.def: of uncertain affinity; a plague (literally, the disease, or figuratively, a pest)

G3062.def: masculine plural of a derivative of G3007 (λείπω); remaining ones.
G3062.kjv: other, which remain, remnant, residue, rest

G3063.def: neuter singular of the same as G3062 (λοιποί); something remaining (adverbially)
G3063.kjv: besides, finally, furthermore, (from) henceforth, moreover, now, + it remaineth, then

G3064.def: genitive case singular of the same as G3062 (λοιποί); remaining time.

G3065.def: contracted from Latin Lucanus; Lucas, a Christian.

G3066.def: of Latin origin; illuminative; Lucius, a Christian.

G3067.def: from G3068 (λούω); a bath, i.e. (figuratively), baptism.

G3068.def: a primary verb; to bathe (the whole person; whereas G3538 (νίπτω) means to wet a part only, and G4150 (πλύνω) to wash, cleanse garments exclusively)

G3069.def: of Hebrew origin (H03850); Lydda (i.e. Lod), a place in Palestine.

G3070.def: properly, feminine of Ludios (of foreign origin) (a Lydian, in Asia Minor); Lydia, a Christian woman.

G3071.def: perhaps remotely from G3074 (λύκος); Lycaonia, a region of Asia Minor.

G3072.def: adverb from a derivative of G3071 (Λυκαονία); Lycaonistically, i.e. in the language of the Lycaonians.

G3073.def: probably remotely from G3074 (λύκος); Lycia, a province of Asia Minor.

G3074.def: perhaps akin to the base of G3022 (λευκός) (from the whitish hair); a wolf.

G3075.def: middle voice from a probably derivative of G3089 (λύω) (meaning filth); properly, to soil, i.e. (figuratively) insult (maltreat)

G3076.def: from G3077 (λύπη); to distress; reflexively or passively, to be sad.
G3076.kjv: cause grief, grieve, be in heaviness, (be) sorrow(-ful), be (make) sorry

G3078.def: from G3080 (λύσις) and (trouble); grief-dispelling; Lysanias, a governor of Abilene.

G3079.def: of uncertain affinity; Lysias, a Roman.

G3080.def: from G3089 (λύω); a loosening, i.e. (specially), divorce.

G3081.def: third person singular present indicative active of a derivative of a compound of G3080 (λύσις) and G5056 (τέλος); impersonally, it answers the purpose, i.e. is advantageous.

G3082.def: of uncertain origin; Lystra, a place in Asia Minor.

G3083.def: from G3089 (λύω); something to loosen with, i.e. a redemption price (figuratively, atonement)

G3084.def: from G3083 (λύτρον); to ransom (literally or figuratively)

G3087.def: from G3088 (λύχνος); a lamp-stand (literally or figuratively)

G3088.def: from the base of G3022 (λευκός); a portable lamp or other illuminator (literally or figuratively)

G3089.def: a primary verb; to "loosen" (literally or figuratively)
G3089.kjv: break (up), destroy, dissolve, (un-)loose, melt, put off

G3090.def: of uncertain origin; Lois, a Christian woman.

G3091.def: of Hebrew origin (H03876); Lot, a patriarch.

G3092.def: probably of Hebrew origin; Maath, an Israelite.

G3093.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H04026); the tower; Magdala (i.e. Migdala), a place in Palestine.

G3094.def: feminine of a derivative of G3093 (Μαγδαλά); a female Magdalene, i.e. inhabitant of Magdala.

G3097.def: of foreign origin (H07248); a Magian, i.e. Oriental scientist; by implication, a magician.

G3098.def: of Hebrew origin (H04031); Magog, a foreign nation, i.e. (figuratively) an Antichristian party.

G3099.def: of Hebrew origin (H04080); Madian (i.e. Midian), a region of Arabia.

G3100.def: from G3101 (μαθητής); intransitively, to become a pupil; transitively, to disciple, i.e. enrol as scholar.

G3101.def: from G3129 (μανθάνω); a learner, i.e. pupil.

G3102.def: feminine from G3101 (μαθητής); a female pupil.

G3103.def: of Hebrew origin (H04968); Mathusala (i.e. Methushelach), an antediluvian.

G3104.def: probably of Hebrew origin; Mainan, an Israelite.

G3105.def: middle voice from a primary (to long for; through the idea of insensate craving); to rave as a "maniac".

G3106.def: from G3107 (μακάριος); to beatify, i.e. pronounce (or esteem) fortunate.

G3107.def: a prolonged form of the poetical (meaning the same); supremely blest; by extension, fortunate, well off.

G3108.def: from G3106 (μακαρίζω); beatification, i.e. attribution of good fortune.

G3109.def: from G3110 (Μακεδών); Macedonia, a region of Greece.

G3110.def: of uncertain derivation; a Macedon (Macedonian), i.e. inhabitant of Macedonia.

G3111.def: of Latin origin (macellum); a butcher's stall, meat market or provision-shop.

G3112.def: feminine accusative case singular of G3117 (μακρός) (G3598 (ὁδός) being implied); at a distance (literally or figuratively)

G3113.def: adverb from G3117 (μακρός); from a distance or afar.

G3114.def: from the same as G3116 (μακροθυμώς); to be long-spirited, i.e. (objectively) forbearing or (subjectively) patient.
G3114.kjv: bear (suffer) long, be longsuffering, have (long) patience, be patient, patiently endure

G3115.def: from the same as G3116 (μακροθυμώς); longanimity, i.e. (objectively) forbearance or (subjectively) fortitude.

G3116.def: adverb of a compound of G3117 (μακρός) and G2372 (θυμός); with long (enduring) temper, i.e. leniently.

G3117.def: from G3372 (μῆκος); long (in place (distant) or time (neuter plural))

G3118.def: from G3117 (μακρός) and G5550 (χρόνος); long-timed, i.e. long-lived.

G3120.def: of uncertain affinity; soft, i.e. fine (clothing); figuratively, a catamite.

G3121.def: of Hebrew origin (H04111); Maleleel (i.e. Mahalalel), an antediluvian.

G3122.def: neuter plural of the superlative of an apparently primary adverb (very); (adverbially) most (in the greatest degree) or particularly.

G3123.def: neuter of the comparative of the same as G3122 (μάλιστα); (adverbially) more (in a greater degree)) or rather.
G3123.kjv: + better, X far, (the) more (and more), (so) much (the more), rather

G3124.def: of Hebrew origin (H04429); Malchus, an Israelite.

G3126.def: of Chaldee origin (confidence, i.e. wealth, personified); mammonas, i.e. avarice (deified)

G3127.def: of uncertain origin; Manaën, a Christian.

G3128.def: of Hebrew origin (H04519); Mannasses (i.e. Menashsheh), an Israelite.

G3129.def: prolongation from a primary verb, another form of which, , is used as an alternate in certain tenses; to learn (in any way)

G3131.def: of Hebrew origin (H04478); manna (i.e. man), an edible gum.

G3132.def: from a derivative of G3105 (μαίνομαι) (meaning a prophet, as supposed to rave through inspiration); to divine, i.e. utter spells (under pretense of foretelling.

G3133.def: of uncertain affinity; to extinguish (as fire), i.e. (figuratively and passively) to pass away.

G3134.def: of Chaldee origin (meaning our Lord has come); maranatha, i.e. an exclamation of the approaching divine judgment.

G3136.def: probably of Chaldee origin (meaning mistress); Martha, a Christian woman.

G3137.def: of Hebrew origin (H04813); Maria or Mariam (i.e. Mirjam), the name of six Christian females.

G3138.def: of Latin origin; Marcus, a Christian.

G3140.def: from G3144 (μάρτυς); to be a witness, i.e. testify (literally or figuratively)
G3140.kjv: charge, give (evidence), bear record, have (obtain, of) good (honest) report, be well reported of, testify, give (have) testimony, (be, bear, give, obtain) witness

G3141.def: from G3144 (μάρτυς); evidence given (judicially or genitive case)

G3142.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3144 (μάρτυς); something evidential, i.e. (genitive case) evidence given or (specially), the Decalogue (in the sacred Tabernacle)

G3143.def: middle voice from G3144 (μάρτυς); to be adduced as a witness, i.e. (figuratively) to obtest (in affirmation or exhortation)

G3144.def: of uncertain affinity; a witness (literally (judicially) or figuratively (genitive case)); by analogy, a "martyr".

G3145.def: from a primary (to handle or squeeze); to chew.

G3146.def: from G3148 (μάστιξ); to flog (literally or figuratively)

G3148.def: probably from the base of G3145 (μασσάομαι) (through the idea of contact); a whip (literally, the Roman flagellum for criminals; figuratively, a disease)

G3149.def: from the base of G3145 (μασσάομαι); a (properly, female) breast (as if kneaded up)

G3150.def: from G3151 (ματαιολόγος); random talk, i.e. babble.

G3151.def: from G3152 (μάταιος) and G3004 (λέγω); an idle (i.e. senseless or mischievous) talker, i.e. a wrangler.

G3152.def: from the base of G3155 (μάτην); empty, i.e. (literally) profitless, or (specially), an idol.

G3153.def: from G3152 (μάταιος); inutility; figuratively, transientness; morally, depravity.

G3154.def: from G3152 (μάταιος); to render (passively, become) foolish, i.e. (morally) wicked or (specially), idolatrous.

G3155.def: accusative case of a derivative of the base of G3145 (μασσάομαι) (through the idea of tentative manipulation, i.e. unsuccessful search, or else of punishment); folly, i.e. (adverbially) to no purpose.

G3156.def: a shorter form of G3164 (μάχομαι); Matthæus (i.e. Matthitjah), an Israelite and a Christian.

G3157.def: of Hebrew origin (H04977); Matthan (i.e. Mattan), an Israelite.

G3158.def: probably a shortened form of G3161 (Ματταθίας); Matthat (i.e. Mattithjah), the name of two Israelites.

G3159.def: apparently a shortened form of G3161 (Ματταθίας); Matthias (i.e. Mattithjah), an Israelite.

G3160.def: probably a shortened form of G3161 (Ματταθίας) (compare G4992 (σωτήριον)); Mattatha (i.e. Mattithjah), an Israelite.

G3161.def: of Hebrew origin (H04993); Mattathias (i.e. Mattithjah), an Israelite and a Christian.

G3162.def: probably feminine of a presumed derivative of G3163 (μάχη); a knife, i.e. dirk; figuratively, war, judicial punishment.

G3163.def: from G3164 (μάχομαι); a battle, i.e. (figuratively) controversy.

G3164.def: middle voice of an apparently primary verb; to war, i.e. (figuratively) to quarrel, dispute.

G3165.def: a shorter (and probably original) form of G1691 (ἐμέ); me.

G3166.def: from a compound of G3173 (μέγας) and (to boast; akin to G837 (αὐξάνω) and G2744 (καυχάομαι)); to talk big, i.e. be grandiloquent (arrogant, egotistic)

G3167.def: from G3173 (μέγας); magnificent, i.e. (neuter, plural as noun) a conspicuous favor, or (subjectively) perfection.

G3168.def: from G3167 (μεγαλεῖος); superbness, i.e. glory or splendor.

G3169.def: from G3173 (μέγας) and G4241 (πρέπω); befitting greatness or magnificence (majestic)

G3170.def: from G3173 (μέγας); to make (or declare) great, i.e. increase or (figuratively) extol.

G3172.def: from G3173 (μέγας); greatness, i.e. (figuratively) divinity (often God himself)

G3173.def: (including the prolonged forms, feminine , plural , etc.; compare also G3176 (μέγιστος), G3187 (μείζων)); big (literally or figuratively, in a very wide application)
G3173.kjv: (+ fear) exceedingly, great(-est), high, large, loud, mighty, + (be) sore (afraid), strong, X to years

G3176.def: superlative of G3173 (μέγας); greatest or very great.

G3177.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G2059 (ἑρμηνεύω); to explain over, i.e. translate.

G3178.def: apparently a primary word; an intoxicant, i.e. (by implication) intoxication.

G3179.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to transfer, i.e. carry away, depose or (figuratively) exchange, seduce.
G3179.kjv: put out, remove, translate, turn away

G3180.def: from a compound of G3326 (μετά) and G3593 (ὁδεύω) (compare "method"); travelling over, i.e. travesty (trickery)

G3181.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G3725 (ὅριον); bounded alongside, i.e. contiguous (neuter plural as noun, frontier)

G3182.def: a prolonged (transitive) form of G3184 (μεθύω); to intoxicate.

G3183.def: from G3184 (μεθύω); tipsy, i.e. (as noun) a sot.

G3184.def: from another form of G3178 (μέθη); to drink to intoxication, i.e. get drunk.

G3185.def: neuter of G3187 (μείζων); (adverbially) in greater degree.

G3186.def: continued comparative of G3187 (μείζων); still larger (figuratively)

G3187.def: irregular comparative of G3173 (μέγας); larger (literally or figuratively, specially, in age)

G3188.def: neuter of G3189 (μέλας) as noun; ink.

G3190.def: of uncertain origin; Meleas, an Israelite.

G3191.def: from a presumed derivative of G3199 (μέλω); to take care of, i.e. (by implication) revolve in the mind.

G3193.def: from G3192 (μέλι); relating to honey, i.e. bee (comb)

G3194.def: of uncertain origin; Melita, an island in the Mediterranean.

G3195.def: a strengthened form of G3199 (μέλω) (through the idea of expectation); to intend, i.e. be about to be, do, or suffer something (of persons or things, especially events; in the sense of purpose, duty, necessity, probability, possibility, or hesitation)
G3195.kjv: about, after that, be (almost), (that which is, things, + which was for) to come, intend, was to (be), mean, mind, be at the point, (be) ready, + return, shall (begin), (which, that) should (after, afterwards, hereafter) tarry, which was for, will, would, be yet

G3196.def: of uncertain affinity; a limb or part of the body.

G3197.def: of Hebrew origin (H04428 with pronominal suffix, my king); Melchi (i.e. Malki), the name of two Israelites.

G3198.def: of Hebrew origin (H04442); Melchisedek (i.e. Malkitsedek), a patriarch.

G3199.def: a primary verb; to be of interest to, i.e. to concern (only third person singular present indicative used impersonally, it matters)

G3201.def: middle voice of an apparently primary verb; to blame.

G3202.def: from a presumed derivative of G3201 (μέμφομαι) and (fate; akin to the base of G3313 (μέρος)); blaming fate, i.e. querulous (discontented)

G3303.def: a primary particle; properly, indicative of affirmation or concession (in fact); usually followed by a contrasted clause with G1161 (δέ) (this one, the former, etc.)
G3303.kjv: even, indeed, so, some, truly, verily

G3304.def: from G3203 and G3767 (οὖν) and G1065 (γέ); so then at least.

G3305.def: from G3203 and G5104 (τοί); indeed though, i.e. however.

G3306.def: a primary verb; to stay (in a given place, state, relation or expectancy)
G3306.kjv: abide, continue, dwell, endure, be present, remain, stand, tarry (for), X thine own

G3307.def: from G3313 (μέρος); to part, i.e. (literally) to apportion, bestow, share, or (figuratively) to disunite, differ.
G3307.kjv: deal, be difference between, distribute, divide, give participle

G3308.def: from G3307 (μερίζω) (through the idea of distraction); solicitude.

G3309.def: from G3308 (μέριμνα); to be anxious about.

G3310.def: feminine of G3313 (μέρος); a portion, i.e. province, share or (abstractly) participation.

G3311.def: from G3307 (μερίζω); a separation or distribution.

G3313.def: from an obsolete but more primary form of (to get as a section or allotment); a division or share (literally or figuratively, in a wide application)
G3313.kjv: behalf, course, coast, craft, particular (+ -ly), part (+ -ly), piece, portion, respect, side, some sort(-what)

G3314.def: from G3319 (μέσος) and G2250 (ἡμέρα); midday; by implication, the south.

G3315.def: from G3316 (μεσίτης); to interpose (as arbiter), i.e (by implication) to ratify (as surety)

G3316.def: from G3319 (μέσος); a go-between, i.e. (simply) an internunciator, or (by implication) a reconciler (intercessor)

G3317.def: neuter of compound of G3319 (μέσος) and G3571 (νύξ); midnight (especially as a watch)

G3318.def: from G3319 (μέσος) and G4215 (ποταμός); Mesopotamia (as lying between the Euphrates and the Tigris; compare 0763), a region of Asia.

G3319.def: from G3326 (μετά); middle (as an adjective or (neuter) noun)
G3319.kjv: among, X before them, between, + forth, mid(-day, -night), midst, way

G3320.def: from G3319 (μέσος) and G5109 (τοῖχος); a partition (figuratively)

G3321.def: from a presumed compound of G3319 (μέσος) and G3772 (οὐρανός); mid-sky.

G3322.def: from G3319 (μέσος); to form the middle, i.e. (in point of time), to be half-way over.

G3323.def: of Hebrew origin (H04899); the Messias (i.e. Mashiach), or Christ.

G3324.def: of uncertain derivation; replete (literally or figuratively)

G3325.def: from G3324 (μεστός); to replenish, i.e. (by implication) to intoxicate.

G3326.def: a primary preposition (often used adverbially); properly, denoting accompaniment; "amid" (local or causal); modified variously according to the case (genitive association, or accusative succession) with which it is joined; occupying an intermediate position between G575 (ἀπό) or G1537 (ἐκ) and G1519 (εἰς) or G4314 (πρός); less intimate than G1722 (ἐν) and less close than G4862 (σύν))
G3326.kjv: after(-ward), X that he again, against, among, X and, + follow, hence, hereafter, in, of, (up-)on, + our, X and setting, since, (un-)to, + together, when, with (+ -out)

G3327.def: from G3326 (μετά) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to change place.

G3328.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw over, i.e. (middle voice figuratively) to turn about in opinion.

G3329.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G718 (ἁρμόζω); to lead over, i.e. transfer (direct)

G3330.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to give over, i.e. share.

G3331.def: from G3346 (μετατίθημι); transposition, i.e. transferral (to heaven), disestablishment (of a law)

G3332.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G142 (αἴρω); to betake oneself, i.e. remove (locally)

G3333.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G2564 (καλέω); to call elsewhere, i.e. summon.

G3334.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G2795 (κινέω); to stir to a place elsewhere, i.e. remove (figuratively)

G3335.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to participate; genitive case, to accept (and use)
G3335.kjv: eat, have, be partaker, receive, take

G3337.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G236 (ἀλλάσσω); to exchange.

G3338.def: from G3326 (μετά) and the middle voice of G3199 (μέλω); to care afterwards, i.e. regret.

G3339.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G3445 (μορφόω); to transform (literally or figuratively, "metamorphose")

G3340.def: from G3326 and G3539; to think differently or afterwards, i.e., reconsider (morally, feel compunction).

G3341.def: from G3340 (μετανοέω); (subjectively) compunction (for guilt, including reformation); by implication, reversal (of (another's) decision)

G3342.def: from G3326 (μετά) and a form of G4862 (σύν); betwixt (of place or person); (of time) as adjective, intervening, or (by implication) adjoining.

G3343.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G3992 (πέμπω); to send from elsewhere, i.e. (middle voice) to summon or invite.

G3344.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G4762 (στρέφω); to turn across, i.e. transmute or (figuratively) corrupt.

G3345.def: from G3326 (μετά) and a derivative of G4976 (σχῆμα); to transfigure or disguise; figuratively, to apply (by accommodation)

G3346.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G5087 (τίθημι); to transfer, i.e. (literally) transport, (by implication) exchange, (reflexively) change sides, or (figuratively) pervert.
G3346.kjv: carry over, change, remove, translate, turn

G3348.def: from G3326 (μετά) and G2192 (ἔχω); to share or participate; by implication, belong to, eat (or drink)
G3348.kjv: be partaker, pertain, take part, use

G3349.def: from a compound of G3326 (μετά) and a collateral form of G142 (αἴρω) or perhaps rather G109 (ἀήρ) (compare "meteor"); to raise in mid-air, i.e. (figuratively) suspend (passively, fluctuate or be anxious)

G3350.def: from a derivative of a compound of G3326 (μετά) and G3624 (οἶκος); a change of abode, i.e. (specially), expatriation.

G3351.def: from the same as G3350 (μετοικεσία); to transfer as a settler or captive, i.e colonize or exile.

G3353.def: from G3348 (μετέχω); participant, i.e. (as noun) a sharer; by implication, an associate.

G3354.def: from G3358 (μέτρον); to measure (i.e. ascertain in size by a fixed standard); by implication, to admeasure (i.e. allot by rule)

G3355.def: from G3354 (μετρέω); a measurer, i.e. (specially), a certain standard measure of capacity for liquids.

G3356.def: from a compound of the base of G3357 (μετρίως) and G3806 (πάθος); to be moderate in passion, i.e. gentle (to treat indulgently)

G3357.def: adverb from a derivative of G3358 (μέτρον); moderately, i.e. slightly.

G3358.def: an apparently primary word; a measure ("metre"), literally or figuratively; by implication, a limited portion (degree)

G3359.def: from G3326 (μετά) and ops (the face); the forehead (as opposite the countenance)

G3360.def: from G3372 (μῆκος); as far as, i.e. up to a certain point (as a preposition, of extent (denoting the terminus, whereas G891 (ἄχρι) refers especially to the space of time or place intervening) or conjunction)

G3361.def: a primary particle of qualified negation (whereas G3756 (οὐ) expresses an absolute denial); (adverb) not, (conjunction) lest; also (as an interrogative implying a negative answer (whereas G3756 (οὐ) expects an affirmative one)) whether.
G3361.kjv: any but (that), X forbear, + God forbid, + lack, lest, neither, never, no (X wise in), none, nor, (can-)not, nothing, that not, un(-taken), without

G3362.def: i.e. G1437 (ἐάν) and G3361 (μή); if not, i.e. unless.
G3362.kjv: X before, but, except, if, no, (if, + whosoever) not

G3363.def: i.e. G2443 (ἵνα) and G3361 (μή); in order (or so) that not.

G3364.def: i.e. G3756 (οὐ) and G3361 (μή); a double negative strengthening the denial; not at all.
G3364.kjv: any more, at all, by any (no) means, neither, never, no (at all), in no case (wise), nor ever, not (at all, in any wise)

G3365.def: adverb from a compound of G3361 (μή) and (somebody); by no means.

G3366.def: from G3361 (μή) and G1161 (δέ); but not, not even; in a continued negation, nor.
G3366.kjv: neither, nor (yet), (no) not (once, so much as)

G3367.def: from G3361 (μή) and G1520 (εἷς); not even one (man, woman, thing)
G3367.kjv: any (man, thing), no (man), none, not (at all, any man, a whit), nothing, + without delay

G3368.def: from G3366 (μηδέ) and G4218 (ποτέ); not even ever.

G3369.def: from G3366 (μηδέ) and G4452 (-πω); not even yet.

G3370.def: of foreign origin (compare H04074); a Median, or inhabitant of Media.

G3371.def: from G3361 (μή) and G2089 (ἔτι); no further.
G3371.kjv: any longer, (not) henceforth, hereafter, no henceforward (longer, more, soon), not any more

G3372.def: probably akin to G3173 (μέγας); length (literally or figuratively) length.

G3373.def: from G3372 (μῆκος); to lengthen, i.e. (middle voice) to enlarge.

G3375.def: a stronger form of G3303 (μέν); a particle of affirmation (only with G2229 (ἦ)); assuredly.

G3377.def: probably from the same base as G3145 (μασσάομαι) and G3415 (μνάομαι) (i.e. , to strive); to disclose (through the idea of mental effort and thus calling to mind), i.e. report, declare, intimate.

G3378.def: i.e. G3361 (μή) and G3756 (οὐ); as interrogative and negative, is it not that?.

G3379.def: from G3361 (μή) and G4218 (ποτέ); not ever; also if (or lest) ever (or perhaps)
G3379.kjv: if peradventure, lest (at any time, haply), not at all, whether or not

G3380.def: from G3361 (μή) and G4452 (-πω); not yet.

G3381.def: from G3361 (μή) and G4458 (-πώς); lest somehow.
G3381.kjv: lest (by any means, by some means, haply, perhaps)

G3382.def: perhaps a primary word; a thigh.

G3383.def: from G3361 (μή) and G5037 (τέ); not too, i.e. (in continued negation) neither or nor; also, not even.

G3384.def: apparently a primary word; a "mother" (literally or figuratively, immediate or remote)

G3385.def: from G3361 (μή) and the neuter of G5100 (τὶς); whether at all.
G3385.kjv: not (the particle usually not expressed, except by the form of the question)

G3386.def: from G3385 (μήτι) and G1065 (γέ); not at all then, i.e. not to say (the rather still)

G3387.def: from G3361 (μή) and G5100 (τὶς); whether any.
G3387.kjv: any (sometimes unexpressed except by the simple interrogative form of the sentence)

G3389.def: from G3384 (μήτηρ) and the base of G257 (ἅλων); a mother-thresher, i.e. matricide.

G3390.def: from G3384 (μήτηρ) and G4172 (πόλις); a mother city, i.e. "metropolis".

G3391.def: irregular feminine of G1520 (εἷς); one or first.
G3391.kjv: a (certain), + agree, first, one, X other

G3392.def: perhaps a primary verb; to sully or taint, i.e. contaminate (ceremonially or morally)

G3397.def: masculine or neuter singular of G3398 (μικρός) (as noun); a small space of time or degree.

G3398.def: apparently a primary word; small (in size, quantity, number or (figuratively) dignity)

G3399.def: of uncertain origin; Miletus, a city of Asia Minor.

G3400.def: of Latin origin; a thousand paces, i.e. a "mile".

G3403.def: a prolonged form of G3415 (μνάομαι) (from which some of the tenses are borrowed); to remind, i.e. (middle voice) to recall to mind.

G3404.def: from a primary (hatred); to detest (especially to persecute); by extension, to love less.

G3406.def: from G3409 (μισθόω) and G591 (ἀποδίδωμι); a renumerator.

G3408.def: apparently a primary word; pay for service (literally or figuratively), good or bad.

G3409.def: from G3408 (μισθός); to let out for wages, i.e. (middle voice) to hire.

G3411.def: from G3409 (μισθόω); a wage-worker (good or bad)

G3412.def: for (abounding in shellfish); Mitylene (or Mytilene), a town on the island of Lesbos.

G3413.def: of Hebrew origin (H04317); Michael, an archangel.

G3414.def: of Latin origin; a mna (i.e. mina), a certain weight.

G3415.def: middle voice of a derivative of G3306 (μένω) or perhaps of the base of G3145 (μασσάομαι) (through the idea of fixture in the mind or of mental grasp); to bear in mind, i.e. recollect; by implication, to reward or punish.
G3415.kjv: be mindful, remember, come (have) in remembrance

G3416.def: of uncertain origin; Mnason, a Christian.

G3417.def: from G3415 (μνάομαι) or G3403 (μιμνήσκω); recollection; by implication, recital.

G3418.def: from G3415 (μνάομαι); a memorial, i.e. sepulchral monument (burial-place)

G3419.def: from G3420 (μνήμη); a remembrance, i.e. cenotaph (place of interment)

G3421.def: from a derivative of G3420 (μνήμη); to exercise memory, i.e. recollect; by implication, to punish; also to rehearse.

G3422.def: from G3421 (μνημονεύω); a reminder (memorandum), i.e. record.

G3423.def: from a derivative of G3415 (μνάομαι); to give a souvenir (engagement present), i.e. betroth.

G3424.def: from G3425 (μόγις) and G2980 (λαλέω); hardly talking, i.e. dumb (tongue-tied)
G3424.kjv: having an impediment in his speech

G3425.def: adverb from a primary (toil); with difficulty.

G3426.def: of Latin origin; a modius, i.e. certain measure for things dry (the quantity or the utensil)

G3427.def: the simpler form of G1698 (ἐμοί); to me.

G3428.def: a prolonged form of the feminine of G3432 (μοιχός); an adulteress (literally or figuratively)

G3429.def: from G3432 (μοιχός); (middle voice) to commit adultery.

G3432.def: perhaps a primary word; a (male) paramour; figuratively, apostate.

G3433.def: probably by variation for G3425 (μόγις); with difficulty.

G3434.def: of Hebrew origin (H04432); Moloch (i.e. Molek), an idol.

G3436.def: from G3435 (μολύνω); a stain; i.e. (figuratively) immorality.

G3437.def: from G3201 (μέμφομαι); blame, i.e. (by implication), a fault.

G3438.def: from G3306 (μένω); a staying, i.e. residence (the act or the place)

G3439.def: from G3441 and G1096; only-born, i.e., sole.

G3440.def: neuter of G3441 (μόνος) as adverb; merely.

G3441.def: probably from G3306 (μένω); remaining, i.e. sole or single; by implication, mere.

G3443.def: from G3441 (μόνος); to isolate, i.e. bereave.

G3444.def: perhaps from the base of G3313 (μέρος) (through the idea of adjustment of parts); shape; figuratively, nature.

G3445.def: from the same as G3444 (μορφή); to fashion (figuratively)

G3446.def: from G3445 (μορφόω); formation, i.e. (by implication), appearance (semblance or (concretely) formula)

G3447.def: from G3448 (μόσχος) and G4160 (ποιέω); to fabricate the image of a bullock.

G3448.def: probably strengthened for (a shoot); a young bullock.

G3449.def: from the base of G3425 (μόγις); toil, i.e. (by implication) sadness.

G3450.def: the simpler form of G1700 (ἐμοῦ); of me.

G3451.def: from (a Muse); "musical", i.e. (as noun) a minstrel.

G3452.def: perhaps a primary word; the marrow.

G3453.def: from the base of G3466 (μυστήριον); to initiate, i.e. (by implication) to teach.

G3454.def: perhaps from the same as G3453 (μυέω) (through the idea of tuition); a tale, i.e. fiction ("myth")

G3455.def: from a presumed derivative of ( to "moo"); to bellow (roar)

G3456.def: from a derivative of the base of G3455 (μυκάομαι) (meaning snout, as that whence lowing proceeds); to make mouths at, i.e. ridicule.

G3457.def: from G3458 (μύλος); belonging to a mill.

G3458.def: probably ultimately from the base of G3433 (μόλις) (through the idea of hardship); a "mill", i.e. (by implication), a grinder (millstone)

G3460.def: of uncertain derivation; Myra, a place in Asia Minor.

G3461.def: from G3463 (μύριοι); a ten-thousand; by extension, a "myriad" or indefinite number.

G3462.def: from G3464 (μύρον); to apply (perfumed) unguent to.

G3463.def: plural of an apparently primary word (properly, meaning very many); ten thousand; by extension, innumerably many.

G3464.def: probably of foreign origin (compare H04753, G4666 (σμύρνα)); "myrrh", i.e. (by implication) perfumed oil.

G3465.def: of uncertain origin; Mysia, a region of Asia Minor.

G3466.def: from a derivative of (to shut the mouth); a secret or "mystery" (through the idea of silence imposed by initiation into religious rites)

G3467.def: from a compound of the base of G3466 (μυστήριον) and (the face; from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)); to shut the eyes, i.e. blink (see indistinctly)

G3468.def: from ("moil"; probably akin to the base of G3433 (μόλις)) and probably (the face; from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)); a mole ("black eye") or blow-mark.

G3469.def: from G3470 (μῶμος); to carp at, i.e. censure (discredit)

G3470.def: perhaps from G3201 (μέμφομαι); a flaw or blot, i.e. (figuratively) disgraceful person.

G3471.def: from G3474 (μωρός); to become insipid; figuratively, to make (passively, act) as a simpleton.
G3471.kjv: become fool, make foolish, lose savour

G3473.def: from a compound of G3474 (μωρός) and G3004 (λέγω); silly talk, i.e. buffoonery.

G3474.def: probably from the base of G3466 (μυστήριον); dull or stupid (as if shut up), i.e. heedless, (morally) blockhead, (apparently) absurd.

G3475.def: of Hebrew origin; (H04872); Moseus, Moses, or Mouses (i.e. Mosheh), the Hebrew lawgiver.

G3476.def: of Hebrew origin (H05177); Naasson (i.e. Nachshon), an Israelite.

G3477.def: probably of Hebrew origin (compare H05052); Nangæ (i.e. perhaps Nogach), an Israelite.

G3478.def: of uncertain derivation; Nazareth or Nazaret, a place in Palestine.

G3479.def: from G3478 (Ναζαρέθ); a Nazarene, i.e. inhabitant of Nazareth.

G3480.def: from G3478 (Ναζαρέθ); a Nazoræan, i.e. inhabitant of Nazareth; by extension, a Christian.

G3481.def: of Hebrew origin (H05416); Nathan, an Israelite.

G3482.def: of Hebrew origin (H05417); Nathanaël (i.e. Nathanel), an Israelite and Christian.

G3483.def: a primary particle of strong affirmation; yes.
G3483.kjv: even so, surely, truth, verily, yea, yes

G3484.def: probably of Hebrew origin (compare H04999); Nain, a place in Palestine.

G3485.def: from a primary (to dwell); a fane, shrine, temple.

G3486.def: of Hebrew origin (H05151); Naum (i.e. Nachum), an Israelite.

G3488.def: a flower of the same name, from (stupefaction, as a "narcotic"); Narcissus, a Roman.

G3489.def: from a compound of G3491 (ναῦς) and G71 (ἄγω); to be shipwrecked (stranded, "navigate"), literally or figuratively.

G3490.def: from G3491 (ναῦς) and G2819 (κλῆρος) ("clerk"); a captain.

G3491.def: from or (to float); a boat (of any size)

G3492.def: from G3491 (ναῦς); a boatman, i.e. seaman.

G3493.def: of Hebrew origin (H05152); Nachor, the grandfather of Abraham.

G3494.def: from a derivative of G3501 (νέος); a youth (up to about forty years)

G3495.def: from the same as G3494 (νεανίας); a youth (under forty)

G3496.def: from G3501 (νέος) and G4172 (πόλις); new town; Neapolis, a place in Macedonia.

G3497.def: of Hebrew origin (H05283); Neeman (i.e. Naaman), a Syrian.

G3498.def: from an apparently primary (a corpse); dead (literally or figuratively; also as noun)

G3499.def: from G3498 (νεκρός); to deaden, i.e. (figuratively) to subdue.

G3501.def: including the comparative ; a primary word; "new", i.e. (of persons) youthful, or (of things) fresh; figuratively, regenerate.

G3504.def: from G3501 (νέος) and a derivative of G5453 (φύω); newly planted, i.e. (figuratively) a young convert ("neophyte")

G3505.def: of Latin origin; Neron (i.e. Nero), a Roman emperor.

G3506.def: apparently a primary verb; to "nod", i.e. (by analogy), signal.

G3507.def: from G3509 (νέφος); properly, cloudiness, i.e. (concretely) a cloud.

G3508.def: of Hebrew origin (H05321); Nephthaleim (i.e. Naphthali), a tribe in Palestine.

G3509.def: apparently a primary word; a cloud.

G3510.def: of uncertain affinity; a kidney (plural), i.e. (figuratively) the inmost mind.

G3511.def: from a form of G3485 (ναός) and (to sweep); a temple-servant, i.e. (by implication) a votary.

G3512.def: from the comparative of G3501 (νέος); appertaining to younger persons, i.e. juvenile.

G3513.def: probably an intensive form of G3483 (ναί); a particle of attestation (accompanied by the object invoked or appealed to in confirmation); as sure as.

G3515.def: from G3516 (νήπιος); to act as a babe, i.e. (figuratively) innocently.

G3516.def: from an obsolete particle (implying negation) and G2031 (ἔπος); not speaking, i.e. an infant (minor); figuratively, a simple-minded person, an immature Christian.

G3517.def: apparently from a derivative of the base of G3491 (ναῦς) (meaning wet); Nereus, a Christian.

G3518.def: of Hebrew origin (H05374); Neri (i.e. Nerijah), an Israelite.

G3520.def: probably from the base of G3491 (ναῦς); an island.

G3521.def: from G3522 (νηστεύω); abstinence (from lack of food, or voluntary and religious); specially, the fast of the Day of Atonement.

G3522.def: from G3523 (νῆστις); to abstain from food (religiously)

G3523.def: from the inseparable negative particle (not) and G2068 (ἐσθίω); not eating, i.e. abstinent from food (religiously)

G3525.def: of uncertain affinity; to abstain from wine (keep sober), i.e. (figuratively) be discreet.

G3526.def: of Latin origin; black; Niger, a Christian.

G3527.def: probably from G3528 (νικάω); victorious; Nicanor, a Christian.

G3528.def: from G3529 (νίκη); to subdue (literally or figuratively)
G3528.kjv: conquer, overcome, prevail, get the victory

G3529.def: apparently a primary word; conquest (abstractly), i.e. (figuratively) the means of success.

G3530.def: from G3534 (νῖκος) and G1218 (δῆμος); victorious among his people; Nicodemus, an Israelite.

G3531.def: from G3532 (Νικόλαος); a Nicolaite, i.e. adherent of Nicolaus.

G3532.def: from G3534 (νῖκος) and G2994 (Λαοδικεύς); victorious over the people; Nicolaus, a heretic.

G3533.def: from G3534 (νῖκος) and G4172 (πόλις); victorious city; Nicopolis, a place in Macedonia.

G3534.def: from G3529 (νίκη); a conquest (concretely), i.e. (by implication) triumph.

G3535.def: of Hebrew origin (H05210); Ninevi (i.e. Nineveh), the capital of Assyria.

G3536.def: from G3535 (Νινευΐ); a Ninevite, i.e. inhabitant of Nineveh.

G3538.def: to cleanse (especially the hands or the feet or the face); ceremonially, to perform ablution.

G3539.def: from G3563 (νοῦς); to exercise the mind (observe), i.e. (figuratively) to comprehend, heed.

G3540.def: from G3539 (νοιέω); a perception, i.e. purpose, or (by implication) the intellect, disposition, itself.

G3541.def: of uncertain affinity; a spurious or illegitimate son.

G3542.def: feminine from the same as G3551 (νόμος); pasture, i.e. (the act) feeding (figuratively, spreading of a gangrene), or (the food) pasturage.

G3543.def: from G3551 (νόμος); properly, to do by law (usage), i.e. to accustom (passively, be usual); by extension, to deem or regard.

G3544.def: from G3551 (νόμος); according (or pertaining) to law, i.e. legal (ceremonially); as noun, an expert in the (Mosaic) law.

G3545.def: adverb from a derivative of G3551 (νόμος); legitimately (specially, agreeably to the rules of the lists)

G3546.def: from G3543 (νομίζω); what is reckoned as of value (after the Latin numisma), i.e. current coin.

G3547.def: from G3551 (νόμος) and G1320 (διδάσκαλος); an expounder of the (Jewish) law, i.e. a Rabbi.

G3548.def: from G3550 (νομοθέτης); legislation (specially, the institution of the Mosaic code)

G3549.def: from G3550 (νομοθέτης); to legislate, i.e. (passively) to have (the Mosaic) enactments injoined, be sanctioned (by them)

G3550.def: from G3551 (νόμος) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι); a legislator.

G3551.def: from a primary νέμω (to parcel out, especially food or grazing to animals); law (through the idea of prescriptive usage).

G3552.def: from G3554 (νόσος); to be sick, i.e. (by implication, of a diseased appetite) to hanker after (figuratively, to harp upon)

G3554.def: of uncertain affinity; a malady (rarely figuratively, of moral disability)

G3557.def: middle voice from (apart or clandestinely); to sequestrate for oneself, i.e. embezzle.

G3558.def: of uncertain affinity; the south(-west) wind; by extension, the southern quarter itself.

G3559.def: from G3563 (νοῦς) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι); calling attention to, i.e. (by implication) mild rebuke or warning.

G3560.def: from the same as G3559 (νουθεσία); to put in mind, i.e. (by implication) to caution or reprove gently.

G3561.def: feminine of a compound of G3501 (νέος) and G3376 (μήν) (as noun by implication, of G2250 (ἡμέρα)); the festival of new moon.

G3562.def: adverb from a comparative of the accusative case of G3563 (νοῦς) and G2192 (ἔχω); in a mind-having way, i.e. prudently.

G3563.def: probably from the base of G1097 (γινώσκω); the intellect, i.e. mind (divine or human; in thought, feeling, or will); by implication, meaning.

G3564.def: probably contracted for a compound of G3565 (νύμφη) and G1435 (δῶρον); nymph-given (i.e. -born); Nymphas, a Christian.

G3565.def: from a primary but obsolete verb (to veil as a bride; compare Latin "nupto," to marry); a young married woman (as veiled), including a betrothed girl; by implication, a son's wife.

G3566.def: from G3565 (νύμφη); a bride-groom (literally or figuratively)

G3568.def: a primary particle of present time; "now" (as adverb of date, a transition or emphasis); also as noun or adjective present or immediate.
G3568.kjv: henceforth, + hereafter, of late, soon, present, this (time)

G3569.def: from neuter plural of G3588 (ὁ) and G3568 (νῦν); the things now, i.e. (adverbially) at present.

G3570.def: a prolonged form of G3568 (νῦν) for emphasis; just now.

G3572.def: apparently a primary word; to prick ("nudge")

G3573.def: from a presumed derivative of G3506 (νεύω); to nod, i.e. (by implication) to fall asleep; figuratively, to delay.

G3574.def: from G3571 (νύξ) and G2250 (ἡμέρα); a day-and-night, i.e. full day of twenty-four hours.

G3575.def: of Hebrew origin (H05146); Noë, (i.e. Noäch), a patriarch.

G3576.def: from a derivative of G3541 (νόθος); sluggish, i.e. (literally) lazy, or (figuratively) stupid.

G3578.def: from G3581 (ξένος); hospitality, i.e. (by implication) a place of entertainment.

G3579.def: from G3581 (ξένος); to be a host (passively, a guest); by implication, be (make, appear) strange.

G3580.def: from a compound of G3581 (ξένος) and G1209 (δέχομαι); to be hospitable.

G3581.def: apparently a primary word; foreign (literally, alien, or figuratively, novel); by implication, a guest or (vice-versa) entertainer.

G3582.def: as if from (properly, to smooth; by implication, (of friction) to boil or heat); a vessel (as fashioned or for cooking) (or perhaps by corruption from the Latin sextarius, the sixth of a modius, i.e. about a pint), i.e. (specially), a measure for liquids or solids, (by analogy, a pitcher)

G3583.def: from G3584 (ξηρός); to desiccate; by implication, to shrivel, to mature.
G3583.kjv: dry up, pine away, be ripe, wither (away)

G3584.def: from the base of G3582 (ξέστης) (through the idea of scorching); arid; by implication, shrunken, earth (as opposed to water)

G3586.def: from another form of the base of G3582 (ξέστης); timber (as fuel or material); by implication, a stick, club or tree or other wooden article or substance.

G3587.def: from a derivative of the same as G3586 (ξύλον) (meaning a razor); to shave or "shear" the hair.

G3588.def: the definite article; the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)
G3588.kjv: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc

G3591.def: probably from the same as G43 (ἀγκάλη); a mass (as bending or bulging by its load), i.e. burden (hindrance)

G3592.def: from G3588 (ὁ) and G1161 (δέ); the same, i.e. this or that one (plural these or those); often used as a personal pronoun.

G3594.def: from G3595 (ὁδηγός); to show the way (literally or figuratively (teach))

G3595.def: from G3598 (ὁδός) and G2233 (ἡγέομαι); a conductor (literally or figuratively (teacher))

G3596.def: from a compound of G3598 (ὁδός) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to be a wayfarer, i.e. travel.

G3597.def: from the same as G3596 (ὁδοιπορέω); travel.

G3598.def: apparently a primary word; a road; by implication, a progress (the route, act or distance); figuratively, a mode or means.

G3599.def: perhaps from the base of G2068 (ἐσθίω); a "tooth".

G3602.def: from a derivative of the base of G1416 (δύνω); moaning, i.e. lamentation.

G3603.def: from the neuter of G3739 (ὅς) and the third person singular present indicative of G1510 (εἰμί); which is.
G3603.kjv: called, which is (make), that is (to say)

G3604.def: of Hebrew origin (H05818); Ozias (i.e. Uzzijah), an Israelite.

G3605.def: a primary verb (in a strengthened form); to scent (usually an ill "odor")

G3606.def: from G3739 (ὅς) with the directive enclitic of source; from which place or source or cause (adverb or conjunction)

G3607.def: of uncertain affinity; a linen cloth, i.e. (especially) a sail.

G3608.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3607 (ὀθόνη); a linen bandage.

G3609.def: from G3624 (οἶκος); domestic, i.e. (as noun), a relative, adherent.

G3610.def: from G3611 (οἰκέω); a fellow resident, i.e. menial domestic.

G3611.def: from G3624 (οἶκος); to occupy a house, i.e. reside (figuratively, inhabit, remain, inhere); by implication, to cohabit.

G3612.def: from G3611 (οἰκέω); a tenement, i.e. (specially), a jail.

G3613.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3611 (οἰκέω) (equivalent to G3612 (οἴκημα)); a residence (literally or figuratively)

G3614.def: from G3624 (οἶκος); properly, residence (abstractly), but usually (concretely) an abode (literally or figuratively); by implication, a family (especially domestics)

G3615.def: from G3614 (οἰκία); familiar, i.e. (as noun) relatives.

G3616.def: from G3617 (οἰκοδεσπότης); to be the head of (i.e. rule) a family.

G3617.def: from G3624 (οἶκος) and G1203 (δεσπότης); the head of a family.
G3617.kjv: goodman (of the house), householder, master of the house

G3618.def: from the same as G3619 (οἰκοδομή); to be a house-builder, i.e. construct or (figuratively) confirm.

G3619.def: feminine (abstract) of a compound of G3624 (οἶκος) and the base of G1430 (δῶμα); architecture, i.e. (concretely) a structure; figuratively, confirmation.

G3620.def: from the same as G3619 (οἰκοδομή); confirmation.

G3621.def: from G3623 (οἰκονόμος); to manage (a house, i.e. an estate)

G3622.def: from G3623 (οἰκονόμος); administration (of a household or estate); specially, a (religious) "economy".

G3623.def: from G3624 (οἶκος) and the base of G3551 (νόμος); a house-distributor (i.e. manager), or overseer, i.e. an employee in that capacity; by extension, a fiscal agent (treasurer); figuratively, a preacher (of the Gospel)

G3624.def: of uncertain affinity; a dwelling (more or less extensive, literal or figurative); by implication, a family.

G3625.def: feminine participle present passive of G3611 (οἰκέω) (as noun, by implication, of G1093 (γῆ)); land, i.e. the (terrene part of the) globe; specially, the Roman empire.

G3626.def: from G3624 (οἶκος) and (a guard; be "ware"); a stayer at home, i.e. domestically inclined (a "good housekeeper")

G3630.def: from G3631 (οἶνος) and a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω); a tippler.

G3631.def: a primary word (or perhaps of Hebrew origin (H03196)); "wine" (literally or figuratively)

G3632.def: from G3631 (οἶνος) and a form of the base of G5397 (φλύαρος); an overflow (or surplus) of wine, i.e. vinolency (drunkenness)

G3633.def: middle voice apparently from G3634 (οἷος); to make like (oneself), i.e. imagine (be of the opinion)

G3634.def: probably akin to G3588 (ὁ), G3739 (ὅς), and G3745 (ὅσος); such or what sort of (as a correlation or exclamation); especially the neuter (adverbially) with negative, not so.
G3634.kjv: so (as), such as, what (manner of), which

G3636.def: from G3635 (ὀκνέω); tardy, i.e. indolent; (figuratively) irksome.

G3637.def: from G3638 (ὀκτώ) and G2250 (ἡμέρα); an eight-day old person or act.

G3639.def: from a primary (to destroy; a prolonged form); ruin, i.e. death, punishment.

G3640.def: from G3641 (ὀλίγος) and G4102 (πίστις); incredulous, i.e. lacking confidence (in Christ)

G3641.def: of uncertain affinity; puny (in extent, degree, number, duration or value); especially neuter (adverbially) somewhat.
G3641.kjv: + almost, brief(-ly), few, (a) little, + long, a season, short, small, a while

G3642.def: from G3641 (ὀλίγος) and G6590; little-spirited, i.e. faint-hearted.

G3643.def: from a compound of G3641 (ὀλίγος) and ("care"); to have little regard for, i.e. to disesteem.

G3644.def: from G3645 (ὀλοθρεύω); a ruiner, i.e. (specially), a venomous serpent.

G3645.def: from G3639 (ὄλεθρος); to spoil, i.e. slay.

G3646.def: from a derivative of a compound of G3650 (ὅλος) and a derivative of G2545 (καίω); a wholly-consumed sacrifice ("holocaust")

G3647.def: from G3648 (ὁλόκληρος); integrity, i.e. physical wholeness.

G3648.def: from G3650 (ὅλος) and G2819 (κλῆρος); complete in every part, i.e. perfectly sound (in body)

G3649.def: a reduplicated primary verb; to "howl" or "halloo", i.e. shriek.

G3650.def: a primary word; "whole" or "all", i.e. complete (in extent, amount, time or degree), especially (neuter) as noun or adverb.
G3650.kjv: all, altogether, every whit, + throughout, whole

G3651.def: from G3650 (ὅλος) and G5056 (τέλος); complete to the end, i.e. absolutely perfect.

G3652.def: probably a contraction from (Olympian-bestowed, i.e. heaven-descended); Olympas, a Christian.

G3653.def: of uncertain derivation; an unripe (because out of season) fig.

G3654.def: adverb from G3650 (ὅλος); completely, i.e. altogether; (by analogy), everywhere; (negatively) not by any means.

G3655.def: of uncertain affinity; a thunder storm.

G3656.def: from G3658 (ὅμιλος); to be in company with, i.e. (by implication) to converse.

G3657.def: from G3658 (ὅμιλος); companionship ("homily"), i.e. (by implication) intercourse.

G3658.def: from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and a derivative of the alternate of G138 (αἱρέομαι) (meaning a crowd); association together, i.e. a multitude.

G3659.def: from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); a sight, i.e. (by implication) the eye.

G3660.def: a prolonged form of a primary, but obsolete , for which another prolonged form is used in certain tenses; to swear, i.e. take (or declare on) oath.

G3661.def: adverb from a compound of the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G2372 (θυμός); unanimously.

G3663.def: from G3664 (ὅμοιος) and the alternate of G3958 (πάσχω); similarly affected.

G3664.def: from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ); similar (in appearance or character)

G3666.def: from G3664 (ὅμοιος); to assimilate, i.e. compare; passively, to become similar.

G3667.def: from G3666 (ὁμοιόω); a form; abstractly, resemblance.
G3667.kjv: made like to, likeness, shape, similitude

G3670.def: from a compound of the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G3056 (λόγος); to assent, i.e. covenant, acknowledge.
G3670.kjv: con- (pro-)fess, confession is made, give thanks, promise

G3671.def: from the same as G3670 (ὁμολογέω); acknowledgment.

G3672.def: adverb of present passive participle of G3670 (ὁμολογέω); confessedly.

G3673.def: from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G5078 (τέχνη); a fellow-artificer.

G3674.def: genitive case of (the same; akin to G260 (ἅμα)) as adverb; at the same place or time.

G3675.def: from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ) and G5424 (φρήν); like-minded, i.e. harmonious.

G3676.def: adverb from the base of G3674 (ὁμοῦ); at the same time, i.e. (conjunctionally) notwithstanding, yet still.

G3678.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3688 (ὄνος); a little ass.

G3679.def: from G3681 (ὄνειδος); to defame, i.e. rail at, chide, taunt.
G3679.kjv: cast in teeth, (suffer) reproach, revile, upbraid

G3681.def: probably akin to the base of G3686 (ὄνομα); notoriety, i.e. a taunt (disgrace)

G3682.def: from G3685 (ὀνίνημι); profitable; Onesimus, a Christian.

G3683.def: from a derivative of G3685 (ὀνίνημι) and G5411 (φόρος); profit-bearer; Onesiphorus, a Christian.

G3684.def: from G3688 (ὄνος); belonging to a ass, i.e. large (so as to be turned by a ass)

G3685.def: a prolonged form of an apparently primary verb (, to slur); for which another prolonged form () is used as an alternate in some tenses (unless indeed it be identical with the base of G3686 (ὄνομα) through the idea of notoriety); to gratify, i.e. (middle voice) to derive pleasure or advantage from.

G3686.def: from a presumed derivative of the base of G1097 (compare G3685); a 'name' (literally or figuratively).

G3687.def: from G3686 (ὄνομα); to name, i.e. assign an appellation; by extension, to utter, mention, profess.

G3688.def: apparently a primary word; a donkey.

G3689.def: adverb of the oblique cases of G5607 (ὤν); really.
G3689.kjv: certainly, clean, indeed, of a truth, verily

G3690.def: from G3691 (ὀξύς); vinegar, i.e. sour wine.

G3691.def: probably akin to the base of G188 (ἀκμήν) ("acid"); keen; by analogy, rapid.

G3692.def: probably from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); a hole (as if for light), i.e. cavern; by analogy, a spring (of water)

G3693.def: from (regard; from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)) with enclitic of source; from the rear (as a secure aspect), i.e. at the back (adverb and preposition of place or time)

G3694.def: from the same as G3693 (ὄπισθεν) with enclitic of direction; to the back, i.e. aback (as adverb or preposition of time or place; or as noun)

G3695.def: from G3696 (ὅπλον); to equip (with weapons (middle voice and figuratively))

G3696.def: probably from a primary (to be busy about); an implement or utensil or tool (literally or figuratively, especially, offensive for war)

G3697.def: from G3739 (ὅς) and G4169 (ποῖος); of what kind that, i.e. how (as) great (excellent) (specially, as an indefinite correlative to the definite antecedent G5108 (τοιοῦτος) of quality)
G3697.kjv: what manner (sort) of, such as whatsoever

G3698.def: from G3739 (ὅς) and G4218 (ποτέ); what(-ever) then, i.e. (of time) as soon as.

G3699.def: from G3739 (ὅς) and G4225 (πού); what(-ever) where, i.e. at whichever spot.
G3699.kjv: in what place, where(-as, -soever), whither (+ soever)

G3700.def: a (middle voice) prolonged form of the primary (middle voice) ; which is used for it in certain tenses; and both as alternate of G3708 (ὁράω); to gaze (i.e. with wide-open eyes, as at something remarkable; and thus differing from G991 (βλέπω), which denotes simply voluntary observation; and from G1492 (εἴδω), which expresses merely mechanical, passive or casual vision; while G2300 (θεάομαι), and still more emphatically its intensive G2334 (θεωρέω), signifies an earnest but more continued inspection; and G4648 (σκοπέω) a watching from a distance)

G3701.def: from a presumed derivative of G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); visuality, i.e. (concretely) an apparition.

G3702.def: from an obsolete verb akin to (to "steep"); cooked, i.e. roasted.

G3703.def: apparently from the base of G3796 (ὀψέ) and G5610 (ὥρα); properly, even-tide of the (summer) season (dog-days), i.e. (by implication) ripe fruit.

G3704.def: from G3739 and G4459; what(-ever) how, i.e., in the manner that (as adverb or conjunction of coincidence, intentional or actual).

G3705.def: from G3708 (ὁράω); something gazed at, i.e. a spectacle (especially supernatural)

G3706.def: from G3708 (ὁράω); the act of gazing, i.e. (externally) an aspect or (internally) an inspired appearance.

G3707.def: from G3708 (ὁράω); gazed at, i.e. (by implication) capable of being seen.

G3708.def: properly, to stare at (compare G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)), i.e. (by implication) to discern clearly (physically or mentally); by extension, to attend to; by Hebraism, to experience; passively, to appear.

G3709.def: from G3713 (ὀρέγομαι); properly, desire (as a reaching forth or excitement of the mind), i.e. (by analogy), violent passion (ire, or (justifiable) abhorrence); by implication punishment.

G3710.def: from G3709 (ὀργή); to provoke or enrage, i.e. (passively) become exasperated.

G3712.def: from G3713 (ὀρέγομαι); a stretch of the arms, i.e. a fathom.

G3713.def: middle voice of apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary (compare G3735 (ὄρος)); to stretch oneself, i.e. reach out after (long for)

G3714.def: from G3735 (ὄρος); mountainous, i.e. (feminine by implication, of G5561 (χώρα)) the Highlands (of Judæa)

G3715.def: from G3713 (ὀρέγομαι); excitement of the mind, i.e. longing after.

G3716.def: from a compound of G3717 (ὀρθός) and G4228 (πούς); to be straight-footed, i.e. (figuratively) to go directly forward.

G3717.def: probably from the base of G3735 (ὄρος); right (as rising), i.e. (perpendicularly) erect (figuratively, honest), or (horizontally) level or direct.

G3718.def: from a compound of G3717 (ὀρθός) and the base of G5114 (τομώτερος), to make a straight cut, i.e. (figuratively) to dissect (expound) correctly (the divine message)

G3719.def: from G3722 (ὄρθρος); to use the dawn, i.e. (by implication) to repair betimes.

G3720.def: from G3722 (ὄρθρος); relating to the dawn, i.e. matutinal (as an epithet of Venus, especially brilliant in the early day)

G3721.def: from G3722 (ὄρθρος); in the dawn, i.e. up at day-break.

G3722.def: from the same as G3735 (ὄρος); dawn (as sun-rise, rising of light); by extension, morn.

G3723.def: adverb from G3717 (ὀρθός); in a straight manner, i.e. (figuratively) correctly (also morally)

G3724.def: from G3725 (ὅριον); to mark out or bound ("horizon"), i.e. (figuratively) to appoint, decree, specify.

G3725.def: neuter of a derivative of an apparently primary (a bound or limit); a boundary-line, i.e. (by implication) a frontier (region)

G3726.def: from G3727 (ὅρκος); to put on oath, i.e. make swear; by analogy, to solemnly enjoin.

G3727.def: from (a fence; perhaps akin to G3725 (ὅριον)); a limit, i.e. (sacred) restraint (specially, an oath)

G3728.def: from a compound of G3727 (ὅρκος) and a derivative of G3660 (ὀμνύω); asseveration on oath.

G3729.def: from G3730 (ὁρμή); to start, spur or urge on, i.e. (reflexively) to dash or plunge.

G3730.def: of uncertain affinity; a violent impulse, i.e. onset.

G3731.def: from G3730 (ὁρμή); an attack, i.e. (abstractly) precipitancy.

G3732.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3733 (ὄρνις); a birdling.

G3733.def: probably from a prolonged form of the base of G3735 (ὄρος); a bird (as rising in the air), i.e. (specially), a hen (or female domestic fowl)

G3734.def: from a compound of the base of G3725 (ὅριον) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι); a limit-placing, i.e. (concretely) boundary-line.

G3735.def: probably from an obsolete (to rise or "rear"; perhaps akin to G142 (αἴρω); compare G3733 (ὄρνις)); a mountain (as lifting itself above the plain)

G3736.def: apparently a primary verb; to "burrow" in the ground, i.e. dig.

G3737.def: of uncertain affinity; bereaved ("orphan"), i.e. parentless.

G3738.def: middle voice from (a row or ring); to dance (from the ranklike or regular motion)

G3739.def: probably a primary word (or perhaps a form of the article G3588 (ὁ)); the relatively (sometimes demonstrative) pronoun, who, which, what, that.
G3739.kjv: one, (an-, the) other, some, that, what, which, who(-m, -se), etc

G3740.def: multiple adverb from G3739 (ὅς); how (i.e. with G302 (ἄν), so) many times as.

G3741.def: of uncertain affinity; properly, right (by intrinsic or divine character; thus distinguished from 1342, which refers rather to human statutes and relations; from G2413 (ἱερός), which denotes formal consecration; and from G40 (ἅγιος), which relates to purity from defilement), i.e. hallowed (pious, sacred, sure)

G3745.def: by reduplication from G3739 (ὅς); as (much, great, long, etc.) as.
G3745.kjv: all (that), as (long, many, much) (as), how great (many, much), (in-)asmuch as, so many as, that (ever), the more, those things, what (great, -soever), wheresoever, wherewithsoever, which, X while, who(-soever)

G3746.def: from G3739 (ὅς) and G4007 (περ); who especially.

G3748.def: from G3739 (ὅς) and G5100 (τὶς); which some, i.e. any that; also (definite) which same.
G3748.kjv: X and (they), (such) as, (they) that, in that they, what(-soever), whereas ye, (they) which, who(-soever)

G3749.def: from ("oyster") (a tile, i.e. terra cotta); earthen-ware, i.e. clayey; by implication, frail.

G3750.def: from a derivative of G3605 (ὄζω); smell (the sense)

G3751.def: of uncertain affinity; the loin (externally), i.e. the hip; internally (by extension) procreative power.
