G3752.def: from G3753 (ὅτε) and G302 (ἄν); whenever (implying hypothesis or more or less uncertainty); also causatively (conjunctionally) inasmuch as.
G3752.kjv: as long (soon) as, that, + till, when(-soever), while

G3753.def: from G3739 (ὅς) and G5037 (τέ); at which (thing) too, i.e. when.
G3753.kjv: after (that), as soon as, that, when, while

G3754.def: neuter of G3748 (ὅστις) as conjunction; demonstrative, that (sometimes redundant); causative, because.
G3754.kjv: as concerning that, as though, because (that), for (that), how (that), (in) that, though, why

G3755.def: for the genitive case of G3748 (ὅστις) (as adverb); during which same time, i.e. whilst.

G3756.def: a primary word; the absolute negative (compare G3361 (μή)) adverb; no or not.
G3756.kjv: + long, nay, neither, never, no (X man), none, (can-)not, + nothing, + special, un(-worthy), when, + without, + yet but

G3757.def: genitive case of G3739 (ὅς) as adverb; at which place, i.e. where.

G3760.def: adverb from (the feminine) of G3762 (οὐδείς); by no means.

G3761.def: from G3756 (οὐ) and G1161 (δέ); not however, i.e. neither, nor, not even.
G3761.kjv: neither (indeed), never, no (more, nor, not), nor (yet), (also, even, then) not (even, so much as), + nothing, so much as

G3762.def: from G3761 (οὐδέ) and G1520 (εἷς); not even one (man, woman or thing), i.e. none, nobody, nothing.
G3762.kjv: any (man), aught, man, neither any (thing), never (man), no (man), none (+ of these things), not (any, at all, -thing), nought

G3763.def: from G3761 (οὐδέ) and G4218 (ποτέ); not even at any time, i.e. never at all.
G3763.kjv: neither at any time, never, nothing at any time

G3764.def: from G3761 (οὐδέ) and G4452 (-πω); not even yet.
G3764.kjv: as yet not, never before (yet), (not) yet

G3765.def: from G3756 (οὐ) and G2089 (ἔτι); not yet, no longer.
G3765.kjv: after that (not), (not) any more, henceforth (hereafter) not, no longer (more), not as yet (now), now no more (not), yet (not)

G3766.def: from G3756 (οὐ) and G3767 (οὖν); is it not therefore that, i.e. (affirmatively) hence or so.

G3767.def: apparently a primary word; (adverbially) certainly, or (conjunctionally) accordingly.
G3767.kjv: and (so, truly), but, now (then), so (likewise then), then, therefore, verily, wherefore

G3768.def: from G3756 (οὐ) and G4452 (-πω); not yet.
G3768.kjv: hitherto not, (no…) as yet, not yet

G3769.def: apparently a primary word; a tail.

G3770.def: from G3772 (οὐρανός); celestial, i.e. belonging to or coming from the sky.

G3771.def: from G3772 (οὐρανός) and the enclitic of source; from the sky.

G3772.def: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation); the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)

G3773.def: of Latin origin; Urbanus (of the city, "urbane"), a Christian.

G3774.def: of Hebrew origin (H0223); Urias (i.e. Urijah), a Hittite.

G3775.def: apparently a primary word; the ear (physically or mentally)

G3776.def: from the feminine of G5607 (ὤν); substance, i.e. property (possessions)

G3777.def: from G3756 (οὐ) and G5037 (τέ); not too, i.e. neither or nor; by analogy, not even.
G3777.kjv: neither, none, nor (yet), (no, yet) not, nothing

G3778.def: from the article G3588 (ὁ) and G846 (αὐτός); the he (she or it), i.e. this or that (often with article repeated)
G3778.kjv: he (it was that), hereof, it, she, such as, the same, these, they, this (man, same, woman), which, who

G3779.def: adverb from G3778 (οὗτος); in this way (referring to what precedes or follows)
G3779.kjv: after that, after (in) this manner, as, even (so), for all that, like(-wise), no more, on this fashion(-wise), so (in like manner), thus, what

G3781.def: from G3784 (ὀφείλω); an ower, i.e. person indebted; figuratively, a delinquent; morally, a transgressor (against God)

G3782.def: from G3784 (ὀφείλω); indebtedness, i.e. (concretely) a sum owed; figuratively, obligation, i.e. (conjugal) duty.

G3783.def: from (the alternate of) G3784 (ὀφείλω); something owed, i.e. (figuratively) a due; morally, a fault.

G3784.def: probably from the base of G3786 (ὄφελος) (through the idea of accruing); to owe (pecuniarily); figuratively, to be under obligation (ought, must, should); morally, to fail in duty.
G3784.kjv: behove, be bound, (be) debt(-or), (be) due(-ty), be guilty (indebted), (must) need(-s), ought, owe, should

G3785.def: first person singular of a past tense of G3784 (ὀφείλω); I ought (wish), i.e. (interjection) oh that!.

G3786.def: from (to heap up, i.e. accumulate or benefit); gain.

G3787.def: from G3788 (ὀφθαλμός) and G1397 (δουλεία); sight-labor, i.e. that needs watching (remissness)

G3788.def: from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); the eye (literally or figuratively); by implication, vision; figuratively, envy (from the jealous side-glance)

G3789.def: probably from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) (through the idea of sharpness of vision); a snake, figuratively, (as a type of sly cunning) an artful malicious person, especially Satan.

G3790.def: perhaps from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι) (through the idea of the shading or proximity to the organ of vision); the eye-"brow" or forehead, i.e. (figuratively) the brink of a precipice.

G3791.def: from G3793 (ὄχλος); to mob, i.e. (by implication) to harass.

G3792.def: from G3793 (ὄχλος) and G4160 (ποιέω); to make a crowd, i.e. raise a public disturbance.

G3793.def: from a derivative of G2192 (ἔχω) (meaning a vehicle); a throng (as borne along); by implication, the rabble; by extension, a class of people; figuratively, a riot.
G3793.kjv: company, multitude, number (of people), people, press

G3794.def: from a remote derivative of G2192 (ἔχω) (meaning to fortify, through the idea of holding safely); a castle (figuratively, argument)

G3795.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of the base of G3702 (ὀπτός); a relish to other food (as if cooked sauce), i.e. (specially), fish (presumably salted and dried as a condiment)

G3796.def: from the same as G3694 (ὀπίσω) (through the idea of backwardness); (adverbially) late in the day; by extension, after the close of the day.

G3798.def: from G3796 (ὀψέ); late; feminine (as noun) afternoon (early eve) or nightfall (later eve)

G3799.def: from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι); properly, sight (the act), i.e. (by implication) the visage, an external show.

G3800.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of the same as G3795 (ὀψάριον); rations for a soldier, i.e. (by extension) his stipend or pay.

G3801.word: ὁ ὢν καί ὁ ἦν καί ὁ ἐρχόμενος
G3801.translit: ho ṑn kaí ho ēn kaí ho erchómenos
G3801.def: a phrase combining G3588 (ὁ) with the present participle and imperfect of G1510 (εἰμί) and the present participle of G2064 (ἔρχομαι) by means of G2532 (καί); the one being and the one that was and the one coming, i.e. the Eternal, as a divine epithet of Christ.
G3801.kjv: which art (is, was), and (which) wast (is, was), and art (is) to come (shalt be)

G3803.def: from G4078 (πήγνυμι); a trap (as fastened by a noose or notch); figuratively, a trick or statagem (temptation)

G3804.def: from a presumed derivative of G3806 (πάθος); something undergone, i.e. hardship or pain; subjectively, an emotion or influence.

G3805.def: from the same as G3804 (πάθημα); liable (i.e. doomed) to experience pain.

G3806.def: from the alternate of G3958 (πάσχω); properly, suffering ("pathos"), i.e. (subjectively) a passion (especially concupiscence)

G3807.def: from G3816 (παῖς) and a reduplicated form of G71 (ἄγω); a boy-leader, i.e. a servant whose office it was to take the children to school; (by implication, (figuratively) a tutor ("pædagogue"))

G3808.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G3816 (παῖς); a little boy.

G3809.def: from G3811 (παιδεύω); tutorage, i.e. education or training; by implication, disciplinary correction.

G3810.def: from G3811 (παιδεύω); a trainer, i.e. teacher or (by implication) discipliner.

G3811.def: from G3816 (παῖς); to train up a child, i.e. educate, or (by implication), discipline (by punishment)

G3812.def: adverb (of source) from G3813 (παιδίον); from infancy.

G3813.def: neuter diminutive of G3816 (παῖς); a childling (of either sex), i.e. (properly), an infant, or (by extension) a half-grown boy or girl; figuratively, an immature Christian.

G3814.def: feminine diminutive of G3816 (παῖς); a girl, i.e. (specially), a female slave or servant.

G3815.def: from G3816 (παῖς); to sport (as a boy)

G3816.def: perhaps from G3817 (παίω); a boy (as often beaten with impunity), or (by analogy), a girl, and (genitive case) a child; specially, a slave or servant (especially a minister to a king; and by eminence to God)
G3816.kjv: child, maid(-en), (man) servant, son, young man

G3817.def: a primary verb; to hit (as if by a single blow and less violently than G5180 (τύπτω)); specially, to sting (as a scorpion)

G3818.def: feminine of an adjective of uncertain derivation; Pacatianian, a section of Phrygia.

G3819.def: probably another form for G3825 (πάλιν) (through the idea of retrocession); (adverbially) formerly, or (by relatively) sometime since; (elliptically as adjective) ancient.
G3819.kjv: any while, a great while ago, (of) old, in time past

G3820.def: from G3819 (πάλαι); antique, i.e. not recent, worn out.

G3822.def: from G3820 (παλαιός); to make (passively, become) worn out, or declare obsolete.

G3823.def: from (to vibrate; another form for G906 (βάλλω)); wrestling.

G3824.def: from G3825 (πάλιν) and G1078 (γένεσις); (spiritual) rebirth (the state or the act), i.e. (figuratively) spiritual renovation; specially, Messianic restoration.

G3825.def: probably from the same as G3823 (πάλη) (through the idea of oscillatory repetition); (adverbially) anew, i.e. (of place) back, (of time) once more, or (conjunctionally) furthermore or on the other hand.

G3826.def: dative case (adverb) of a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G4128 (πλῆθος); in full multitude, i.e. concertedly or simultaneously.

G3827.def: from G3956 (πᾶς) and G4183 (πολύς); full many, i.e. immense.

G3828.def: from a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G4443 (πυρά); every-tribal, i.e. heterogeneous (G5561 (χώρα) being implied); Pamphylia, a region of Asia Minor.

G3829.def: neuter of a presumed compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and a derivative of G1209 (δέχομαι); all-receptive, i.e. a public lodging-place (caravanserai or khan)

G3830.def: from the same as G3829 (πανδοχεῖον); an innkeeper (warden of a caravanserai)

G3831.def: from G3956 (πᾶς) and a derivative of G58 (ἀγορά); a mass-meeting, i.e. (figuratively) universal companionship.

G3832.def: adverb from G3956 (πᾶς) and G3624 (οἶκος); with the whole family.

G3833.def: from a compound of G3956 (πᾶς) and G3696 (ὅπλον); full armor ("panoply")

G3834.def: from G3835 (πανοῦργος); adroitness, i.e. (in a bad sense) trickery or sophistry.

G3835.def: from G3956 (πᾶς) and G2041 (ἔργον); all-working, i.e. adroit (shrewd)

G3836.def: adverb (of source) from G3837 (πανταχοῦ); from all directions.

G3837.def: genitive case (as adverb of place) of a presumed derivative of G3956 (πᾶς); universally.

G3838.def: from G3956 (πᾶς) and G5056 (τέλος); full-ended, i.e. entire (neuter as noun, completion)

G3840.def: adverb (of source) from G3956 (πᾶς); from (i.e. on) all sides.

G3841.def: from G3956 (πᾶς) and G2904 (κράτος); the all-ruling, i.e. God (as absolute and universal sovereign)

G3842.def: from G3956 (πᾶς) and G3753 (ὅτε); every when, i.e. at all times.

G3843.def: adverb from G3956 (πᾶς); entirely; specially, at all events, (with negative, following) in no event.
G3843.kjv: by all means, altogether, at all, needs, no doubt, in (no) wise, surely

G3844.def: a primary preposition; properly, near; i.e. (with genitive case) from beside (literally or figuratively), (with dative case) at (or in) the vicinity of (objectively or subjectively), (with accusative case) to the proximity with (local (especially beyond or opposed to) or causal (on account of)
G3844.kjv: above, against, among, at, before, by, contrary to, X friend, from, + give (such things as they), + that (she) had, X his, in, more than, nigh unto, (out) of, past, save, side…by, in the sight of, than, (there-)fore, with

G3845.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to go contrary to, i.e. violate a command.

G3846.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw alongside, i.e. (reflexively) to reach a place, or (figuratively) to liken.

G3849.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G971 (βιάζω); to force contrary to (nature), i.e. compel (by entreaty)

G3850.def: from G3846 (παραβάλλω); a similitude ("parable"), i.e. (symbolic) fictitious narrative (of common life conveying a moral), apothegm or adage.

G3851.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G1011 (βουλεύω); to misconsult, i.e. disregard.

G3853.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G32 (ἄγγελος); to transmit a message, i.e. (by implication) to enjoin.

G3854.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1096 (γίνομαι); to become near, i.e. approach (have arrived); by implication, to appear publicly.

G3855.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G71 (ἄγω); to lead near, i.e. (reflexively or intransitively) to go along or away.

G3856.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1165 (δειγματίζω); to show alongside (the public), i.e. expose to infamy.
G3856.kjv: make a public example, put to an open shame

G3857.def: of Oriental origin (compare H06508); a park, i.e. (specially), an Eden (place of future happiness, "paradise")

G3858.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1209 (δέχομαι); to accept near, i.e. admit or (by implication) delight in.

G3859.def: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G1304 (διατρίβω); misemployment, i.e. meddlesomeness.

G3860.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to surrender, i.e yield up, intrust, transmit.
G3860.kjv: betray, bring forth, cast, commit, deliver (up), give (over, up), hazard, put in prison, recommend

G3861.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1391 (δόξα) (in the sense of seeming); contrary to expectation, i.e. extraordinary ("paradox")

G3862.def: from G3860 (παραδίδωμι); transmission, i.e. (concretely) a precept; specially, the Jewish traditionary law.

G3863.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2206 (ζηλόω); to stimulate alongside, i.e. excite to rivalry.

G3864.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2281 (θάλασσα); along the sea, i.e. maritime (lacustrine)

G3865.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2334 (θεωρέω); to overlook or disregard.

G3866.def: from G3908 (παρατίθημι); a deposit, i.e. (figuratively) trust.

G3867.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G134 (αἰνέω); to mispraise, i.e. recommend or advise (a different course)

G3868.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G154 (αἰτέω); to beg off, i.e. deprecate, decline, shun.

G3869.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2523 (καθίζω); to sit down near.

G3870.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2564 (καλέω); to call near, i.e. invite, invoke (by imploration, hortation or consolation)
G3870.kjv: beseech, call for, (be of good) comfort, desire, (give) exhort(-ation), intreat, pray

G3871.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2572 (καλύπτω); to cover alongside, i.e. veil (figuratively)

G3872.def: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G2698 (κατατίθημι); something put down alongside, i.e. a deposit (sacred trust)

G3873.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2749 (κεῖμαι); to lie near, i.e. be at hand (figuratively, be prompt or easy)

G3876.def: from G3878 (παρακούω); inattention, i.e. (by implication) disobedience.

G3877.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G190 (ἀκολουθέω); to follow near, i.e. (figuratively) attend (as a result), trace out, conform to.
G3877.kjv: attain, follow, fully know, have understanding

G3878.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G191 (ἀκούω); to mishear, i.e. (by implication) to disobey.

G3879.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2955 (κύπτω); to bend beside, i.e. lean over (so as to peer within)

G3880.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to receive near, i.e. associate with oneself (in any familiar or intimate act or relation); by analogy, to assume an office; figuratively, to learn.

G3881.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of G3004 (λέγω) (in its original sense); (specially), to lay one's course near, i.e. sail past.

G3882.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G251 (ἅλς); beside the salt (sea), i.e. maritime.

G3883.def: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G236 (ἀλλάσσω); transmutation (of phase or orbit), i.e. (figuratively) fickleness.

G3884.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3049 (λογίζομαι); to misreckon, i.e. delude.

G3885.def: from a derivative of G3886 (παραλύω); as if dissolved, i.e. "paralytic".

G3886.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3089 (λύω); to loosen beside, i.e. relax (perfect passive participle, paralyzed or enfeebled)
G3886.kjv: feeble, sick of the (taken with) palsy

G3887.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3306 (μένω); to stay near, i.e. remain (literally, tarry; or figuratively, be permanent, persevere)

G3888.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the middle voice of a derivative of G3454 (μῦθος); to relate near, i.e. (by implication) encourage, console.

G3891.def: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G3551 (νόμος); to be opposed to law, i.e. to transgress.

G3892.def: from the same as G3891 (παρανομέω); transgression.

G3893.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G4087 (πικραίνω); to embitter alongside, i.e. (figuratively) to exasperate.

G3895.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G4098 (πίπτω); to fall aside, i.e. (figuratively) to apostatize.

G3896.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G4126 (πλέω); to sail near.

G3897.def: neuter of a compound of G3844 (παρά) and the base of G4139 (πλησίον) (as adverb); close by, i.e. (figuratively) almost.

G3898.def: adverb from the same as G3897 (παραπλήσιον); in a manner near by, i.e. (figuratively) similarly.

G3899.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to travel near.

G3900.def: from G3895 (παραπίπτω); a side-slip (lapse or deviation), i.e. (unintentional) error or (wilful) transgression.

G3901.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the alternate of G4482 (ῥέω); to flow by, i.e. (figuratively) carelessly pass (miss)

G3902.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G4591 (σημαίνω); side-marked, i.e. labelled (with a badge (figure-head) of a ship)

G3903.def: from G3844 (παρά) and a derivative of G4632 (σκεῦος); to furnish aside, i.e. get ready.

G3905.def: from G3844 (παρά) and teino (to stretch); to extend along, i.e. prolong (in point of time)

G3906.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G5083 (τηρέω); to inspect alongside, i.e. note insidiously or scrupulously.

G3907.def: from G3906 (παρατηρέω); inspection, i.e. ocular evidence.

G3908.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G5087 (τίθημι); to place alongside, i.e. present (food, truth); by implication, to deposit (as a trust or for protection)
G3908.kjv: allege, commend, commit (the keeping of), put forth, set before

G3909.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G5177 (τυγχάνω); to chance near, i.e. fall in with.

G3910.def: from G3844 (παρά) and a derivative of G846 (αὐτός); at the very instant, i.e. momentary.

G3911.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G5342 (φέρω) (including its alternate forms); to bear along or aside, i.e. carry off (literally or figuratively); by implication, to avert.

G3912.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G5426 (φρονέω); to misthink, i.e. be insane (silly)

G3914.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G5492 (χειμάζω); to winter near, i.e. stay with over the rainy season.

G3916.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G5536 (χρῆμα) (in its original sense); at the thing itself, i.e. instantly.

G3918.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1510 (εἰμί) (including its various forms); to be near, i.e. at hand; neuter present participle (singular) time being, or (plural) property.
G3918.kjv: come, X have, be here, + lack, (be here) present

G3919.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1521 (εἰσάγω); to lead in aside, i.e. introduce surreptitiously.

G3921.def: from G3844 (παρά) and a compound of G1519 (εἰς) and G1416 (δύνω); to settle in alongside, i.e. lodge stealthily.

G3922.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1525 (εἰσέρχομαι); to come in alongside, i.e. supervene additionally or steathily.

G3923.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1533 (εἰσφέρω); to bear in alongside, i.e. introduce simultaneously.

G3924.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1622 (ἐκτός); near outside, i.e. besides.

G3925.def: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G1685 (ἐμβάλλω); a throwing in beside (juxtaposition), i.e. (specially), battle-array, encampment or barracks (tower Antonia)

G3926.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G1776 (ἐνοχλέω); to harass further, i.e. annoy.

G3927.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G1927 (ἐπιδημέω); an alien alongside, i.e. a resident foreigner.

G3928.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι); to come near or aside, i.e. to approach (arrive), go by (or away), (figuratively) perish or neglect, (causative) avert.
G3928.kjv: come (forth), go, pass (away, by, over), past, transgress

G3930.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2192 (ἔχω); to hold near, i.e. present, afford, exhibit, furnish occasion.
G3930.kjv: bring, do, give, keep, minister, offer, shew, + trouble

G3931.def: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and a derivative of G58 (ἀγορά) (meaning to harangue an assembly); an address alongside, i.e. (specially), consolation.

G3933.def: of unknown origin; a maiden; by implication, an unmarried daughter.

G3934.def: probably of foreign origin; a Parthian, i.e. inhabitant of Parthia.

G3935.def: from G3844 (παρά) and hiemi (to send); to let by, i.e. relax.

G3936.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to stand beside, i.e. (transitively) to exhibit, proffer, (specially), recommend, (figuratively) substantiate; or (intransitively) to be at hand (or ready), aid.
G3936.kjv: assist, bring before, command, commend, give presently, present, prove, provide, shew, stand (before, by, here, up, with), yield

G3937.def: probably by contraction for (a derivative of a compound of G3844 (παρά) and G3306 (μένω)); constant; Parmenas, a Christian.

G3938.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3598 (ὁδός); a by-road, i.e. (actively) a route.

G3939.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3611 (οἰκέω); to dwell near, i.e. reside as a foreigner.

G3941.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3624 (οἶκος); having a home near, i.e. (as noun) a by-dweller (alien resident)

G3942.def: from a compound of G3844 (παρά) and perhaps a derivative of G3633 (οἴομαι); apparently a state alongside of supposition, i.e. (concretely) an adage; specially, an enigmatical or fictitious illustration.

G3943.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3631 (οἶνος); staying near wine, i.e. tippling (a toper)

G3944.def: from G3844 (παρά) and (to depart); to escape along, i.e. be gone.

G3946.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3664 (ὅμοιος); alike nearly, i.e. similar.

G3947.def: from G3844 (παρά) and a derivative of G3691 (ὀξύς); to sharpen alongside, i.e. (figuratively) to exasperate.

G3948.def: from G3947 (παροξύνω) ("paroxysm"); incitement (to good), or dispute (in anger)

G3949.def: from G3844 (παρά) and G3710 (ὀργίζω); to anger alongside, i.e. enrage.

G3951.def: from G3844 (παρά) and (to spur); to urge along, i.e. stimulate (to hostility)

G3952.def: from the present participle of G3918 (πάρειμι); a being near, i.e. advent (often, return; specially, of Christ to punish Jerusalem, or finally the wicked); (by implication) physically, aspect.

G3953.def: from G3844 (παρά) and the base of G3795 (ὀψάριον); a side-dish (the receptacle)

G3954.def: from G3956 (πᾶς) and a derivative of G4483 (ῥέω); all out-spokenness, i.e. frankness, bluntness, publicity; by implication, assurance.
G3954.kjv: bold (X -ly, -ness, -ness of speech), confidence, X freely, X openly, X plainly(-ness)

G3955.def: middle voice from G3954 (παῤῥησία); to be frank in utterance, or confident in spirit and demeanor.

G3956.def: including all the forms of declension; apparently a primary word; all, any, every, the whole.
G3956.kjv: all (manner of, means), alway(-s), any (one), X daily, + ever, every (one, way), as many as, + no(-thing), X thoroughly, whatsoever, whole, whosoever

G3957.def: of Chaldee origin (compare H06453); the Passover (the meal, the day, the festival or the special sacrifices connected with it)

G3958.def: apparently a primary verb; to experience a sensation or impression (usually painful)

G3959.def: probably of foreign origin; Patara, a place in Asia Minor.

G3960.def: probably prolongation from G3817 (παίω); to knock (gently or with a weapon or fatally)

G3961.def: from a derivative probably of G3817 (παίω) (meaning a "path"); to trample (literally or figuratively)

G3962.def: apparently a primary word; a 'father' (literally or figuratively, near or more remote).

G3963.def: of uncertain derivation; Patmus, an islet in the Mediterranean.

G3964.def: from G3962 (πατήρ) and the same as the latter part of G3389 (μητραλῴας); a parricide.

G3965.def: as if feminine of a derivative of G3962 (πατήρ); paternal descent, i.e. (concretely) a group of families or a whole race (nation)

G3966.def: from G3965 (πατριά) and G757 (ἄρχω); a progenitor ("patriarch")

G3968.def: from G3902 (παράσημος); a father-land, i.e. native town; (figuratively) heavenly home.

G3969.def: perhaps a contraction for (a compound of G3962 (πατήρ) and G979 (βίος)); father's life; Patrobas, a Christian.

G3970.def: from G3962 (πατήρ) and a derivative of G3860 (παραδίδωμι) (in the sense of handing over or down); traditionary.

G3972.def: of Latin origin; (little; but remotely from a derivative of G3973 (παύω), meaning the same); Paulus, the name of a Roman and of an apostle.

G3973.def: a primary verb ("pause"); to stop (transitively or intransitively), i.e. restrain, quit, desist, come to an end.

G3974.def: of uncertain derivation; Paphus, a place in Cyprus.

G3975.def: from a derivative of G4078 (πήγνυμι) (meaning thick); to thicken, i.e. (by implication) to fatten (figuratively, stupefy or render callous)

G3976.def: ultimately from G4228 (πούς); a shackle for the feet.

G3977.def: from a derivative of G4228 (πούς) (meaning the ground); level (as easy for the feet)

G3978.def: from the same as G3979 (πεζῇ); to foot a journey, i.e. travel by land.

G3979.def: dative case feminine of a derivative of G4228 (πούς) (as adverb); foot-wise, i.e. by walking.

G3980.def: from a compound of G3982 (πείθω) and G757 (ἄρχω); to be persuaded by a ruler, i.e. (genitive case) to submit to authority; by analogy, to conform to advice.

G3982.def: a primary verb; to convince (by argument, true or false); by analogy, to pacify or conciliate (by other fair means); reflexively or passively, to assent (to evidence or authority), to rely (by inward certainty)
G3982.kjv: agree, assure, believe, have confidence, be (wax) conflent, make friend, obey, persuade, trust, yield

G3983.def: from the same as G3993 (πένης) (through the idea of pinching toil; "pine"); to famish (absolutely or comparatively); figuratively, to crave.

G3984.def: from the base of G4008 (πέραν) (through the idea of piercing); a test, i.e. attempt, experience.

G3985.def: from G3984 (πεῖρα); to test (objectively), i.e. endeavor, scrutinize, entice, discipline.
G3985.kjv: assay, examine, go about, prove, tempt(-er), try

G3986.def: from G3985 (πειράζω); a putting to proof (by experiment (of good), experience (of evil), solicitation, discipline or provocation); by implication, adversity.

G3987.def: from G3984 (πεῖρα); to test (subjectively), i.e. (reflexively) to attempt.

G3988.def: from a presumed derivative of G3982 (πείθω); persuadableness, i.e. credulity.

G3989.def: of uncertain affinity; deep or open sea, i.e. the main.

G3990.def: from a derivative of G4141 (πλήσσω) (meaning an axe); to chop off (the head), i.e. truncate.

G3992.def: apparently a primary verb; to dispatch (from the subjective view or point of departure, whereas (as a stronger form of ) refers rather to the objective point or terminus ad quem, and G4724 (στέλλω) denotes properly, the orderly motion involved), especially on a temporary errand; also to transmit, bestow, or wield.

G3993.def: from a primary (to toil for daily subsistence); starving, i.e. indigent.

G3994.def: feminine of G3995 (πενθερός); a wife's mother.

G3995.def: of uncertain affinity; a wife's father.

G3996.def: from G3997 (πένθος); to grieve (the feeling or the act)

G3997.def: strengthened from the alternate of G3958 (πάσχω); grief.

G3998.def: prolongation from the base of G3993 (πένης); necessitous.

G3999.def: multiplicative adverb from G4002 (πέντε); five times.

G4000.def: from G3999 (πεντάκις) and G5507 (χίλιοι); five times a thousand.

G4001.def: from G4002 (πέντε) and G1540 (ἑκατόν); five hundred.

G4003.def: from G4002 (πέντε) and G2532 (καί) and G1182 (δέκατος); five and tenth.

G4005.def: feminine of the ordinal of G4004 (πεντήκοντα); fiftieth (G2250 (ἡμέρα) being implied) from Passover, i.e. the festival of "Pentecost".

G4006.def: from the perfect of the alternate of G3958 (πάσχω); reliance.

G4007.def: from the base of G4008 (πέραν); an enclitic particle significant of abundance (thoroughness), i.e. emphasis; much, very or ever.

G4008.def: apparently accusative case of an obsolete derivative of (to "pierce"); through (as adverb or preposition), i.e. across.

G4009.def: from the same as G4008 (πέραν); an extremity.

G4010.def: from G4444 (πύργος); fortified; Pergamus, a place in Asia Minor.

G4011.def: probably from the same as G4010 (Πέργαμος); a tower; Perga, a place in Asia Minor.

G4012.def: from the base of G4008 (πέραν); properly, through (all over), i.e. around; figuratively with respect to; used in various applications, of place, cause or time (with the genitive case denoting the subject or occasion or superlative point; with the accusative case the locality, circuit, matter, circumstance or general period)
G4012.kjv: (there-)about, above, against, at, on behalf of, X and his company, which concern, (as) concerning, for, X how it will go with, ((there-, where-)) of, on, over, pertaining (to), for sake, X (e-)state, (as) touching, (where-)by (in), with

G4013.def: from G4012 (περί) and G71 (ἄγω); to take around (as a companion); reflexively, to walk around.

G4014.def: from G4012 (περί) and G138 (αἱρέομαι) (including its alternate); to remove all around, i.e. unveil, cast off (anchor); figuratively, to expiate.

G4015.def: from G4012 (περί) and G797 (ἀστράπτω); to flash all around, i.e. envelop in light.

G4016.def: from G4012 (περί) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw all around, i.e. invest (with a palisade or with clothing)
G4016.kjv: array, cast about, clothe(-d me), put on

G4017.def: from G4012 (περί) and G991 (βλέπω); to look all around.

G4018.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4016 (περιβάλλω); something thrown around one, i.e. a mantle, veil.

G4019.def: from G4012 (περί) and G1210 (δέω); to bind around one, i.e. enwrap.

G4020.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2038 (ἐργάζομαι); to work all around, i.e. bustle about (meddle)

G4021.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2041 (ἔργον); working all around, i.e. officious (meddlesome, neuter plural magic)

G4022.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι) (including its alternate); to come all around, i.e. stroll, vacillate, veer.
G4022.kjv: fetch a compass, vagabond, wandering about

G4023.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2192 (ἔχω); to hold all around, i.e. include, clasp (figuratively)

G4024.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2224 (ζώννυμι); to gird all around, i.e. (middle voice or passive) to fasten on one's belt (literally or figuratively)

G4025.def: from G4060 (περιτίθημι); a putting all around, i.e. decorating oneself with.

G4026.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to stand all around, i.e. (near) to be a bystander, or (aloof) to keep away from.

G4027.def: from a compound of G4012 (περί) and G2508 (καθαίρω); something cleaned off all around, i.e. refuse (figuratively)

G4028.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2572 (καλύπτω); to cover all around, i.e. entirely (the face, a surface)

G4029.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2749 (κεῖμαι); to lie all around, i.e. inclose, encircle, hamper (literally or figuratively)

G4030.def: feminine of a compound of G4012 (περί) and G2776 (κεφαλή); encirclement of the head, i.e. a helmet.

G4031.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2904 (κράτος); strong all around, i.e. a master (manager)

G4032.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2928 (κρύπτω); to conceal all around, i.e. entirely.

G4033.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2944 (κυκλόω); to encircle all around, i.e. blockade completely.

G4034.def: from G4012 (περί) and G2989 (λάμπω); to illuminate all around, i.e. invest with a halo.

G4035.def: from G4012 (περί) and G3007 (λείπω); to leave all around, i.e. (passively) survive.

G4036.def: from G4012 (περί) and G3077 (λύπη); grieved all around, i.e. intensely sad.

G4037.def: from G4012 (περί) and G3306 (μένω); to stay around, i.e. await.

G4038.def: adverb from G4012 (περί); all around, i.e. (as an adjective) circumjacent.

G4039.def: from G4012 (περί) and G3611 (οἰκέω); to reside around, i.e. be a neighbor.

G4040.def: from G4012 (περί) and G3624 (οἶκος); housed around, i.e. neighboring (used elliptically as a noun)

G4041.def: from the present participle feminine of a compound of 4012 and G1510 (εἰμί); being beyond usual, i.e. special (one's own)

G4042.def: from G4023 (περιέχω); a being held around, i.e. (concretely) a passage (of Scripture, as circumscribed)

G4043.def: from G4012 (περί) and G3961 (πατέω); to tread all around, i.e. walk at large (especially as proof of ability); figuratively, to live, deport oneself, follow (as a companion or votary)

G4044.def: from G4012 (περί) and the base of G4008 (πέραν); to penetrate entirely, i.e. transfix (figuratively)

G4045.def: from G4012 (περί) and G4098 (πίπτω); to fall into something that is all around, i.e. light among or upon, be surrounded with.

G4046.def: middle voice from G4012 (περί) and G4160 (ποιέω); to make around oneself, i.e. acquire (buy)

G4047.def: from G4046 (περιποιέομαι); acquisition (the act or the thing); by extension, preservation.

G4048.def: from G4012 (περί) and G4486 (ῥήγνυμι); to tear all around, i.e. completely away.

G4049.def: from G4012 (περί) and G4685 (σπάω); to drag all around, i.e. (figuratively) to distract (with care)

G4051.def: from G4052 (περισσεύω); a surplus, or superabundance.
G4051.kjv: abundance, that was left, over and above

G4052.def: from G4053 (περισσός); to superabound (in quantity or quality), be in excess, be superfluous; also (transitively) to cause to superabound or excel.
G4052.kjv: (make, more) abound, (have, have more) abundance (be more) abundant, be the better, enough and to spare, exceed, excel, increase, be left, redound, remain (over and above)

G4053.def: from G4012 (περί) (in the sense of beyond); superabundant (in quantity) or superior (in quality); by implication, excessive; adverbially (with G1537 (ἐκ)) violently; neuter (as noun) preeminence.
G4053.kjv: exceeding abundantly above, more abundantly, advantage, exceedingly, very highly, beyond measure, more, superfluous, vehement(-ly)

G4054.def: neuter of G4055 (περισσότερος) (as adverb); in a more superabundant way.
G4054.kjv: more abundantly, a great deal, far more

G4055.def: comparative of G4053 (περισσός); more superabundant (in number, degree or character)

G4056.kjv: more abundant(-ly), X the more earnest, (more) exceedingly, more frequent, much more, the rather

G4057.kjv: exceedingly, out of measure, the more

G4059.def: from G4012 (περί) and the base of G5114 (τομώτερος); to cut around, i.e. (specially) to circumcise.

G4060.def: from G4012 (περί) and G5087 (τίθημι); to place around; by implication, to present.
G4060.kjv: bestow upon, hedge round about, put about (on, upon), set about

G4061.def: from G4059 (περιτέμνω); circumcision (the rite, the condition or the people, literally or figuratively)

G4062.def: from G4012 (περί) and the base of G5157 (τροπή); to turn around, i.e. (mentally) to craze.

G4063.def: from G4012 (περί) and G5143 (τρέχω) (including its alternate); to run around, i.e. traverse.

G4064.def: from G4012 (περί) and G5342 (φέρω); to convey around, i.e. transport hither and thither.

G4065.def: from G4012 (περί) and G5426 (φρονέω); to think beyond, i.e. depreciate (contemn)

G4066.def: from G4012 (περί) and G5561 (χώρα); around the region, i.e. circumjacent (as noun, with G1093 (γῆ) implied vicinity)
G4066.kjv: country (round) about, region (that lieth) round about

G4067.def: from a comparative of G4012 (περί) and (to rub); something brushed all around, i.e. off-scrapings (figuratively, scum)

G4068.def: middle voice from (braggart; perhaps by reduplication of the base of G4008 (πέραν)); to boast.

G4069.def: a Persian woman; Persis, a Christian female.

G4070.def: adverb from G4009 (πέρας); the by-gone, i.e. (as noun) last year.

G4071.def: neuter of a derivative of G4072 (πέτομαι); a flying animal, i.e. bird.

G4072.def: middle voice of a primary verb; to fly.

G4073.def: feminine of the same as G4074 (Πέτρος); a (mass of) rock (literally or figuratively)

G4074.def: apparently a primary word; a (piece of) rock (larger than G3037 (λίθος)); as a name, Petrus, an apostle.

G4075.def: from G4073 (πέτρα) and G1491 (εἶδος); rock-like, i.e. rocky.

G4076.def: from G4078 (πήγνυμι); rue (from its thick or fleshy leaves)

G4077.def: probably from G4078 (πήγνυμι) (through the idea of gushing plumply); a fount (literally or figuratively), i.e. source or supply (of water, blood, enjoyment) (not necessarily the original spring)

G4078.def: a prolonged form of a primary verb (which in its simpler form occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses); to fix ("peg"), i.e. (specially) to set up (a tent)

G4079.def: neuter of a (presumed) derivative of (the blade of an oar; from the same as G3976 (πέδη)); a "pedal", i.e. helm.

G4080.def: a quantitative form (the feminine) of the base of G4225 (πού); how much (as an indefinite), i.e. in size or (figuratively) dignity.

G4082.def: of uncertain affinity; a wallet or leather pouch for food.

G4083.def: of uncertain affinity; the fore-arm, i.e. (as a measure) a cubit.

G4084.def: probably another form of G971 (βιάζω); to squeeze, i.e. seize (gently by the hand (press), or officially (arrest), or in hunting (capture))
G4084.kjv: apprehend, catch, lay hand on, take

G4085.def: another form for G4084 (πιάζω); to pack.

G4086.def: from a compound of a derivative of G3982 (πείθω) and G3056 (λόγος); persuasive language.

G4087.def: from G4089 (πικρός); to embitter (literally or figuratively)

G4088.def: from G4089 (πικρός); acridity (especially poison), literally or figuratively.

G4089.def: perhaps from G4078 (πήγνυμι) (through the idea of piercing); sharp (pungent), i.e. acrid (literally or figuratively)

G4090.def: adverb from G4089 (πικρός); bitterly, i.e. (figuratively) violently.

G4091.def: of Latin origin; close-pressed, i.e. firm; Pilatus, a Roman.

G4092.def: a reduplicated and prolonged form of a primary ; which occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses); to fire, i.e. burn (figuratively and passively, become inflamed with fever)

G4093.def: diminutive of G4094 (πίναξ); a tablet (for writing on)

G4094.def: apparently a form of G4109 (πλάξ); a plate.

G4095.def: a prolonged form of ; which (together with another form) ; occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses; to imbibe (literally or figuratively)

G4096.def: from (fat; perhaps akin to the alternate of G4095 (πίνω) through the idea of repletion); plumpness, i.e. (by implication) richness (oiliness)

G4097.def: contracted from (to traverse; from the base of G4008 (πέραν)); to traffic (by travelling), i.e. dispose of as merchandise or into slavery (literally or figuratively)

G4098.def: probably akin to G4072 (πέτομαι) through the idea of alighting; to fall (literally or figuratively)

G4099.def: probably of foreign origin; Pisidia, a region of Asia Minor.

G4100.def: from G4102; to have faith (in, upon, or with respect to, a person or thing), i.e., credit; by implication, to entrust.

G4102.def: from G3982; persuasion, i.e., credence; moral conviction (of religious truth, or the truthfulness of God or a religious teacher).

G4103.def: from G3982 (πείθω); objectively, trustworthy; subjectively, trustful.

G4105.def: from G4106 (πλάνη); to (properly, cause to) roam (from safety, truth, or virtue)
G4105.kjv: go astray, deceive, err, seduce, wander, be out of the way

G4106.def: feminine of G4108 (πλάνος) (as abstractly); objectively, fraudulence; subjectively, a straying from orthodoxy or piety.

G4107.def: from G4108 (πλάνος); a rover ("planet"), i.e. (figuratively) an erratic teacher.

G4108.def: of uncertain affinity; roving (as a tramp), i.e. (by implication) an impostor or misleader;.

G4109.def: from G4111 (πλάσσω); a moulding-board, i.e. flat surface ("plate", or tablet, literally or figuratively)

G4111.def: a primary verb; to mould, i.e. shape or fabricate.

G4112.def: from G4111 (πλάσσω); moulded, i.e. (by implication) artificial or (figuratively) fictitious (false)

G4113.def: feminine of G4116 (πλατύς); a wide "plat" or "place", i.e. open square.

G4115.def: from G4116 (πλατύς); to widen (literally or figuratively)

G4116.def: from G4111 (πλάσσω); spread out "flat" ("plot"), i.e. broad.

G4118.def: irregular superlative of G4183 (πολύς); the largest number or very large.

G4119.def: comparative of G4183 (πολύς); more in quantity, number, or quality; also (in plural) the major portion.
G4119.kjv: X above, + exceed, more excellent, further, (very) great(-er), long(-er), (very) many, greater (more) part, + yet but

G4120.def: a primary word; to twine or braid.

G4121.def: from G4119 (πλείων); to do, make or be more, i.e. increase (transitively or intransitively); by extension, to superabound.
G4121.kjv: abound, abundant, make to increase, have over

G4122.def: from G4123 (πλεονέκτης); to be covetous, i.e. (by implication) to over-reach.
G4122.kjv: get an advantage, defraud, make a gain

G4123.def: from G4119 (πλείων) and G2192 (ἔχω); holding (desiring) more, i.e. eager for gain (avaricious, hence a defrauder)

G4124.def: from G4123 (πλεονέκτης); avarice, i.e. (by implication) fraudulency, extortion.

G4125.def: of uncertain affinity; a rib, i.e. (by extension) side.

G4126.def: probably a form of G4150 (πλύνω) (through the idea of plunging through the water); to pass in a vessel.

G4127.def: from G4141 (πλήσσω); a stroke; by implication, a wound; figuratively, a calamity.

G4128.def: from G4130 (πλήθω); a fulness, i.e. a large number, throng, populace.

G4129.def: from another form of G4128 (πλῆθος); to increase (transitively or intransitively)

G4130.def: a prolonged form of a primary (which appears only as an alternate in certain tenses and in the reduplicated form pimplemi); to "fill" (literally or figuratively (imbue, influence, supply)); specially, to fulfil (time)

G4131.def: from G4141 (πλήσσω); a smiter, i.e. pugnacious (quarrelsome)

G4132.def: prolonged from G4130 (πλήθω); flood-tide, i.e. (by analogy) a freshet.

G4133.def: from G4119 (πλείων); moreover (besides), i.e. albeit, save that, rather, yet.
G4133.kjv: but (rather), except, nevertheless, notwithstanding, save, than

G4134.def: from G4130 (πλήθω); replete, or covered over; by analogy, complete.

G4135.def: from G4134 (πλήρης) and G5409 (φορέω); to carry out fully (in evidence), i.e. completely assure (or convince), entirely accomplish.
G4135.kjv: most surely believe, fully know (persuade), make full proof of

G4137.def: from G4134 (πλήρης); to make replete, i.e. (literally) to cram (a net), level up (a hollow), or (figuratively) to furnish (or imbue, diffuse, influence), satisfy, execute (an office), finish (a period or task), verify (or coincide with a prediction), etc.
G4137.kjv: accomplish, X after, (be) complete, end, expire, fill (up), fulfil, (be, make) full (come), fully preach, perfect, supply

G4138.def: from G4137 (πληρόω); repletion or completion, i.e. (subjectively) what fills (as contents, supplement, copiousness, multitude), or (objectively) what is filled (as container, performance, period)
G4138.kjv: which is put in to fill up, piece that filled up, fulfilling, full, fulness

G4139.def: neuter of a derivative of (near); (adverbially) close by; as noun, a neighbor, i.e. fellow (as man, countryman, Christian or friend)

G4140.def: from a presumed derivative of G4130 (πλήθω); a filling up, i.e. (figuratively) gratification.

G4141.def: apparently another form of G4111 (πλάσσω) (through the idea of flattening out); to pound, i.e. (figuratively) to inflict with (calamity)

G4142.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4143 (πλοῖον); a boat.

G4143.def: from G4126 (πλέω); a sailer, i.e. vessel.

G4144.def: from G4126 (πλέω); a sail, i.e. navigation.

G4145.def: from G4149 (πλοῦτος); wealthy; figuratively, abounding with.

G4147.def: from G4148 (πλουτίζω); to be (or become) wealthy (literally or figuratively)
G4147.kjv: be increased with goods, (be made, wax) rich

G4149.def: from the base of G4130 (πλήθω); wealth (as fulness), i.e. (literally) money, possessions, or (figuratively) abundance, richness, (specially), valuable bestowment.

G4150.def: a prolonged form of an obsolete (to "flow"); to "plunge", i.e. launder clothing.

G4151.def: from G4154; a current of air, i.e., breath (blast) or a breeze; by analogy or figuratively, a spirit, i.e., (human) the rational soul, (by implication) vital principle, mental disposition, etc., or (superhuman) an angel, demon, or (divine) God.

G4152.def: from G4151 (πνεῦμα); non-carnal, i.e. (humanly) ethereal (as opposed to gross), or (dæmoniacally) a spirit (concretely), or (divinely) supernatural, regenerate, religious.

G4153.def: adverb from G4152 (πνευματικός); non-physically, i.e. divinely, figuratively.

G4154.def: a primary word; to breathe hard, i.e. breeze.

G4155.def: strengthened from G4154 (πνέω); to wheeze, i.e. (causative, by implication) to throttle or strangle (drown)

G4156.def: from G4155 (πνίγω); throttled, i.e. (neuter concretely) an animal choked to death (not bled)

G4158.def: from G4228 (πούς) and another element of uncertain affinity; a dress (G2066 (ἐσθής) implied) reaching the ankles.

G4159.def: from the base of G4213 (πόσις) with enclitic adverb of origin; from which (as interrogative) or what (as relative) place, state, source or cause.

G4160.def: apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary; to make or do (in a very wide application, more or less direct)
G4160.kjv: abide, + agree, appoint, X avenge, + band together, be, bear, + bewray, bring (forth), cast out, cause, commit, + content, continue, deal, + without any delay, (would) do(-ing), execute, exercise, fulfil, gain, give, have, hold, X journeying, keep, + lay wait, + lighten the ship, make, X mean, + none of these things move me, observe, ordain, perform, provide, + have purged, purpose, put, + raising up, X secure, shew, X shoot out, spend, take, tarry, + transgress the law, work, yield

G4161.def: from G4160 (ποιέω); a product, i.e. fabric (literally or figuratively)

G4162.def: from G4160 (ποιέω); action, i.e. performance (of the law)

G4163.def: from G4160 (ποιέω); a performer; specially, a "poet";.

G4164.def: of uncertain derivation; motley, i.e. various in character.

G4165.def: from G4166 (ποιμήν); to tend as a shepherd of (figuratively, superviser)

G4166.def: of uncertain affinity; a shepherd (literally or figuratively)

G4167.def: contraction from G4165 (ποιμαίνω); a flock (literally or figuratively)

G4168.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4167 (ποίμνη); a flock, i.e. (figuratively) group (of believers)

G4169.def: from the base of G4226 (ποῦ) and G3634 (οἷος); individualizing interrogative (of character) what sort of, or (of number) which one.

G4170.def: from G4171 (πόλεμος); to be (engaged) in warfare, i.e. to battle (literally or figuratively)

G4171.def: from (to bustle); warfare (literally or figuratively; a single encounter or a series)

G4172.def: probably from the same as G4171 (πόλεμος), or perhaps from G4183 (πολύς); a town (properly, with walls, of greater or less size)

G4173.def: from G4172 (πόλις) and G757 (ἄρχω); a town-officer, i.e. magistrate.

G4174.def: from G4177 (πολίτης) ("polity"); citizenship; concretely, a community.

G4175.def: from G4176 (πολιτεύομαι); a community, i.e. (abstractly) citizenship (figuratively)

G4176.def: middle voice of a derivative of G4177 (πολίτης); to behave as a citizen (figuratively)

G4178.def: multiplicative adverb from G4183 (πολύς); many times, i.e. frequently.

G4179.def: from G4183 (πολύς) and probably a derivative of G4120 (πλέκω); manifold, i.e. (neuter as noun) very much more.

G4180.def: from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G3056 (λόγος); loquacity, i.e. prolixity.

G4181.def: adverb from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G3313 (μέρος); in many portions, i.e. variously as to time and agency (piecemeal)

G4182.def: from G4183 (πολύς) and G4164 (ποικίλος); much variegated, i.e. multifarious.

G4183.def: including the forms from the alternate ; (singular) much (in any respect) or (plural) many; neuter (singular) as adverbial, largely; neuter (plural) as adverb or noun often, mostly, largely.
G4183.kjv: abundant, + altogether, common, + far (passed, spent), (+ be of a) great (age, deal, -ly, while), long, many, much, oft(-en (-times)), plenteous, sore, straitly

G4184.def: from G4183 (πολύς) and G4698 (σπλάγχνον) (figuratively); extremely compassionate.

G4185.def: from G4183 (πολύς) and G5056 (τέλος); extremely expensive.
G4185.kjv: costly, very precious, of great price

G4186.def: from G4183 (πολύς) and G5092 (τιμή); extremely valuable.

G4187.def: adverb from a compound of G4183 (πολύς) and G5158 (τρόπος); in many ways, i.e. variously as to method or form.

G4188.def: from the alternate of G4095 (πίνω); a beverage.

G4189.def: from G4190 (πονηρός); depravity, i.e. (specially), malice; plural (concretely) plots, sins.

G4190.def: from a derivative of G4192 (πόνος); hurtful, i.e. evil (properly, in effect or influence, and thus differing from G2556 (κακός), which refers rather to essential character, as well as from G4550 (σαπρός), which indicates degeneracy from original virtue); figuratively, calamitous; also (passively) ill, i.e. diseased; but especially (morally) culpable, i.e. derelict, vicious, facinorous; neuter (singular) mischief, malice, or (plural) guilt; masculine (singular) the devil, or (plural) sinners.
G4190.kjv: bad, evil, grievous, harm, lewd, malicious, wicked(-ness)

G4192.def: from the base of G3993 (πένης); toil, i.e. (by implication) anguish.

G4193.def: from G4195 (Πόντος); a Pontican, i.e. native of Pontus.

G4194.def: of Latin origin; apparently bridged; Pontius, a Roman.

G4195.def: of Latin origin; a sea; Pontus, a region of Asia Minor.

G4196.def: of Latin origin; apparently "popular"; Poplius (i.e. Publius), a Roman.

G4197.def: from G4198 (πορεύομαι); travel (by land); figuratively (plural) proceedings, i.e. career.

G4198.def: middle voice from a derivative of the same as G3984 (πεῖρα); to traverse, i.e. travel (literally or figuratively; especially to remove (figuratively, die), live, etc.);.
G4198.kjv: depart, go (away, forth, one's way, up), (make a, take a) journey, walk

G4200.def: from a derivative of (a way, i.e. means); furnishing (procuring), i.e. (by implication) money-getting (acquisition)

G4201.def: of Latin origin; apparently swinish; Porcius, a Roman.

G4202.def: from G4203 (πορνεύω); harlotry (including adultery and incest); figuratively, idolatry.

G4203.def: from G4204 (πόρνη); to act the harlot, i.e. (literally) indulge unlawful lust (of either sex), or (figuratively) practise idolatry.

G4204.def: feminine of G4205 (πόρνος); a strumpet; figuratively, an idolater.

G4205.def: from (to sell; akin to the base of G4097 (πιπράσκω)); a (male) prostitute (as venal), i.e. (by analogy) a debauchee (libertine)

G4206.def: adverb from G4253 (πρό); forwards, i.e. at a distance.

G4207.def: from G4206 (πόῤῥω) with adverbial enclitic of source; from far, or (by implication) at a distance, i.e. distantly.

G4208.def: adverb comparative of G4206 (πόῤῥω); further, i.e. a greater distance.

G4209.def: of Latin origin; the "purple" mussel, i.e. (by implication) the red-blue color itself, and finally a garment dyed with it.

G4210.def: from G4209 (πορφύρα); purpureal, i.e. bluish red.

G4211.def: feminine of a compound of G4209 (πορφύρα) and G4453 (πωλέω); a female trader in purple cloth.

G4212.def: multiplicative from G4214 (πόσος); how many times.

G4213.def: from the alternate of G4095 (πίνω); a drinking (the act), i.e. (concretely) a draught.

G4214.def: from an absolute (who, what) and G3739 (ὅς); interrogative pronoun (of amount) how much (large, long or (plural) many)

G4215.def: probably from a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω) (compare G4224 (πότος)); a current, brook or freshet (as drinkable), i.e. running water.

G4216.def: from G4215 (ποταμός) and a derivative of G5409 (φορέω); river-borne, i.e. overwhelmed by a stream.

G4217.def: apparently from G4219 (πότε) and the base of G4226 (ποῦ); interrogatively, whatever, i.e. of what possible sort.

G4218.def: from the base of G4225 (πού) and G5037 (τέ); indefinite adverb, at some time, ever.
G4218.kjv: afore-(any, some-)time(-s), at length (the last), (+ n- )ever, in the old time, in time past, once, when

G4219.def: from the base of G4226 (ποῦ) and G5037 (τέ); interrogative adverb, at what time.

G4220.def: neuter of a comparative of the base of G4226 (ποῦ); interrogative as adverb, which (of two), i.e. is it this or that.

G4221.def: neuter of a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω); a drinking-vessel; by extension, the contents thereof, i.e. a cupful (draught); figuratively, a lot or fate.

G4222.def: from a derivative of the alternate of G4095 (πίνω); to furnish drink, irrigate.

G4223.def: of Latin origin; little wells, i.e. mineral springs; Potioli (i.e. Puteoli), a place in Italy.

G4224.def: from the alternate of G4095 (πίνω); a drinking-bout or carousal.

G4225.def: genitive case of an indefinite pronoun (some) otherwise obsolete (compare G4214 (πόσος)); as adverb of place, somewhere, i.e. nearly.

G4226.def: genitive case of an interrogative pronoun (what) otherwise obsolete (perhaps the same as G4225 (πού) used with the rising slide of inquiry); as adverb of place; at (by implication, to) what locality.

G4227.def: of Latin origin; modest; Pudes (i.e. Pudens), a Christian.

G4228.def: a primary word; a "foot" (figuratively or literally)

G4229.def: from G4238 (πράσσω); a deed; by implication, an affair; by extension, an object (material)

G4230.def: from G4231 (πραγματεύομαι); a transaction, i.e. negotiation.

G4231.def: from G4229 (πρᾶγμα); to busy oneself with, i.e. to trade.

G4232.def: of Latin origin; the prætorium or governor's courtroom (sometimes including the whole edifice and camp)

G4233.def: from a derivative of G4238 (πράσσω); a practiser, i.e. (specially), an official collector.

G4234.def: from G4238 (πράσσω); practice, i.e. (concretely) an act; by extension, a function.

G4235.def: a form of G4239 (πραΰς), used in certain parts; gentle, i.e. humble.

G4236.def: from G4235 (πρᾷος); gentleness, by implication, humility.

G4237.def: perhaps from (a leek, and so an onion-patch); a garden plot, i.e. (by implication, of regular beds) a row (repeated in plural by Hebraism, to indicate an arrangement)

G4238.def: a primary verb; to "practise", i.e. perform repeatedly or habitually (thus differing from G4160 (ποιέω), which properly refers to a single act); by implication, to execute, accomplish, etc.; specially, to collect (dues), fare (personally)
G4238.kjv: commit, deeds, do, exact, keep, require, use arts

G4239.def: apparently a primary word; mild, i.e. (by implication) humble.

G4240.def: from G4239 (πραΰς); mildness, i.e. (by implication) humility.

G4241.def: apparently a primary verb; to tower up (be conspicuous), i.e. (by implication) to be suitable or proper (third person singular present indicative, often used impersonally, it is fit or right)

G4242.def: from G4243 (πρεσβεύω); seniority (eldership), i.e. (by implication) an embassy (concretely, ambassadors)

G4243.def: from the base of G4245 (πρεσβύτερος); to be a senior, i.e. (by implication) act as a representative (figuratively, preacher)

G4244.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4245 (πρεσβύτερος); the order of elders, i.e. (specially), Israelite Sanhedrin or Christian "presbytery".

G4245.def: comparative of (elderly); older; as noun, a senior; specially, an Israelite Sanhedrist (also figuratively, member of the celestial council) or Christian "presbyter".

G4246.def: from the same as G4245 (πρεσβύτερος); an old man.

G4247.def: feminine of G4246 (πρεσβύτης); an old woman.

G4248.def: from G4253 (πρό); leaning (falling) forward ("prone"), i.e. head foremost.

G4249.def: a strengthened form of a primary prio (to saw); to saw in two.

G4251.def: of Latin origin; feminine of Priscus, ancient; Priska, a Christian woman.

G4252.def: diminutive of G4251 (Πρίσκα); Priscilla (i.e. little Prisca), a Christian woman.

G4253.def: a primary preposition; "fore", i.e. in front of, prior (figuratively, superior) to.

G4254.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G71 (ἄγω); to lead forward (magisterially); intransitively, to precede (in place or time (participle, previous))

G4255.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G138 (αἱρέομαι); to choose for oneself before another thing (prefer), i.e. (by implication) to propose (intend)

G4256.def: from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G156 (αἰτία); to accuse already, i.e. previously charge.

G4257.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G191 (ἀκούω); to hear already,i.e. anticipate.

G4258.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G264 (ἁμαρτάνω); to sin previously (to conversion)

G4259.def: neuter of a presumed compound of G4253 (πρό) and G833 (αὐλή); a forecourt, i.e. vestibule (alley-way)

G4260.def: from G4253 (πρό) and the base of G939 (βάσις); to walk forward, i.e. advance (literally, or in years)
G4260.kjv: + be of a great age, go farther (on), be well stricken

G4261.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G906 (βάλλω); to throw forward, i.e. push to the front, germinate.

G4262.def: from G4263 (πρόβατον); relating to sheep, i.e. (a gate) through which they were led into Jerusalem.

G4263.def: probably neuter of a presumed derivative of G4260 (προβαίνω); something that walks forward (a quadruped), i.e. (specially), a sheep (literally or figuratively)

G4264.def: from G4253 (πρό) and a reduplicated form of G971 (βιάζω); to force forward, i.e. bring to the front, instigate.

G4265.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G991 (βλέπω); to look out beforehand, i.e. furnish in advance.

G4266.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1096 (γίνομαι); to be already, i.e. have previousy transpired.

G4267.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1097 (γινώσκω); to know beforehand, i.e. foresee.

G4270.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1125 (γράφω); to write previously; figuratively, to announce, prescribe.
G4270.kjv: before ordain, evidently set forth, write (afore, aforetime)

G4271.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1212 (δῆλος); plain before all men, i.e. obvious.

G4272.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1325 (δίδωμι); to give before the other party has given.

G4273.def: from G4272 (προδίδωμι) (in the sense of giving forward into another's (the enemy's) hands); a surrender.

G4274.def: from the alternate of G4390 (προτρέχω); a runner ahead, i.e. scout (figuratively, precursor)

G4276.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1679 (ἐλπίζω); to hope in advance of other confirmation.

G4277.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2036 (ἔπω); to say already, to predict.

G4278.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G1728 (ἐνάρχομαι); to commence already.

G4279.def: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G1861 (ἐπαγγέλλω); to promise of old.

G4280.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2046 (ἐρέω); used as alternate of G4277 (προέπω); to say already, predict.

G4281.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι) (including its alternate); to go onward, precede (in place or time)
G4281.kjv: go before (farther, forward), outgo, pass on

G4282.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2090 (ἑτοιμάζω); to fit up in advance (literally or figuratively)

G4283.def: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G2097 (εὐαγγελίζω); to announce glad news in advance.

G4284.def: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G2192 (ἔχω); to hold oneself before others, i.e. (figuratively) to excel.

G4285.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2233 (ἡγέομαι); to lead the way for others, i.e. show deference.

G4286.def: from G4388 (προτίθεμαι); a setting forth, i.e. (figuratively) proposal (intention); specially, the show-bread (in the Temple) as exposed before God.

G4287.def: from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι); fixed beforehand, i.e. (feminine with G2250 (ἡμέρα) implied) a designated day.

G4288.kjv: forwardness of mind, readiness (of mind), ready (willing) mind

G4289.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2372 (θυμός); forward in spirit, i.e. predisposed; neuter (as noun) alacrity.

G4291.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2476 (ἵστημι); to stand before, i.e. (in rank) to preside, or (by implication) to practise.

G4292.def: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G2564 (καλέω); to call forth to oneself (challenge), i.e. (by implication) to irritate.

G4293.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2605 (καταγγέλλω); to anounce beforehand, i.e. predict, promise.

G4294.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2675 (καταρτίζω); to prepare in advance.

G4295.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2749 (κεῖμαι); to lie before the view, i.e. (figuratively) to be present (to the mind), to stand forth (as an example or reward)

G4296.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2784 (κηρύσσω); to herald (i.e. proclaim) in advance.

G4297.def: from G4298 (προκόπτω); progress, i.e. advancement (subjectively or objectively)

G4298.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2875 (κόπτω); to drive forward (as if by beating), i.e. (figuratively and intransitively) to advance (in amount, to grow; in time, to be well along)
G4298.kjv: increase, proceed, profit, be far spent, wax

G4299.def: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G2919 (κρίνω); a prejudgment (prejudice), i.e. prepossession.

G4300.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2964 (κυρόω); to ratify previously.

G4301.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to take in advance, i.e. (literally) eat before others have an opportunity; (figuratively) to anticipate, surprise.

G4302.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3004 (λέγω); to say beforehand, i.e. predict, forewarn.

G4303.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3143 (μαρτύρομαι); to be a witness in advance i.e. predict.

G4304.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3191 (μελετάω); to premeditate.

G4305.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3309 (μεριμνάω); to care (anxiously) in advance.

G4306.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3539 (νοιέω); to consider in advance, i.e. look out for beforehand (actively, by way of maintenance for others; middle voice by way of circumspection for oneself)

G4307.def: from G4306 (προνοέω); forethought, i.e. provident care or supply.

G4308.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3708 (ὁράω); to behold in advance, i.e. (actively) to notice (another) previously, or (middle voice) to keep in (one's own) view.

G4309.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3724 (ὁρίζω); to limit in advance, i.e. (figuratively) predetermine.

G4310.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3958 (πάσχω); to undergo hardship previously.

G4311.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G3992 (πέμπω); to send forward, i.e. escort or aid in travel.
G4311.kjv: accompany, bring (forward) on journey (way), conduct forth

G4312.def: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G4098 (πίπτω); falling forward, i.e. headlong (figuratively, precipitate)

G4313.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to precede (as guide or herald)

G4314.def: a strengthened form of G4253 (πρό); a preposition of direction; forward to, i.e. toward (with the genitive case, the side of, i.e. pertaining to; with the dative case, by the side of, i.e. near to; usually with the accusative case, the place, time, occasion, or respect, which is the destination of the relation, i.e. whither or for which it is predicated)
G4314.kjv: about, according to , against, among, at, because of, before, between, (where-)by, for, X at thy house, in, for intent, nigh unto, of, which pertain to, that, to (the end that), X together, to (you) -ward, unto, with(-in)

G4315.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G4521 (σάββατον); a fore-sabbath, i.e. the Sabbath-eve.

G4316.def: from G4314 (πρός) and a derivative of G58 (ἀγορά) (mean to harangue); to address, i.e. salute by name.

G4317.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G71 (ἄγω); to lead towards, i.e. (transitively) to conduct near (summon, present), or (intransitively) to approach.

G4319.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G154 (αἰτέω); to ask repeatedly (importune), i.e. solicit.

G4320.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G305 (ἀναβαίνω); to ascend farther, i.e. be promoted (take an upper (more honorable) seat)

G4321.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G355 (ἀναλίσκω); to expend further.

G4322.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G378 (ἀναπληρόω); to fill up further, i.e. furnish fully.

G4323.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G394 (ἀνατίθεμαι); to lay up in addition, i.e. (middle voice and figuratively) to impart or (by implication) to consult.

G4324.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G546 (ἀπειλέω); to menace additionally.

G4325.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G1159 (δαπανάω); to expend additionally.

G4326.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G1189 (δέομαι); to require additionally, i.e. want further.

G4327.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G1209 (δέχομαι); to admit (to intercourse, hospitality, credence, or (figuratively) endurance); by implication, to await (with confidence or patience)

G4328.def: from G4314 (πρός) and dokeuo (to watch); to anticipate (in thought, hope or fear); by implication, to await.
G4328.kjv: (be in) expect(-ation), look (for), when looked, tarry, wait for

G4329.def: from G4328 (προσδοκάω); apprehension (of evil); by implication, infliction anticipated.

G4330.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G1439 (ἐάω); to permit further progress.

G4331.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G1448 (ἐγγίζω); to approach near.

G4332.def: from a compound of G4314 (πρός) and the base of G1476 (ἑδραῖος); to sit near, i.e. attend as a servant.

G4333.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2038 (ἐργάζομαι); to work additionally, i.e. (by implication) acquire besides.

G4334.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι) (including its alternate); to approach, i.e. (literally) come near, visit, or (figuratively) worship, assent to.
G4334.kjv: (as soon as he) come (unto), come thereunto, consent, draw near, go (near, to, unto)

G4335.def: from G4336 (προσεύχομαι); prayer (worship); by implication, an oratory (chapel)

G4336.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2172 (εὔχομαι); to pray to God, i.e. supplicate, worship.

G4337.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2192 (ἔχω); (figuratively) to hold the mind (3563 implied) towards, i.e. pay attention to, be cautious about, apply oneself to, adhere to.
G4337.kjv: (give) attend(-ance, -ance at, -ance to, unto), beware, be given to, give (take) heed (to unto); have regard

G4338.def: from G4314 (πρός) and a derivative of G2247 (ἧλος); to peg to, i.e. spike fast.

G4339.def: from the alternate of G4334 (προσέρχομαι); an arriver from a foreign region, i.e. (specially), an acceder (convert) to Judaism ("proselyte")

G4340.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2540 (καιρός); for the occasion only, i.e. temporary.
G4340.kjv: dur-(eth) for awhile, endure for a time, for a season, temporal

G4341.def: middle voice from G4314 (πρός) and G2564 (καλέω); to call toward oneself, i.e. summon, invite.

G4342.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2594 (καρτερέω); to be earnest towards, i.e. (to a thing) to persevere, be constantly diligent, or (in a place) to attend assiduously all the exercises, or (to a person) to adhere closely to (as a servitor)
G4342.kjv: attend (give self) continually (upon), continue (in, instant in, with), wait on (continually)

G4344.def: neuter of a presumed compound of G4314 (πρός) and G2776 (κεφαλή); something for the head, i.e. a cushion.

G4345.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2820 (κληρόω); to give a common lot to, i.e. (figuratively) to associate with.

G4346.def: from a compound of G4314 (πρός) and G2827 (κλίνω); a leaning towards, i.e. (figuratively) proclivity (favoritism)

G4347.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2853 (κολλάω); to glue to, i.e. (figuratively) to adhere.

G4348.def: from G4350 (προσκόπτω); a stub, i.e. (figuratively) occasion of apostasy.

G4349.def: from G4350 (προσκόπτω); a stumbling, i.e. (figuratively and concretely) occasion of sin.

G4350.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2875 (κόπτω); to strike at, i.e. surge against (as water); specially, to stub on, i.e. trip up (literally or figuratively)

G4351.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2947 (κυλιόω); to roll towards, i.e. block against.

G4352.def: from G4314 (πρός) and a probable derivative of G2965 (κύων) (meaning to kiss, like a dog licking his master's hand); to fawn or crouch to, i.e. (literally or figuratively) prostrate oneself in homage (do reverence to, adore)

G4354.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2980 (λαλέω); to talk to, i.e. converse with.

G4355.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); to take to oneself, i.e. use (food), lead (aside), admit (to friendship or hospitality)

G4357.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G3306 (μένω); to stay further, i.e. remain in a place, with a person; figuratively, to adhere to, persevere in.
G4357.kjv: abide still, be with, cleave unto, continue in (with)

G4358.def: from G4314 (πρός) and a derivative of the same as G3730 (ὁρμή) (meaning to tie (anchor) or lull); to moor to, i.e. (by implication) land at.

G4359.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G3784 (ὀφείλω); to be indebted additionally.

G4360.def: from G4314 (πρός) and a form of (to be vexed with something irksome); to feel indignant at.

G4361.def: from G4314 (πρός) and the same as G3983 (πεινάω); hungering further, i.e. intensely hungry.

G4362.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G4078 (πήγνυμι); to fasten to, i.e. (specially), to impale (on a cross)

G4363.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G4098 (πίπτω); to fall towards, i.e. (gently) prostrate oneself (in supplication or homage), or (violently) to rush upon (in storm)

G4364.def: middle voice from G4314 (πρός) and G4160 (ποιέω); to do forward for oneself, i.e. pretend (as if about to do a thing)

G4365.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G4198 (πορεύομαι); to journey towards, i.e. approach (not the same as G4313 (προπορεύομαι))

G4366.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G4486 (ῥήγνυμι); to tear towards, i.e. burst upon (as a tempest or flood)

G4367.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G5021 (τάσσω); to arrange towards, i.e. (figuratively) enjoin.

G4368.def: feminine of a derivative of G4291 (προΐστημι); a patroness, i.e. assistant.

G4369.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G5087 (τίθημι); to place additionally, i.e. lay beside, annex, repeat.
G4369.kjv: add, again, give more, increase, lay unto, proceed further, speak to any more

G4370.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G5143 (τρέχω) (including its alternate); to run towards, i.e. hasten to meet or join.

G4371.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of a compound of G4314 (πρός) and G5315 (φάγω); something eaten in addition to bread, i.e. a relish (specially, fish; compare G3795 (ὀψάριον))

G4372.def: from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G4969 (σφάζω); previously (recently) slain (fresh), i.e. (figuratively) lately made.

G4374.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G5342 (φέρω) (including its alternate); to bear towards, i.e. lead to, tender (especially to God), treat.
G4374.kjv: bring (to, unto), deal with, do, offer (unto, up), present unto, put to

G4375.def: from a presumed compound of G4314 (πρός) and G5368 (φιλέω); friendly towards, i.e. acceptable.

G4376.def: from G4374 (προσφέρω); presentation; concretely, an oblation (bloodless) or sacrifice.

G4377.def: from G4314 (πρός) and G5455 (φωνέω); to sound towards, i.e. address, exclaim, summon.

G4378.def: from a comparative of G4314 (πρός) and (to pour); a shedding forth, i.e. affusion.

G4379.def: from G4314 (πρός) and (to touch); to impinge, i.e. lay a finger on (in order to relieve)

G4380.def: from G4381 (προσωπολήπτης); to favor an individual, i.e. show partiality.

G4381.def: from G4383 (πρόσωπον) and G2983 (λαμβάνω); an accepter of a face (individual), i.e. (specially), one exhibiting partiality.

G4383.def: from G4314 (πρός) and (the visage, from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι)); the front (as being towards view), i.e. the countenance, aspect, appearance, surface; by implication, presence, person.
G4383.kjv: (outward) appearance, X before, countenance, face, fashion, (men's) person, presence

G4384.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G5021 (τάσσω); to pre-arrange, i.e. prescribe.

G4385.def: from G4253 (πρό) and (to stretch); to protend, i.e. tie prostrate (for scourging)

G4386.def: neuter of G4387 (πρότερος) as adverb (with or without the article); previously.

G4387.def: comparative of G4253 (πρό); prior or previous.

G4388.def: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and G5087 (τίθημι); to place before, i.e. (for oneself) to exhibit; (to oneself) to propose (determine)

G4389.def: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and the base of G5157 (τροπή); to turn forward for oneself, i.e. encourage.

G4390.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G5143 (τρέχω) (including its alternate); to run forward, i.e. outstrip, precede.

G4391.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G5225 (ὑπάρχω); to exist before, i.e. (adverbially) to be or do something previously.

G4392.def: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G5316 (φαίνω); an outward showing, i.e. pretext.

G4393.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G5342 (φέρω); to bear forward, i.e. produce.

G4395.def: from G4396 (προφήτης); to foretell events, divine, speak under inspiration, exercise the prophetic office.

G4396.def: from a compound of G4253 (πρό) and G5346 (φημί); a foreteller ("prophet"); by analogy, an inspired speaker; by extension, a poet.

G4397.def: from G4396 (προφήτης); pertaining to a foreteller ("prophetic")

G4398.def: feminine of G4396 (προφήτης); a female foreteller or an inspired woman.

G4399.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G5348 (φθάνω); to get an earlier start of, i.e. anticipate.

G4400.def: middle voice from G4253 (πρό) and a derivative of G5495 (χείρ); to handle for oneself in advance, i.e. (figuratively) to purpose.

G4401.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G5500 (χειροτονέω); to elect in advance.

G4402.def: from G4253 (πρό) and G5525 (χορός); before the dance; Prochorus, a Christian.

G4403.def: feminine of (hindmost); the stern of a ship.

G4404.def: adverb from G4253 (πρό); at dawn; by implication, the day-break watch.

G4405.def: feminine of a derivative of G4404 (πρωΐ) as noun; day-dawn.

G4406.def: from G4404 (πρωΐ); dawning, i.e. (by analogy) autumnal (showering, the first of the rainy season)

G4407.def: from G4404 (πρωΐ); pertaining to the dawn, i.e. matutinal.

G4408.def: feminine of a presumed derivative of G4253 (πρό) as noun; the prow, i.e. forward part of a vessel.

G4409.def: from G4413 (πρῶτος); to be first (in rank or influence)

G4410.def: from G4413 (πρῶτος) and G2515 (καθέδρα); a sitting first (in the front row), i.e. preeminence in council.

G4411.def: from G4413 (πρῶτος) and G2828 (κλισία); a reclining first (in the place of honor) at the dinner-bed, i.e. preeminence at meals.

G4412.def: neuter of G4413 (πρῶτος) as adverb (with or without G3588 (ὁ)); firstly (in time, place, order, or importance)
G4412.kjv: before, at the beginning, chiefly (at, at the) first (of all)

G4413.def: contracted superlative of G4253 (πρό); foremost (in time, place, order or importance)
G4413.kjv: before, beginning, best, chief(-est), first (of all), former

G4414.def: from G4413 (πρῶτος) and G2476 (ἵστημι); one standing first in the ranks, i.e. a captain (champion)

G4416.def: from G4413 (πρῶτος) and the alternate of G5088 (τίκτω); first-born (usually as noun, literally or figuratively)

G4417.def: a form of G4098 (πίπτω); to trip, i.e. (figuratively) to err, sin, fail (of salvation)

G4419.def: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4420 (πτέρυξ); a winglet, i.e. (figuratively) extremity (top corner)

G4420.def: from a derivative of G4072 (πέτομαι) (meaning a feather); a wing.

G4422.def: probably akin to the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω) (through the idea of causing to fall) or to G4072 (πέτομαι) (through that of causing to fly away); to scare.

G4424.def: from (Ptolemy, after whom it was named); Ptolemais, a place in Palestine.

G4425.def: from G4429 (πτύω); a winnowing-fork (as scattering like spittle)

G4426.def: from a presumed derivative of G4429 (πτύω) (and thus akin to G4422 (πτοέω)); to frighten.

G4428.def: probably akin to (to spread; and thus apparently allied to G4072 (πέτομαι) through the idea of expansion, and to 4429 through that of flattening; compare G3961 (πατέω)); to fold, i.e. furl a scroll.

G4429.def: a primary verb (compare G4428 (πτύσσω)); to spit.

G4430.def: from the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω); a ruin, i.e. (specially), lifeless body (corpse, carrion)

G4431.def: from the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω); a crash, i.e. downfall (literally or figuratively)

G4432.def: from G4433 (πτωχεύω); beggary, i.e. indigence (literally or figuratively)

G4433.def: from G4434 (πτωχός); to be a beggar, i.e. (by implication) to become indigent (figuratively)

G4434.def: from (to crouch); akin to G4422 (πτοέω) and the alternate of G4098 (πίπτω)); a beggar (as cringing), i.e. pauper (strictly denoting absolute or public mendicancy, although also used in a qualified or relative sense; whereas G3993 (πένης) properly means only straitened circumstances in private), literally (often as noun) or figuratively (distressed)

G4435.def: from a primary (the fist as a weapon); the clenched hand, i.e. (only in dative case as adverb) with the fist (hard scrubbing)

G4436.def: from (the name of the region where Delphi, the seat of the famous oracle, was located); a Python, i.e. (by analogy, with the supposed diviner there) inspiration (soothsaying)

G4437.def: from the same as G4635 (σκηνοποιός); clasped (thick), i.e. (figuratively) frequent; neuter plural (as adverb) frequently.

G4438.def: from a derivative of the same as G4435 (πυγμή); to box (with the fist), i.e. contend (as a boxer) at the games (figuratively)

G4439.def: apparently a primary word; a gate, i.e. the leaf or wing of a folding entrance (literally or figuratively)

G4440.def: from G4439 (πύλη); a gate-way, door-way of a building or city; by implication, a portal or vestibule.

G4441.def: middle voice prolonged from a primary (which occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses); to question, i.e. ascertain by inquiry (as a matter of information merely; and thus differing from G2065 (ἐρωτάω), which properly means a request as a favor; and from G154 (αἰτέω), which is strictly a demand for something due; as well as from G2212 (ζητέω), which implies a search for something hidden; and from G1189 (δέομαι), which involves the idea of urgent need); by implication, to learn (by casual intelligence)

G4442.def: a primary word; "fire" (literally or figuratively, specially, lightning)

G4444.def: apparently a primary word ("burgh"); a tower or castle.

G4445.def: from G4443 (πυρά); to be on fire, i.e. (specially), to have a fever.

G4446.def: from G4445 (πυρέσσω); inflamed, i.e. (by implication) feverish (as noun, fever)

G4447.def: from G4443 (πυρά); fiery, i.e. (by implication) flaming.

G4448.def: from G4442 (πῦρ); to kindle, i.e. (passively) to be ignited, glow (literally), be refined (by implication), or (figuratively) to be inflamed (with anger, grief, lust)
G4448.kjv: burn, fiery, be on fire, try

G4450.def: from G4442 (πῦρ); fire-like, i.e. (specially), flame- colored.

G4451.def: from G4448 (πυρόω); ignition, i.e. (specially), smelting (figuratively, conflagration, calamity as a test)

G4452.def: another form of the base of G4458 (-πώς); an enclitic particle of indefiniteness; yet, even; used only in the comparative. See G3369 (μηδέπω), G3380 (μήπω), G3764 (οὐδέπω), G3768 (οὔπω), G4455 (πώποτε).

G4453.def: probably ultimately from (to be busy, to trade); to barter (as a pedlar), i.e. to sell.

G4454.def: apparently a primary word; a "foal" or "filly", i.e. (specially), a young ass.

G4455.def: from G4452 (-πω) and G4218 (ποτέ); at any time, i.e. (with negative particle) at no time.
